Because estimated water contents in subducted oceanic slabs are typically lower than one weight percent, formation of these silicates is unlikely, suggesting that the mantle transition zone may restrict large scale water transport into the lower mantle. Wadsleyite and ringwoodite rather than dense hydrous magnesium silicates dominate water storage in the mantle transition zone, according to high-pressure and temperature experimental analysis.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 低水活度条件下地幔转换带中致密含水镁硅酸盐的稳定性与分布

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究俯冲板片在地幔过渡带中如何储水及DHMS能否向下地幔输水。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过16和21.5 GPa、1400 K下Mg-Si-H体系高温高压实验评估含水相稳定性。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 当总体含水量低于1.22 wt%时，水主要进入瓦兹利石和林伍德石，难形成DHMS。
summary_bullets.innovation: 在低水活度条件下定量限定DHMS稳定范围，修正过渡带主要储水相认识。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为地幔水循环、板片脱水及下地幔输水能力评估提供关键实验约束。

works.title: Hydrous multi-stage mantle melting controls gold enrichment in mafic Kermadec arc magmas
works.abstract: Abstract Many exceptionally Au-rich deposits are associated with subduction zones and Au-rich magmas. However, the origin of Au enrichment in arc magmas remains controversial. Here, we present a new high-precision geochemical dataset on 66 submarine glasses from the length of the oceanic Kermadec arc and Havre Trough back-arc system. The combined systematics of Au with other chalcophile elements (Ag, Cu, Se, Pt) shows that hydrous melting in the Kermadec subarc mantle occurs predominantely at relatively high temperatures above the sulfide liquidus and produces magmas with mantle-like Ag/Cu values. The highest Au (up to 6 ng/g) and Au/Cu (up to 0.06 × 10 -3 ) exceeds that in fertile mantle and primitive MORB by far, requiring remelting of previously depleted mantle. We demonstrate that high-degree multiple-stage melting of hydrous and oxidized subarc mantle are major drivers of Au enrichment of parental magmas in intra-oceanic island arcs, such as the Kermadec arc.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 基性克马德克岛弧岩浆中的金富集受富水多阶段地幔熔融控制

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究俯冲带弧岩浆中金异常富集的来源与控制机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 分析66件Kermadec弧及弧后海底玻璃的高精度地球化学数据。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 富水氧化地幔的多阶段高程度熔融可显著提高母岩浆金含量。
summary_bullets.innovation: 用金与Ag、Cu、Se、Pt协同约束，提出多阶段重熔致金富集模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解岛弧成矿与富金岩浆成因提供了新的地球化学依据。

works.title: Recycled oceanic crust into Paleo-Tethys plume source: Insights from Changning-Menglian orogenic belt
works.abstract: Plate-tectonic mechanisms drive the recycling of oceanic crust into Earth’s mantle, generating chemical and lithological heterogeneities that are believed to significantly influence plume-related magmatism on a global scale. Here, we present new constraints on the interaction between mantle plumes and recycled oceanic crust, based on integrated Os-Hf-O-Mg isotopes and whole-rock geochemical data (major and trace elements and platinum group elements [PGEs]). These analyses were performed on late Paleozoic picrites with mid-ocean-ridge basalt (MORB) affinity and picrites/basalts with oceanic-island basalt (OIB) affinity from the Changning-Menglian belt in southwestern China. Both MORB- and OIB-type picrites have Zn/Fe ratios <12 and 187Os/188Os ratios (0.113−0.131) similar to typical mantle values, suggesting a predominantly peridotite mantle source. In contrast, over half of the OIB-type basalts show elevated Zn/Fe ratios (>12) and 187Os/188Os ratios (up to 0.513) that deviate from typical mantle values, indicating a contribution from pyroxenite-derived melts. Zircons from these OIB-type basalts exhibit mantle-like εHf(t) values (+1.4 to +7.9) but crust-like δ18O values (+3.2‰ to +5.2‰), supporting the involvement of high-temperature altered oceanic crust in their source. These basalts also exhibit atypical PGE signatures marked by strong depletions in Pd and Ru relative to Ir, consistent with the incorporation of residual oceanic crust that previously experienced release of oxidizing fluids during plate subduction. Notably, the OIB-type basalts record systematically lower δ26Mg values (−0.57‰ to −0.31‰) compared to mantle peridotite (−0.25‰ ± 0.04‰). This light Mg isotope signature, coupled with elevated Hf/Sm ratios, indicates metasomatism of the mantle source by dolomitic melts derived from recycled carbonate-bearing oceanic crust. Thermal modeling yields anomalously high and overlapping mantle melting temperatures for MORB-type (1433−1542 °C) and OIB-type (1434−1678 °C) samples, supporting a cogenetic, plume-driven melting regime. Our results demonstrate that recycled oceanic crust was entrained by an ascending plume beneath the Paleo-Tethys Ocean, revealing a slab-plume interaction mechanism that contributes to the chemical and isotopic diversity observed in mantle sources. These findings enhance current understanding of deep Earth material cycling and the role of Paleo-Tethys evolution in supercontinent cycles.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 再循环洋壳进入古特提斯地幔柱源区：来自昌宁—孟连造山带的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究古特提斯地幔柱是否卷入再循环洋壳并造成源区不均一。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合Os-Hf-O-Mg同位素、全岩主微量/PGE地球化学及热模拟分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: OIB型玄武岩源区含再循环洋壳、辉石岩熔体及碳酸盐交代，且与MORB型同属地幔柱成因。
summary_bullets.innovation: 多同位素与PGE协同约束板片-地幔柱相互作用及再循环洋壳来源。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解深部物质循环、地幔源区多样性及古特提斯演化提供关键证据。

works.title: CO2 subsurface mineral storage by its co-injection with recirculating water
works.abstract: Abstract Carbon capture and storage (CCS) has the potential to help nations meet their Paris Agreement CO 2 reduction commitments 1,2 . The ability to capture CO 2 within mafic and ultramafic rocks through mineralization of carbon is an example of such a CCS technology 3,4 , but large-scale deployment has yet to be achieved 5,6 . Each geologic environment in the Earth’s crust requires a distinct carbon storage solution. Whereas some regions of the subsurface contain saline aquifers and sedimentary traps suitable for traditional carbon storage through the injection of high-pressure, dense CO 2 below impermeable caprocks, other regions may lack caprocks 5–9 . In these regions, carbon storage is possible through the mineralization of injected water-dissolved CO 2 forming stable carbonate minerals through its reactions with reactive silicate rocks and minerals 6,10,11 . A notable challenge to applying this process at scale is that it can require 20–50 times or more water than the mass of CO 2 stored 12 . Here we report on an industrial-scale pilot project designed to find a carbon disposal solution for western Saudi Arabia. This arid region has large point-source CO 2 emitters, including petroleum refining and desalination facilities, but lacks saline aquifers and sedimentary traps 13–17 . We find that a CO 2 injection approach based on the recirculation of subsurface fluids can eliminate the need for external water. Our results demonstrate the feasibility of carbon mineral storage in regions in which access to water resources may be limited.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 通过与循环水协同注入实现的CO2地下矿物封存

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文解决干旱缺水且缺乏盖层地区的CO2地下封存难题。
summary_bullets.methodology: 开展工业级中试，采用CO2与地下循环水共注入促进原位矿化封存。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 地下流体循环可免除外部供水，并证明该区矿物封存可行。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出并验证利用回灌循环地下水替代大量外部水的封存方案。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为缺水、无传统储层地区的大规模CCS提供可推广的新路径。

works.title: Magmatic–hydrothermal mineralization processes in the Xiwukou Sn–W–Rb deposit, Jiangnan orogenic belt: Constraints from multi-mineral U–Pb geochronology
works.abstract: Tin-tungsten-rubidium mineralization is typically associated with magmatic–hydrothermal processes. To examine the transition and mineralization processes from the late magmatic to hydrothermal stages, a comprehensive geochemical-geochronological investigation on monazite, cassiterite, and wolframite, together with bulk-rock compositions and petrology was carried out on the Xiwukou Sn–W–Rb polymetallic deposit and its associated granites in the eastern segment of the Jiangnan Orogenic Belt (JOB), South China. Field observations revealed that altered granite–greisen-type Sn–Rb ore bodies occur in the upper part of the intrusion, while quartz vein-type Sn–W ore bodies are hosted mainly in Silurian sedimentary country rocks. LA-ICP-MS U–Pb dating of monazite from the Xiwukou pluton delineates two distinct magmatic stages: 139.9 ± 1.0 Ma for porphyritic granite (Granite Ⅰ) and 129.0 ± 0.7 Ma for porphyritic biotite granite (Granite Ⅱ). Monazite from altered granite and altered granite-type Sn ore yielded consistent ages of 129.3 ± 0.8 and 128.9 ± 1.3 Ma, respectively. Furthermore, cassiterite and wolframite dating directly constrained the Sn mineralization from 128.9 ± 0.9 Ma (altered granite-type) to 126.4 ± 1.5 Ma (quartz vein-type), while the W mineralization in wolframite–topaz–quartz veins formed from 127.4 ± 1.4 to 125.5 ± 2.0 Ma. The monazite geochemistry revealed systematic compositional variations during the magmatic–hydrothermal evolution, characterized by decreasing Th contents, increasing Eu anomalies, and enhanced LREE-HREE differentiation from the granite and altered granite to the Sn ores. Integrated with the whole-rock geochemistry of the granites and tectonic setting of the JOB during this period, we conclude that emplacement of porphyritic biotite granite at ca. 129 Ma occurred in an extensional setting, which triggered the primary Sn–W metallogenetic event.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 江南造山带西坞口锡—钨—铷矿床的岩浆—热液成矿过程：来自多矿物 U–Pb 年代学的约束

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究锡钨铷矿化由晚期岩浆向热液阶段转变的时序与机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合独居石、锡石、黑钨矿U-Pb定年及全岩地球化学、岩相学分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 129Ma黑云母花岗岩侵位触发主成矿，Sn-W矿化持续至约125Ma。
summary_bullets.innovation: 用多矿物U-Pb直接约束岩浆—热液演化与Sn-W成矿时空关系。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为花岗岩相关稀有金属成矿机制、找矿预测和区域构造解释提供约束。

works.title: Deciphering ore formation and guiding ore exploration for antimony within the North Himalayan Metallogenic Belt, southern Xizang (Tibet): Insights from antimony isotopic fingerprints
works.abstract: The North Himalayan Metallogenic Belt (NHMB) hosts a series of Sb, Sb-Au, and Sb-Pb-Zn-Ag deposits, yet the genetic association for these deposits remains poorly understood. Herein, we examine the Sb isotopic compositions of these Sb-bearing deposits to gain insights into regional Sb mineralization processes and guide ore exploration. The measured δ123Sb values (relative to the NIST 3102a standard) of the stibnite range from −0.16‰ to +2.06‰, with the Mazhala deposit exhibiting the lightest Sb isotopic compositions (−0.16‰ to +0.15‰), followed by the Shalagang (+0.09‰ to +0.35‰) and Cheqiongzhuobu (−0.11‰ to +0.45‰) deposits. Meanwhile, the Taga deposit displays the heaviest Sb isotopic compositions (+1.89‰ to +2.06‰) observed to date. Rayleigh distillation is inferred as the primary mechanism driving Sb isotopic variation during ore formation. With the support of S-Pb isotopic data and geological evidence, a Rayleigh distillation model was established. This model, together with the negative correlation between Sb isotopic compositions and ore-forming paleodepths, indicates that the studied Sb-bearing deposits in the NHMB share a common dominant Sb source (Precambrian metamorphic basement). These Sb-bearing deposits are products of a large-scale regional Sb-bearing hydrothermal system that precipitated ores at different positions or paleodepths within the shallow crust. Subsequently, these ores underwent differential erosion. Additionally, the regional differential erosion coupled with the Rayleigh distillation model indicate that the deeper parts of these deposits still hold significant potential for Sb-Au exploration. These findings provide new insights into the role of Sb isotopes in tracing hydrothermal mineralization processes and guiding regional exploration strategies.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 基于锑同位素指纹解析西藏南部北喜马拉雅成矿带锑矿成矿作用并指导找矿勘查

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究北喜马拉雅成锑矿床的成因联系、锑来源及找矿指示。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定辉锑矿锑同位素，并结合硫铅同位素、地质证据与瑞利分馏建模。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 各矿床共享前寒武纪变质基底锑源，锑同位素差异主要受瑞利分馏与成矿深度控制。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次以锑同位素指纹和分馏模型系统揭示区域锑成矿过程并预测深部找矿潜力。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为示踪热液成矿系统、厘清矿床成因联系及指导深部锑金勘查提供新工具。

works.title: Disequilibrium response to tapping crustal magma reveals storage conditions
works.abstract: Abstract The conditions under which magma accumulates and is stored are fundamental to unravelling the processes of crust formation, planetary differentiation, geothermal heat recharge and volcanic eruptions. Storage pressure, temperature and volatile saturation are typically inferred from erupted volcanic products. However, changes during kilometres of magma ascent induce disequilibrium crystallization and vesiculation, and inverting back to storage conditions comes with unresolvable uncertainties. Here we explore opportunities arising from magma drilling at Krafla volcano, Iceland, to reconstruct real, in situ magmatic conditions. The findings show that, over the approximately 5 min in which the magma is quenched, vapour bubbles consisting of H 2 O and CO 2 exsolve, grow and resorb, but the changes can be accounted for by multiparametric inversion (for chemistry, vesicularity and vitrification), and that the magma was stored under volatile-saturated lithostatic conditions, unlike previous assertions of lower vapour pressures based on classic methods 1 . These new disequilibrium simulations reconcile the glass chemistry with conceptual models of magma storage and provide us with the unique pairing of precisely measured depth and volatile pressure on a single magma body and thus a robust method to improve our understanding of magma storage conditions and evolution.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 地壳岩浆抽排过程中的非平衡响应揭示其储存条件

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究岩浆钻探取样后失衡变化中如何反演其原位储存压力、温度与挥发分条件。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合Krafla岩浆钻探样品与化学、孔隙率、玻璃化多参数反演及失衡模拟。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 岩浆在约5分钟淬冷中发生气泡析出增大再吸收，但仍可反演出挥发分饱和的岩压储存条件。
summary_bullets.innovation: 利用原位钻遇岩浆与失衡过程校正，直接耦合深度和挥发分压力约束储存状态。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该方法降低喷发产物反演储存条件的不确定性，有助于理解岩浆储库、火山喷发与地热系统。

works.title: The stable K and Rb isotope composition of Icelandic basalts: Implications for mantle heterogeneity
works.abstract: Basalts erupted in Iceland show varying contributions from the depleted, recycled and primordial components present in the underlying heterogeneous mantle plume. While many Icelandic basalts have a substantial contribution from recycled mantle components, some do not, preserving instead magmas derived from depleted and primordial mantle components. Iceland provides an opportunity for characterising the compositions of different mantle domains and, in particular, to deconvolve the contributions of recycled and primordial components. In order to characterise the stable K and Rb isotope compositions in different mantle domains, we present K and Rb stable isotope data for 31 basaltic glasses, tholeiitic through transitional to alkalic in composition, sampled from Iceland's active neovolcanic zones. Our results show that δ 41 K values vary between −0.299 ± 0.025‰ and − 0.499 ± 0.021‰ (2SD) and δ 87 Rb values vary from −0.15 ± 0.04‰ to 0.02 ± 0.06‰ (2SD), in Icelandic basalts, extending outside of the range previously identified for the bulk silicate Earth (BSE, −0.42 ± 0.07‰ 2SD and − 0.13 ± 0.06‰ 2SD, respectively). While the δ 41 K values demonstrate no mantle-derived variation, the δ 87 Rb values show correlations with conventional mantle source proxies (e.g., radiogenic isotopes) indicating a mantle source control. The highest δ 87 Rb values, those furthest removed from BSE, are from two primitive glasses from southwest Iceland whose radiogenic and noble gas isotope ratios indicate minimal contributions from recycled material, but significant contributions from primordial material. These high δ 87 Rb values may represent δ 87 Rb values of the primordial component sampled by the mantle plume beneath Iceland, and therefore a vestige of Earth's earliest mantle.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 冰岛玄武岩中稳定 K 和 Rb 同位素组成：对地幔不均一性的意义

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究冰岛玄武岩K、Rb稳定同位素能否示踪地幔不均一性及原始/再循环组分。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定31个冰岛玄武岩玻璃的δ41K、δ87Rb，并结合放射性与稀有气体同位素对比。
summary_bullets.key_findings: δ41K未见明显地幔源变化，δ87Rb与地幔源指标相关，原始地幔组分可能更高。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统区分冰岛地幔柱中K与Rb稳定同位素对再循环和原始组分的不同响应。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为识别地幔源区组成及追踪地球早期原始地幔残余提供新的同位素约束。

works.title: Paleoproterozoic multiple metamorphic overprinting of granulite facies in the Daqingshan area of the North China Craton and its tectonic implications
works.abstract: Repeated high-grade metamorphic overprinting usually results in incomplete re-equilibrium. This blurs the pressure-temperature-time (P-T-t) information preserved in ancient terranes, complicating the reconstruction of orogenic evolution and tectonics. This study investigated metabasites from the Daqingshan area of the North China Craton, comparing samples distal and proximal to the deformation zone. An undeformed granulite and a plastically deformed amphibolite both record an earlier ultrahigh-temperature (UHT) metamorphism peaking at 950−1000 °C and 8−9 kbar with post-peak cooling ending at fluid-absent solidi, followed by a later granulite-facies overprinting to peak conditions of 8−9 kbar and 870−890 °C, likely driven by prograde hydrational P-T rises. These P-T conditions were reliably constrained by three key factors: tetrahedral Al in clinopyroxene, anorthite in plagioclase, and Ti in amphibole. The overprinting assemblages vary in extent between samples (e.g., local embryos versus widespread neoblasts), suggesting that more complete petrologic records of metamorphic overprinting benefit from deformation and fluid availability. Moreover, zircon and monazite dating show that the earlier UHT metamorphism cooled at 1.94−1.92 Ga, whereas the later overprinting occurred at 1.87−1.83 Ga. The UHT metamorphism is attributed to post-orogenic or backarc extension, preceded by an orogenic event that produced high-pressure granulite-facies metamorphism at ca. 1.96−1.94 Ga. The granulite-facies overprinting is attributed to a separate orogenic event involving typical crustal thickening after the UHT metamorphism, based on its P-T path and nearby geologic data.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 华北克拉通大青山地区古元古代麻粒岩相多期变质叠加及其构造意义

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探讨大青山麻粒岩多期变质叠加的P-T-t信息及其构造意义。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过对比变形带远近基性岩样品，结合矿物温压计与锆石、独居石定年分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 识别出1.94–1.92 Ga超高温变质与1.87–1.83 Ga麻粒岩相叠加两期事件。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出变形与流体可增强变质叠加记录，并用多矿物指标可靠约束温压条件。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究有助于重建华北克拉通古元古代造山演化及多期变质过程。

works.title: Copper-hydroxyl interactions drive water-promoted copper surface oxidation and mobility
works.abstract: The reactions of oxygen (O2) and water (H2O) molecules with metal surfaces are critical to heterogeneous catalysis, corrosion, and electrochemical energy conversion. However, disentangling their individual roles remains challenging because both pathways yield the same dissociation product, atomic oxygen (O), and share the hydroxyl (OH) intermediate, thereby obscuring the molecular origin of metal oxidation. In this study, we combine in-situ transmission electron microscopy techniques and ReaxFF reactive force field molecular dynamics (MD) simulations to elucidate the promotional role of H2O in copper (Cu) surface oxidation. Our results reveal that the structurally disordered Cu/CuOx interface preferentially adsorbs OH derived from H2O dissociation. The resulting strong Cu-OH interaction causes dynamic disorder in the topmost Cu layer while enriching electron density in the sublayer. This coupled structural and electronic modulation lowers the resistance for oxygen incorporation, promoting deeper lattice penetration, accelerating oxidation, and enhancing Cu atomic mobility. In contrast, oxidation under pure O2 produces a comparatively ordered interface that suppresses sustained oxygen ingress, rendering further oxidation kinetically less favorable. These findings identify OH-mediated interfacial dynamics as a key driver of water-assisted metal oxidation and provide mechanistic guidance for controlling oxidation processes in catalytic and corrosion-resistant materials. Water and oxygen jointly influence the oxidation of copper, but their respective roles are difficult to disentangle. Here, the authors show that hydroxyl species adsorb at the Cu/CuOx interface, roughen the surface, and enable deeper oxygen penetration and higher Cu mobility.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 铜—羟基相互作用驱动水促进的铜表面氧化与迁移性

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究水与氧在铜表面氧化中的各自作用及水促进机理。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合原位透射电镜与ReaxFF反应力场分子动力学模拟。
summary_bullets.key_findings: OH优先吸附于Cu/CuOx界面，促使表层无序并加速氧深入与铜迁移。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示OH介导的界面结构与电子调制是水促进铜氧化的关键机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为催化、腐蚀防护与电化学材料中的氧化调控提供机制指导。

works.title: Volcano-hydrothermal phosphorus pulses fostered ocean oxidation during Ediacaran phosphogenesis in South China
works.abstract: Abstract Phosphorus availability limits marine productivity and influences ocean oxygenation, yet the mechanisms driving phosphorus enrichment in Ediacaran oceans remain uncertain. Here we present petrographic and geochemical data from phosphorites of the Ediacaran Doushantuo Formation at the Longxi section, South China. Elevated uranium to thorium ratios, positive europium anomalies, and preserved volcanic glass indicate a substantial contribution from volcanic and hydrothermal activity in addition to continental sources. We propose a conceptual depositional model involving three stages: hydrothermal phosphorus delivery and precipitation under reducing conditions, dolomitization-associated apatite formation during early diagenesis, and microbially mediated phosphogenesis linked to progressive oxygenation. Our results suggest that episodic volcanic and hydrothermal phosphorus inputs enhanced marine productivity and contributed to increasing ocean oxygen levels, highlighting a dynamic coupling between palaeoenvironment and biogeochemical cycles during the Ediacaran.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 华南埃迪卡拉纪成磷作用期间，火山—热液磷脉冲促进了海洋氧化

summary_bullets.research_question: 探究埃迪卡拉纪海洋磷富集的来源及其与海洋氧化的关系。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合磷块岩岩相学观察与铀钍比、铕异常等地球化学分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 火山—热液脉冲输入磷促进磷块岩形成、海洋生产力提升与增氧。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出火山热液供磷、白云石化成磷灰石和微生物成磷三阶段模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解前寒武纪海洋氧化、磷循环及环境—生物地球化学耦合提供证据。

works.title: Constraints on Noble Gas Variability in OIB and MORB From Non‐Equilibrium Magmatic Degassing Models
works.abstract: Abstract Noble gas concentrations in ocean island basalts (OIB) and mid‐ocean ridge basalts (MORB) are affected by degassing processes, obscuring their pre‐eruptive characteristics. Degassing corrections commonly assume near‐equilibrium partitioning of noble gases between melt and vapor. However, kinetic disequilibrium has been proposed as a mechanism capable of modifying noble gas ratios. For example, kinetic effects may allow OIBs to exhibit lower 3 He contents than MORBs, even if OIB plumes sample a low 4 He/ 3 He “undegassed” primordial lower mantle—the so‐called “Helium Paradox” (Gonnermann & Mukhopadhyay, 2007, https://doi.org/10.1038/nature06240 ). It has also been suggested that kinetic effects allow OIB and MORB to share a homogeneous pre‐degassing 3 He/ 22 Ne ratio. Despite this, inferred mantle compositions may not require the presence of an “undegassed” reservoir, and there is evidence that OIB and MORB sources exhibit heterogenous 3 He/ 22 Ne ratios. Here, we model the kinetics of and noble gas exchange between bubbles and melt within a three‐stage framework for magmatic ascent to evaluate the magnitude of non‐equilibrium fractionation. The first and third stages treat the kinetics of bubble growth during closed‐system decompression, whilst the second treats gas exchange between ascending bubbles and a melt at rest within a shallow, open‐system, sub‐volcanic reservoir. Across plausible ranges of ascent rate, bubble populations, and noble gas diffusivity, our results indicate that disequilibrium cannot produce variations in 3 He contents and 3 He/ 22 Ne ratios sufficient to reproduce the range observed in OIB and MORB. Therefore, OIB and MORB sources cannot share a homogenous 3 He/ 22 Ne ratio, and disequilibrium does not resolve the “Helium Paradox.”
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 基于非平衡岩浆脱气模型对 OIB 和 MORB 中稀有气体变异性的约束

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究岩浆脱气非平衡动力学能否解释OIB与MORB稀有气体差异。
summary_bullets.methodology: 构建三阶段岩浆上升脱气模型，模拟气泡生长与熔体—气泡稀有气体交换。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 非平衡分馏幅度不足以再现观测到的3He含量和3He/22Ne差异。
summary_bullets.innovation: 将封闭与开放体系脱气过程整合，系统约束非平衡效应的上限。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为地幔源区是否均一及“氦悖论”提供定量检验，改进稀有气体示踪解释。

works.title: The Variation of the Cenozoic Magmatic Activity Across the Sumatra Region Caused by Wharton Fossil Ridge Subduction
works.abstract: Abstract Cenozoic igneous rocks south of Sumatra's Toba volcano record distinct magmatic variations across the region. The south underwent prolonged magmatic quiescence, the central region experienced a shorter pause, and the north maintained near continuous activity. Geological and geophysical data link this spatiotemporal variability to changes in slab dip angle, driven by the unevenly buoyant Wharton Ridge. However, the dynamic process of the Wharton Fossil Ridge subduction and the factors that affect it remain unclear. Using “I2VIS” thermomechanical modeling, we investigated how subduction modes depend on ridge cooling age (1–15 Ma) and continental trenchward velocity (1–3.5 cm/yr). Based on the evolution trajectory of slab dip angle ( θ ), we identify three subduction modes: flat‐slab subduction ( θ ≈ 0°), low‐angle decoupled subduction ( θ ≈ 15°), and moderate‐to‐high‐angle subduction ( θ ≥ 30°). Numerical simulations indicate that young oceanic ridges (≤5 Ma) combined with high continental trenchward velocities (≥2 cm/yr) initiate flat‐slab subduction and prolonged magmatic quiescence. In contrast, older ridges (≥7 Ma) and slower trenchward velocities (≤2 cm/yr) promote moderate‐to‐high‐angle subduction and sustained magmatism. Low‐angle decoupled subduction represents an intermediate mode, characterized by shorter periods of quiescence or diminished magmatism. Numerical results align with geological and geophysical observations. Our synthesis indicates that the spatiotemporal variations in Sumatra's magmatism during Cenozoic were jointly influenced by two concurrent factors: the cooling age of the extinct Wharton Ridge as it passed beneath the southern, central, and northern regions, and the clockwise southwestward rotation of the Sumatran Block between 50 and 30 Ma.
works.venue: Journal of Geophysical Research: Solid Earth
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: Wharton 化石海岭俯冲导致的苏门答腊地区新生代岩浆活动变化

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究苏门答腊新生代岩浆活动南北差异的成因与机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 用I2VIS热-机械数值模拟分析海岭年龄与陆块向海沟运动影响。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 年轻海岭叠加较快陆块前进致平板俯冲和长期静默，反之维持持续岩浆活动。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出海岭冷却年龄与苏门答腊地块旋转共同控制俯冲模式和岩浆演化。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解浮力异常洋脊俯冲、板片几何与弧岩浆时空变化提供可检验框架。

works.title: First experimental evaluation of zircon-in-garnet elastic thermobarometry at high pressures
works.abstract: Zircon inclusions in garnet (ZiG) can be used as an elastic thermobarometer to estimate the pressure-temperature (P-T) conditions of geologic processes. Although this method is being increasingly applied as a thermometer to natural samples, experimental evaluation of ZiG is limited and has not been investigated at geologically relevant pressures. We present the first high-pressure assessment of the reliability of ZiG thermobarometry by crystallizing almandine with zircon inclusions in piston-cylinder experiments between 700−900 °C and 2.0−3.0 GPa. Zircons entrapped in experiments at >2.0 GPa yield residual inclusion pressures within 1σ of predicted values and yield entrapment temperatures within 17−30 °C of experimental T. Zircon inclusions in experiments performed at 2.0 GPa yield average inclusion pressures that are ∼0.09 GPa higher than predicted values and therefore yield entrapment temperatures 65−73 °C higher than the experimental T. Evaluation of inclusion pressure trends shows that ZiG host-inclusion systems did not undergo non-elastic deformation during experimental exhumation, confirming that ZiG elastic thermobarometry can accurately record P-T conditions of garnet crystallization so long as zircon inclusions do not go into tension post-entrapment. Our high-pressure experiments suggest that the ZiG host-inclusion system may be applicable to a variety of geologic settings and processes, such as subduction zone metamorphism, partial melting, and contact metamorphism.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 高压条件下石榴子石中锆石弹性温压计的首次实验评估

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究锆石包裹体于石榴子石弹性温压计在高压下是否可靠。
summary_bullets.methodology: 在700–900℃、2.0–3.0GPa活塞圆筒实验中合成含锆石包裹体的铁铝榴石并测残余压。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 大于2.0GPa时结果与预测基本一致，2.0GPa时温度偏高，且系统未见非弹性变形。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在地质相关高压条件下对ZiG弹性温压计进行了实验检验。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 证明该方法可较可靠重建多种变质与熔融过程的形成温压条件。

works.title: In-situ mineral chemistry, sulfur and lead isotopes, and paragenetic analysis to unravel the ore-forming processes in Qibaoshan Co-Ni-Cu-Pb-Zn deposit (Qin-Hang metallogenic belt, South China)
works.abstract: Abstract Cobalt and nickel are critical metals in high-demand for clean energy technologies, its occurrence in sediment-hosted deposits is mostly in association with Cu, but rare in association with Pb-Zn mineralization. The Qibaoshan deposit, located in the Qin-Hang metallogenic belt of western Jiangxi, South China, presents a unique case of stratiform Zn-Pb-Co-Ni-Cu mineralization hosted in Devonian-Carboniferous clastic-carbonate strata, with no exposed magmatic rocks. This study integrates in-situ mineral chemistry, sulfur and lead isotopes, and paragenetic analysis to unravel the ore-forming processes of this unusual polymetallic system. Results reveal two distinct mineralization events: (1) an earlier Pb-Zn stage driven by basin fluids heated by concealed magmatism, with metals and sulfur sourced from the metamorphic basement; and (2) a later Co-Cu-Ni stage linked to intermediate-mafic magmatic-hydrothermal fluids, introducing magma-derived sulfur and metals. Cobalt and nickel occur mainly as independent minerals, including sulfarsenide cobaltite, gersdorffite, diarsenide safflorite, rammelsbergite, loellingite, and triarsenide skutterudite, with minor substitution in pyrite and arsenopyrite. This study highlights a rare example of superimposed sediment-hosted base metal and critical metal mineralization, driven by dual fluid systems with contrasting sources. The findings challenge traditional models of sediment-hosted deposits and offer new insights into the diversity of cobalt enrichment mechanisms. The Qibaoshan deposit serves as a key natural laboratory for understanding metal coexistence, fluid evolution, and exploration targeting in complex polymetallic systems.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 利用原位矿物化学、硫和铅同位素及矿物共生分析揭示七宝山Co-Ni-Cu-Pb-Zn矿床（华南钦杭成矿带）的成矿过程

summary_bullets.research_question: 解析七宝山层控Co-Ni-Cu-Pb-Zn矿床的成矿过程与物质来源。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合原位矿物化学、硫铅同位素及矿物共生序列分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 矿床经历早期Pb-Zn和晚期Co-Cu-Ni两阶段叠加成矿。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示无出露岩浆岩区双源流体驱动的关键金属叠加成矿。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为层控多金属矿找矿模型与钴富集机制研究提供新依据。

works.title: Identifying ca. 190 Ma Nb-Ta-Sn metasomatic alteration in the world-class Bailongshan pegmatite Li deposit, Northwest China
works.abstract: Pegmatite-aplite systems are critical hosts for Li, Nb, and Ta mineralization, yet the role of their spatial distribution and overprinting enrichment processes remains poorly constrained. The world-class Bailongshan Li pegmatite deposit (Li2O resource >5 Mt), situated in the Western Kunlun Orogenic Belt of Northwest China, hosts Li-Nb-Ta mineralization primarily in coarse-grained spodumene pegmatites (Spd-1; >3 cm wide; pegmatite layer). These Spd-1 pegmatites are crosscut by fine-grained, spodumene-bearing pegmatites (Spd-2; <3 cm wide; aplite layer) that also exhibit distinct Nb-Ta-Sn enrichment. Two types of aplite are distinguished in the Bailongshan deposit: (1) aplite associated with and parallel to pegmatite zones, which is mostly spodumene-free, and (2) aplite layers that crosscut pegmatite zones at a small angle, exhibit a fine-grained texture, host fine-grained spodumene, and are characterized by typical hydrothermal alteration. Geochronology of columbite-group minerals (CGMs) in the coarse-grained pegmatite and fine-grained aplite layers reveals primary magmatic crystallization at ca. 210 Ma and a later metasomatic alteration at ca. 190 Ma (191.8 ± 1.5 Ma to ca. 191.0 ± 1.4 Ma), recorded by CGMs with higher Sn, Hf, Zr, and total rare earth elements (ΣREEs) with dissolution-precipitation textures. Spd-2 crystals in the fine-grained spodumene pegmatite are primarily xenocrystic, as the structural data obtained from single-crystal X-ray diffraction of both coarse-grained and fine-grained spodumene exhibits comparable structural characteristics. The electron backscatter diffraction (EBSD) data indicated a slight orientation difference (0° to 2°) between the Spd-2 grains and the larger Spd-1 crystals. Coarse-grained Spd-1 was incorporated into the fine-grained aplite layer to form the xenocrystic Spd-2; this is evidenced by their comparable crystallographic structures despite the elevated Na, Mn, Fe, Ga, and Sn concentrations in Spd-2. The “bookshelf” structures in the aplite layer further suggest that ductile deformation facilitated the mechanical disaggregation of spodumene; this, combined with metasomatic alteration, contributed to localized Nb-Ta-Sn enrichment.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 识别中国西北世界级白龙山伟晶岩型锂矿床中约190 Ma的Nb-Ta-Sn交代蚀变

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究白龙山伟晶岩-细晶岩中锂铌钽锡富集的时空分布及叠加改造机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合铌钽铁矿定年、单晶XRD、EBSD及矿物地球化学与构造观察分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 粗粒伟晶岩约210Ma成岩，约190Ma交代改造促使细晶岩局部Nb-Ta-Sn再富集。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次识别白龙山约190Ma铌钽锡交代事件，并证明细粒锂辉石多为捕虏晶。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为伟晶岩型锂铌钽矿成因、叠加富集识别及找矿预测提供新依据。

works.title: Insights into Mountain Pass carbonatite formation from in-situ sulfur isotopes and geochemistry of sulfate and sulfide minerals
works.abstract: The Mountain Pass carbonatite stock hosts a world-class rare earth element deposit and may be classified as a carbonate-sulfate igneous rock, as it contains on average > 50 volume percent carbonate minerals and 20 to 30 volume percent sulfate minerals. The sulfates range in composition from barite to celestine and locally occur with sparse sulfide minerals. We investigate the origin of sulfur enrichment and the occurrence of sulfur-bearing minerals in the Mountain Pass carbonatite with in-situ sulfur isotope and mineral chemistry. Barite cores with δ34S of 1 to 3‰ do not coexist with sulfides, whereas celestine rims with δ34S of > 3‰ are associated with sulfides with δ34S < -10‰. We propose a model in which sulfur-bearing sediments were subducted during episodes of plate convergence in the Mojave Province that preceded Mountain Pass magmatism. Metasomatism of the overlying mantle by melts derived from the subducted sediments generated an unusually carbon- and sulfur-rich source to yield carbonatite magmas. Sulfur from primary carbonatite magmas and ~ 1 to 7% sulfur from subducted sediment melts yielded a slightly enriched δ34S composition (relative to depleted mantle δ34S of -1‰) for early crystallizing barite. Celestine rims on magmatic barite cores formed at low, hydrothermal temperatures (< 350 °C) based on S isotope thermometry for equilibrium celestine-galena and celestine-pyrite pairs. The sparse sulfides in the carbonatite stock are not in equilibrium with the primary barite cores and therefore do not permit S isotope thermometry estimates of magmatic temperatures. The S/Se ratios of sulfide minerals (> 3,400) typically exceed primitive mantle values (S/Se of 3,340), also consistent with their derivation from hydrothermal fluids. Trace occurrences of sulfide and sulfate minerals in alkaline silicate stocks related to the carbonatite stock have similar δ34S compositions and yield similarly low formation temperatures, suggesting regionally extensive and chemically similar sulfur-bearing hydrothermal fluids that imparted lithologically diverse rocks with a consistent sulfur isotope fingerprint.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 基于原位硫同位素及硫酸盐和硫化物矿物地球化学的 Mountain Pass 碳酸岩形成机制认识

summary_bullets.research_question: 阐明Mountain Pass碳酸岩中硫富集及硫酸盐、硫化物的成因。
summary_bullets.methodology: 原位硫同位素、矿物化学分析，并结合S同位素测温与S/Se比值判别。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 早期重晶石源于岩浆，后期天青石边与硫化物由低温热液形成，硫部分来自俯冲沉积物。
summary_bullets.innovation: 区分岩浆与热液两阶段硫来源，并提出俯冲沉积物交代地幔的成矿模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为碳酸岩型稀土矿的硫循环、成矿过程及区域热液作用研究提供关键约束。

works.title: Rapid Slab Rollback Drives Early Cretaceous Back‐Arc Extension in NE China: Implication for Crustal Growth and Episodic Porphyry Mineralization
works.abstract: Abstract The subduction of the Paleo‐Pacific Plate beneath the NE Asian continental margin induced extensive magmatism, providing an excellent opportunity to investigate the interplay between plate dynamics, arc magmatism, continental crust formation, and porphyry mineralization. Here, we integrate mineralogical, geochronological, geochemical, and isotopic analyses of diverse Early Cretaceous magmatic assemblages in the Yanbian Fold Belt (NE China), aiming to reconstruct the evolution of a transcrustal magmatic plumbing system and constrain the key factors controlling porphyry mineralization during slab rollback. Dioritic enclaves (∼123 Ma) represent rapidly ascending mantle‐derived magmas that underwent magma mixing/mingling and quenching before solidification. Granitic intrusions (∼118 Ma) with low Sr/Y were attributed to a depleted crustal source with plagioclase and biotite fractionation. Mafic dikes (∼116 Ma) from a bimodal suite originated from a slab‐fluid‐metasomatized lithospheric mantle with increased input from the depleted mantle, whereas felsic dikes (∼115 Ma) with high Sr/Y resulted from melting of a juvenile lower crust under garnet amphibolite facies conditions. These rock assemblages record back‐arc crustal growth, reworking, and maturation. Compared with earlier (peaking at ∼130 Ma) back‐arc magmatism farther west in the Great Xing'an Range, our newly identified bimodal magmatism (initiated at ∼118 Ma) in the Yanbian area reveals a rapid rollback of ∼600 km within ∼12 Myr. Moreover, the late Early Cretaceous magmas exhibit significantly higher magmatic oxygen fugacity (ΔFMQ > +1, where FMQ is the fayalite‐magnetite‐quartz oxygen fugacity buffer) than their Jurassic counterparts (with ΔFMQ values generally below +0.5), paralleling regional porphyry‐related mineralization and revealing the critical role of slab rollback in modulating arc magmatic fertility. Our findings highlight how transient rollback episodes can generate diverse magmatic differentiation pathways and metallogenic triggers in supra‐subduction zone settings.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 快速板片回撤驱动中国东北早白垩世弧后伸展：对地壳生长与斑岩型矿化幕式发生的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 探究古太平洋板块回撤如何驱动延边早白垩世弧后伸展、地壳演化与斑岩成矿。
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合矿物学、年代学、地球化学与同位素分析重建跨地壳岩浆系统演化。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 约118—115Ma双峰岩浆作用指示板片12Myr内快速回撤约600公里并提升岩浆氧逸度。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次将延边多类岩浆组合、快速板片回撤及阶段性斑岩成矿机制系统关联。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解俯冲带地壳增生、岩浆演化与成矿预测提供关键动力学约束。

works.title: Establishment of subduction at early Earth continent margins by migration: Implications for interpreting geochemical observations
works.abstract: Shifts in εHf values recorded in Hadean and Archean zircons and rare earth element (REE) patterns observed in the Acasta Gneiss Complex have been interpreted as reflecting felsic crust generation without subduction from ∼ 4.0 Ga, followed by the onset of subduction at 3.8-3.6 Ga. Subduction initiation may have been dynamically triggered by early continents at their margins, but the geodynamics of this process are unclear. Here, we use numerical mantle convection models to investigate the mechanisms and timescales for the development of subduction at continental margins on the early Earth. We identify two distinct subduction styles: “migrating intra-oceanic (transient) subduction” and “continent-anchored (persistent) subduction.”. We find continents do not dynamically trigger subduction at their margins. Instead, persistent subduction only develops after initial transient subduction zones collide with continental margins. Geochemical observations from the early Earth may instead reflect migration of existing subduction zones to continent margins. To test this hypothesis, we constrain the timescale over which persistent subduction develops in our models finding it ranges from 181–662 Myrs for Archean conditions, consistent with geological evidence from Hadean and Archean zircons. Our results suggest that the observed isotopic and geochemical shifts may be explained by the migration and stabilization of existing subduction zones at continental margins, rather than the initiation of subduction itself. This reframing highlights the central role of mantle dynamics in early Earth tectonics and calls for a reinterpretation of key geologic records previously attributed to the first onset of plate tectonics.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 迁移作用在早期地球大陆边缘俯冲建立中的作用：对地球化学观测解释的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨早期大陆边缘俯冲如何形成及地球化学信号应如何解释。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用早期地球幔对流数值模型模拟大陆边缘俯冲演化与时间尺度。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 大陆不会直接触发边缘俯冲，持久俯冲源于洋内俯冲迁移并撞上大陆。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出地球化学突变反映俯冲带迁移与稳定化，而非俯冲初始开启。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为重释冥古宙至太古宙锆石与Acasta地球化学记录提供新框架。

works.title: Extensive fractional crystallization in strongly peraluminous granitoids recorded by zircon Zr isotopes
works.abstract: Strongly peraluminous granitoids, classically considered “S-type” melts derived from metasedimentary sources, often exhibit large compositional variations, particularly in their alumina saturation and maficity. Such variations are generally attributed to (1) selective entrainment and/or unmixing of restitic and/or peritectic minerals in anatectic melts or (2) fractional crystallization (FC) of a parental magma. Distinguishing between these two models solely based on chemical compositions is challenging. Here, we use zircon Zr stable isotopes ( δ 94/90 Zr relative to NIST RM 8299) to investigate the petrogenesis of the archetypal Kinsman granitoids and associated ultramafic–mafic cumulates from the New England Appalachians, USA. Autocrystic zircon from the Kinsman granitoids records a ∼ 0.3‰ increase in δ 94/90 Zr NIST values (from –0.23 to +0.12‰) that correlates with increasing whole-rock SiO 2 (58–76 wt%). This systematic isotopic evolution, which is decoupled from zircon ε Hf (t), negatively correlates with magma temperature (688–812°C). These characteristics argue against open-system processes such as restite entrainment or continuous crustal assimilation during magma ascent in the crust. Instead, they suggest a nearly closed-system evolution dominated by FC. The lower δ 94/90 Zr NIST values (–0.45 to –0.04‰) of zircon from associated olivine-pyroxene hornblendites and orthopyroxenites are consistent with their origin as earlier cumulates genetically linked to the Kinsman granitoids. Our results demonstrate that while sediment assimilation in the lower crust could be responsible for the peraluminous signature, FC is the dominant driver of compositional diversity in these systems.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 锆石 Zr 同位素记录的强过铝质花岗质岩石中广泛分离结晶作用

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在判别强过铝花岗岩成分差异源于源区残留混入还是分离结晶。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过测定锆石Zr稳定同位素，并结合全岩成分、温度与εHf(t)分析成因。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 锆石δ94/90Zr随SiO2升高而增大且随温度降低，表明体系主要受近封闭分离结晶控制。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次用锆石Zr稳定同位素有效区分强过铝花岗岩的分离结晶与开放体系过程。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为识别过铝质花岗岩演化机制提供新示踪工具，提升岩浆成因解释能力。

works.title: The Central Segment of the Famatinian Arc: Insights into the Construction of Ancient Arc Crust
works.abstract: The Famatinian arc provides an extensive cross section through an ancient magmatic arc, elucidating the evolution of subduction-related magmatism and the generation of the continental crust. Although the mantle-crust transition is not exposed, integrated field observations and laboratory analyses allow the reconstruction of a spatiotemporal model for the arc's thermal structure and magmatic evolution. The resulting cross section demonstrates that depth-dependent petrological processes govern igneous differentiation. At greater depths, crystallization-driven fractionation and melt-mush interactions produce variations within mafic-ultramafic complexes. From the middle crust to volcanic levels, crystal fractionation, partial melting, and the reactive assimilation of prearc host crust drive the evolution toward intermediate and silicic compositions. Comparative analysis with other ancient arcs indicates that subduction-related plutonic-volcanic columns are density filtered and organized as vertically interconnected systems. Within these trans-lithospheric magmatic columns, the influx of mantle-derived melts, multi-level crystal-melt-fluid fractionation, and assimilation of preexisting crust occur simultaneously in space and time from source to surface. ▪ The Famatinian represents a 30-km-thick segment of Ordovician arc crust that has undergone differential uplift along several hundred kilometers of its paleo-axis. ▪ Mantle melt input, polybaric igneous fractionation, and intracrustal melting controlled lithological and chemical diversification across the magmatic column. ▪ Extensive igneous columns transition from melt-dominated magmatic systems in the middle crust to crystal-rich mushy reservoirs in the upper crust. ▪ Comparable lithological architectures in ancient arc sections allow assessment of how the building blocks of continental crust develop over convergent plate margins.
works.venue: Annual Review of Earth and Planetary Sciences
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 法马廷尼安弧中段：古老岛弧地壳构造的认识

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探讨法马廷弧如何记录古老俯冲岩浆弧地壳的形成与演化。
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合野外地质观察、岩石学地球化学分析及古弧对比重建时空模型。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 不同深度的分异、熔融与同化共同控制弧地壳的岩性与化学多样化。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出跨岩石圈垂向连通的岩浆柱模型解释古弧地壳建造机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解汇聚板块边缘大陆地壳生长及古弧结构提供关键参照。

works.title: Pre-subduction of the Caroline Plateau intensifies lithospheric hydration in the southern Mariana Trench
works.abstract: The subduction of oceanic plateaus significantly reshapes subduction systems, yet its impact on lithospheric hydration prior to subduction is not well understood. Here we investigate these processes as the Caroline Plateau approaches the southern Mariana Trench, using velocity models derived from wide-angle seismic lines. Our results from OBS2017-1 reveal that the crust of the subducting plate thickens from ~7.5 km beneath the trench axis to ~16.0 km at the outer rise, accompanied by reduced seismic velocities in the region between the toe of the plateau and the trench axis. These velocity reductions even exceed those observed beneath adjacent oceanic crust near Challenger Deep, indicating intensified hydration at the leading edge of the plateau, accompanied by a narrowing of the bending-related faulting zone. The simultaneous subduction of plateau and normal oceanic crust governs plate configuration, highlighting the role of oceanic plateaus in enhancing heterogeneous water percolation and modulating subduction dynamics. Seismic refraction profiling indicates that subduction initiation of the Caroline Plateau into the Mariana Trench has involved intense faulting and mantle serpentinization at the leading edge of the subducting oceanic plateau
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 加罗林海台的俯冲前作用加剧了马里亚纳海沟南段岩石圈水化

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究卡罗琳海台俯冲前如何影响南马里亚纳海沟岩石圈水化。
summary_bullets.methodology: 基于广角地震剖面与OBS2017-1数据反演速度结构并分析地壳厚度变化。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 海台前缘地壳显著增厚、低速异常增强，表明断裂与蛇纹石化导致水化加剧。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次揭示海洋高原俯冲前缘可强化非均一渗水并改变弯曲断裂带宽度。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 有助于理解含水输入、板块构型演化及俯冲动力学对海洋高原的响应。

works.title: Phanerozoic seawater Mg/Ca variations driven by supercontinent cycles
works.abstract: Seawater Mg/Ca has oscillated markedly over the Phanerozoic, closely associated with secular variations in sedimentation, icehouse-greenhouse fluctuations, and the evolution of calcifying invertebrates. However, the drivers of these long-term oscillations remain unresolved. Here, we develop an inverse model that couples seawater Mg concentration and Mg isotope composition variations. By exploiting the contrasting Mg isotopic fractionation associated with Mg-silicate formation and dolomitization, this model quantifies the major marine Mg sinks. Model results show that increases in seawater Mg/Ca during supercontinent assembly were explained by reduced rates of silicate alteration and dolomitization. In contrast, decreases in seawater Mg/Ca during periods of supercontinent stasis and early breakup were driven by intensified Mg-silicate formation and dolomitization. Variations in marine Mg-silicate and dolomite formation were further regulated by seafloor spreading, continental configuration, and climate throughout the supercontinent cycle. Together, our results identify the supercontinent cycle as a first-order regulator of Phanerozoic seawater Mg/Ca through its control on marine Mg-silicate and dolomite fluxes. An element-isotope coupled inverse model quantifies marine Mg removal rates via silicate and dolomite formation, linking Phanerozoic seawater Mg/Ca oscillations to supercontinent-driven tectonic and climatic changes.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 显生宙海水 Mg/Ca 变化受超大陆旋回驱动

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探究显生宙海水Mg/Ca长期振荡的主控机制是什么。
summary_bullets.methodology: 构建耦合海水镁浓度与镁同位素的逆模型，定量约束海洋镁汇。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 超大陆聚合期Mg/Ca升高，稳定与早裂解期则因镁硅酸盐和白云岩形成增强而降低。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次结合元素与同位素逆模型区分并量化两类主要海洋镁去除通量。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究将海水化学演化与构造气候循环联系起来，为古海洋与地球化学研究提供框架。

works.title: Partial melting of basaltic crust in the generation of Early Archean intrusive rocks: Insights from the near-zero Δ199Hg signature in Archean granitoids
works.abstract: Earth is unique in the solar system for hosting continental crust, whereas the mechanisms for the formation and evolution of continental crust remain controversial. Mercury (Hg) isotopes undergo mass-independent fractionation via photochemical reactions at Earth’s surface, producing nonzero Δ199Hg values in the surface systems. Here, we conduct Hg analyses on Early Archean (3.6−3.0 Ga) granitic gneisses from the Anshan Complex. These rocks display overall near-zero Δ199Hg values (−0.13‰ to +0.08‰), overlapping estimates for the primitive mantle (−0.10‰ to +0.10‰), but contrasting with estimates for Phanerozoic arc-related granites (−0.3‰ to +0.2‰). This disparity in Δ199Hg supports two different genesis models for the continental crust. The nonzero Δ199Hg values of Phanerozoic granites suggest that the Phanerozoic continental crust was formed through mantle-crustal interactions driven by subduction of surface materials. The pervasive near-zero Δ199Hg signal in the Anshan granitoids over 600 m.y. is more consistent with a internally regulated vertical crustal evolution process than with a global subduction system that incorporate surface materials with variable Δ199Hg values.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 玄武质地壳部分熔融在早太古代侵入岩形成中的作用：来自太古代花岗质岩石近零 Δ199Hg 特征的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨早太古代大陆侵入岩是否由玄武质地壳部分熔融形成。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定鞍山杂岩3.6—3.0Ga花岗质片麻岩的汞同位素Δ199Hg。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 样品Δ199Hg近零且接近原始地幔，指示早期地壳以内生垂向演化为主。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次用汞非质量分馏示踪早太古代花岗岩成因与大陆地壳形成机制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为区分早期垂向地壳演化与俯冲驱动模式提供新的地球化学证据。

works.title: Lunar mantle differentiation and Earth–Moon similarity constrained by Ni stable isotopes
works.abstract: Although the Moon is thought to have formed through a giant impact between proto-Earth and a Mars-sized body, the processes responsible for the chemical and mass-dependent isotopic differences between Earth and Moon remain debated. We report high-precision mass-dependent Ni isotope data for 19 Apollo samples, including one dunite (72415), fifteen low-Ti basalts, and three high-Ti basalts, analyzed by double-spike technique using a multi-collector plasma-sourced mass spectrometer. The dunite 72415 shows an extremely high δ 60/58 Ni value of +1.80 ± 0.01‰, which we attribute to kinetic isotope fractionation from Ni diffusion during re-equilibration between olivine and a later melt. Diffusion modeling of Ni–Fe–Mg systematics reproduces the observed heavy Ni enrichment. In contrast, low-Ti basalts display a mean δ 60/58 Ni of 0.23 ± 0.20‰ (2SD), unaffected by cosmic-ray exposure, while high-Ti basalts are slightly isotopically lighter (0.06 ± 0.22‰, 2SD). Petrological modeling using pMELTS with recently constrained silicate mineral-melt fractionation factors suggests limited Ni isotope fractionation ( 60/58 Ni = 0.18 ± 0.20‰ (2SD). This overlaps with the bulk silicate Earth (BSE: 0.11 ± 0.07‰), indicating that Ni depletion in the lunar mantle, by a factor of ∼4 relative to Earth, can be caused by core formation (that does not fractionate Ni isotopes). However, our modelling shows evaporative loss of Ni can elevate δ 60/58 Ni value of < 0.23‰, which remains consistent with those of BSM within uncertainty. Hence, the mechanism of Ni evaporation cannot be ruled out.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: Ni 稳定同位素对月幔分异及地月相似性的约束

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究月幔分异及地月Ni同位素相似性的成因机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定19个月球样品Ni稳定同位素，并结合扩散、pMELTS岩石学建模。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 月球低Ti玄武岩Ni同位素与地幔地球重叠，月幔Ni亏损可由核形成解释。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次高精度系统测定阿波罗样品Ni同位素并量化扩散与蒸发效应。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为约束月球形成、月幔演化及地月化学差异提供新的同位素证据。

works.title: Modelling reveals redox budget transfer in Mariana-type subduction systems
works.abstract: Subduction transfers redox budgets from the surface into the mantle. Quantitative modelling of a Mariana-type subduction system shows that mantle oxidation is dominated by sulfur-rich fluids and Fe3+-rich melts at sub-arc and back-arc depths, respectively. Most of the redox budget is ultimately transported into the deep mantle with the subducting slab.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 建模揭示马里亚纳型俯冲系统中的氧化还原收支转移

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究俯冲带如何将地表氧化还原预算转移至地幔。
summary_bullets.methodology: 构建并定量模拟马里亚纳型俯冲系统的氧化还原收支。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 弧下以富硫流体致氧化，弧后以富Fe3+熔体主导，且多数预算随板片入深地幔。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次定量区分不同深度氧化介质对地幔氧化的相对贡献。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解地幔氧化状态、挥发分循环与弧岩浆成因提供关键约束。

works.title: Paleomagnetic detection of relative plate motions and an infrequently reversing core dynamo at 3.5 Ga
works.abstract: Whether early Earth had a mobile lithosphere and plate tectonics is debated. We present paleomagnetic data quantifying differential motion between lithospheric blocks at ~3.48 billion years ago (Ga). This manifested as 47 − 35 + 69 centimeters per year latitudinal motion of the East Pilbara Craton (Western Australia) across high latitudes, whereas the Barberton Greenstone Belt (South Africa) was stationary at low latitudes. Comparison of this plate motion with candidate analogs suggests either rapid collisional plate tectonics (i.e., an “active-lid”) or an episodically mobile lithosphere. We also document the oldest known geomagnetic reversal at ~3.46 Ga, consistent with an axial dipolar dynamo that reversed less frequently than today’s. The existence and rates of these surface and core geophysical phenomena provide geodynamic context to Earth’s early geophysical and biological evolution.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 古地磁揭示35亿年前的板块相对运动及低频反转的地核发电机

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨35亿年前地球是否存在板块运动及早期地核磁场翻转特征。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用古地磁数据重建东皮尔巴拉与巴伯顿地块的古纬度变化与磁场记录。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 约34.8亿年前两地块存在差异运动，且约34.6亿年前已出现最古老地磁翻转。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次定量识别35亿年前相对板块运动，并约束早期地核发电机翻转频率。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为早期板块构造、地核演化及地球宜居环境和生命起源研究提供关键约束。

works.title: Geochemistry, geochronology, and tectonic implications of the Chengde Metamorphic Complex, Northern Hebei, China
works.abstract: The formation and evolution of the Precambrian metamorphic basement of the North China Craton (NCC) remain highly controversial. This study focuses on the Hongqiyingzi and Dantazi Complexes in the Chengde area, northern Hebei terrane. It selects garnet-bearing clinopyroxene amphibolites and garnet-bearing two-mica plagiogneisses for systematic petrographic, whole-rock geochemical, and zircon U–Pb geochronological analyses, with the aim of constraining their protolith nature, tectonic setting, and metamorphic evolution. The results indicate that the protoliths of the garnet-bearing clinopyroxene amphibolites are calc-alkaline basaltic rocks formed in a volcanic arc environment, while those of the garnet-bearing two-mica plagiogneisses are claystones or sandstones originating in a continental island arc setting. Together, these rocks suggest that the northern Hebei region was situated in a subduction-related island arc tectonic regime during the late Neoarchean to early Paleoproterozoic. Zircon U–Pb dating reveals two stages of late Paleoproterozoic metamorphism at 1933–1931 Ma and 1885–1860 Ma. These ages correspond to the timing of Paleoproterozoic collisional orogenesis in the NCC. Previous studies have documented clockwise, near-isothermal decompression P–T paths, supporting the involvement of the northern Hebei terrane in the Paleoproterozoic subduction–collision–exhumation orogenic process. However, it remains unclear whether the island-arc setting recorded in the basement protoliths and the subsequent metamorphism belong to the same tectonic cycle or to distinct ones. Their genetic relationship needs to be further elucidated through future research.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中国冀北承德变质杂岩的地球化学、年代学及其构造意义

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨承德变质杂岩原岩性质、构造环境及其变质演化过程。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合岩相学、全岩地球化学与锆石U-Pb定年开展系统分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 原岩形成于俯冲岛弧环境，并记录1933–1931Ma与1885–1860Ma两期变质。
summary_bullets.innovation: 将原岩恢复、构造背景判别与变质定年结合重建区域早期演化。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为华北克拉通前寒武纪基底形成及古元古代造山机制提供关键约束。

works.title: Texture, trace element geochemistry, and sulfur isotopes of pyrite fingerprint the Cu Zn (Au) metallogeny of the Meiling deposit in the Kalatag district, NW China
works.abstract: This paper presents combined texture, trace elements, and sulfur isotopes of five paragenetic pyrites (Py1 to Py5) to fingerprint the hydrothermal evolution (Stage I to Stage V) of the Meiling deposit, NW China. Py1 grains with distinct core-rim zonation textures and low Co/Ni ratios are interpreted as pre-ore syn -sedimentary origin and then modified by late hydrothermal process. High contents of Ni, Co, As, Ti, Te, and V in Py2 indicate relatively moderate-high temperature and reducing conditions in hydrofracturing during decreasing fluid pressure. Fluid composition, temperature, and fluid-rock reactions are the main factors controlling the incorporation of trace elements in Py3 and Py4, and the ore-forming fluids were enriched by Cu and Zn in Stage III and Stage IV, respectively. Specifically, later fine-grained Py3-F and Py4-F are more enriched in Cu, Zn, and Au, which is interpreted as both boiling and cooling processes caused by decrease of pressure and temperature in a fluid saturated with respect to metal elements. An oxidizing state in open spaces and mixture of fluids facilitated the precipitation of Py5 in the late stage V. We propose that pyrite grains characterized by high Cu and Zn contents and negative δ 34 S values can discriminate economic Cu-rich and Zn-rich veins from barren veins to ascertain potential metal endowment in epithermal deposits.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 黄铁矿的结构构造、微量元素地球化学和硫同位素示踪中国西北卡拉塔格地区梅岭矿床Cu-Zn（Au）成矿作用

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在厘清梅岭矿床铜锌（金）成矿演化及黄铁矿示踪意义。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合五期黄铁矿的显微构造、微量元素地球化学与硫同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 不同期黄铁矿记录了流体温压、氧化还原与混合作用，并指示铜锌富集阶段。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出以高Cu、Zn和负δ34S黄铁矿识别富矿脉与贫矿脉的新判据。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为浅成热液矿床找矿评价和成矿过程重建提供了有效指标。

works.title: Structural controls of gold-bearing lodes at the Awanda orogenic gold deposit, Tianshan, NW China
works.abstract: The Awanda gold deposit (11.6 t Au at average grade of 1.3 g/t) in Xinjiang, NW China, is one of the most important gold discoveries in the Chinese Tianshan over the past 20 years. Gold-bearing lodes of the deposit are confined within the 25-km-long Kalaguole E–W-striking shear zone. Despite its significant control on gold mineralization at Awanda, the structural context and localization of gold-bearing lodes in the shear zone remain poorly understood. In order to elucidate these issues, we herein present systematic structural mapping and electron backscatter diffraction (EBSD) analysis from the Awanda ore-hosting shear zone. Available data indicate two stages of deformation, including pre-mineral D1-stage north-over-south thrusting kinematics that are characterized by pervasive E–W-striking and N-dipping reverse faults, monoclinal beddings and foliations, and syn-mineral D2-stage locally right-lateral strike-slip deformation that formed the ore-hosting shear zone parallel to the preexisting E–W-striking faults. Deformational mechanism within the shear zone varies from high-temperature (500–650 ℃) grain boundary migration recrystallization in the north to moderate-temperature (400–500 ℃) dislocation creep in the middle, and to low-temperature (300–400 ℃) dislocation glide and climb in the south. The orientation and localization of the Awanda gold-bearing lodes are predominantly subjected to creep dislocation-related moderate-temperature plastic deformation. The right-lateral strike-slip ductile shearing establishes multi-scale pivotal controls on gold mineralization, through extracting ore metals, facilitating fluid flow, and localizing gold-bearing lodes.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中国西北天山 Awanda 造山型金矿床含金矿脉的构造控制

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究Awanda金矿剪切带中含金矿脉的构造背景与定位机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用系统构造填图与EBSD分析，识别变形阶段及变形机制。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 识别D1逆冲与D2右行走滑，两者共同控制中温塑性区矿脉富集。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示剪切带内温度分带变形机制及其对金成矿的多尺度控制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为造山型金矿中构造控矿、流体运移与找矿预测提供依据。

works.title: Ophiolites in Pakistan: Key evidence for the geodynamic evolution of the Neo-Tethys Ocean
works.abstract: In Pakistan, two major Late Mesozoic Neo-Tethyan suture zones, the Western Suture Zone (WSZ) and Indus Suture Zone (ISZ), delineate the remnants of the Neo-Tethyan Ocean. These suture zones and associated ophiolites document the rift-drift history, northward migration of the Indian Plate, and geodynamic evolution of the India-Eurasia collision. This review aims to refine the geodynamic model of Pakistani ophiolites and contribute to the reconstruction of Neo-Tethyan tectonic evolution and the Alpine-Himalayan orogenic system. The WSZ ophiolites, located along the west-northwest boundary of the Indian Plate, contains well-preserved Penrose-style sequences, such as those near Bela, Muslim Bagh, and Waziristan. These ophiolites are interpreted to be formed first at ridge-like spreading centers and later in supra-subduction zones (SSZ) during the northwestward subduction of the Neo-Tethys oceanic slab beneath the southern margin of the Eurasian Plate during subduction initiation Cretaceous. The ISZ comprises highly fragmented ophiolitic mélanges, including the Dargai and Shangla-Mingora complexes, which reflect complex intra-oceanic subduction, accretion, and collision processes along the Kohistan Island Arc. These sutures record the tectonic evolution of the Neo-Tethyan Ocean, with the complied petrological, geochemical, and geochronological data indicating a transition initially from mid-ocean ridge basalt (MORB) to island-arc tholeiite (IAT). The geochemical diversity in their mantle sections, ranging from MORB to IAT and boninitic signatures, reflects varied magmatic processes during subduction initiation. The emplacement of these ophiolites, influenced by oblique convergence and transpression in the WSZ and by collision-driven accretion in the ISZ, illustrates the complex tectonics associated with closure of the Neo-Tethyan Ocean.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 巴基斯坦蛇绿岩：新特提斯洋地球动力学演化的关键证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探讨巴基斯坦蛇绿岩如何揭示新特提斯洋演化与印欧碰撞过程。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过综述WSZ与ISZ的岩石学、地球化学及年代学资料重建构造演化。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 巴基斯坦蛇绿岩记录了从MORB到IAT及玻安岩的俯冲起始与洋盆闭合过程。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本文整合两条缝合带证据，细化了巴基斯坦蛇绿岩的区域地球动力学模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为重建新特提斯构造史及阿尔卑斯—喜马拉雅造山系统提供关键约束。

works.title: Tropical mafic rock weathering, riverine lithium isotopes, and the evolution of Cenozoic seawater chemistry
works.abstract: The terrestrial dissolved riverine lithium isotope (δ 7 Li diss ) flux can provide valuable information on silicate weathering processes, which are directly tied to the long-term carbon cycle, at various spatiotemporal scales. However, a limited understanding of how bedrock lithological composition impacts δ 7 Li diss values hinders the utility of the Li proxy for deep-time weathering reconstructions. Accordingly, we investigated tropical rivers in the Philippines and Mariana Islands that drain either distinctly ultramafic-to-mafic or silicic bedrock. We find that mafic lithologies produce markedly heavier δ 7 Li diss than those draining silicic lithologies, potentially due to preferential formation of Mg-rich clays during incongruent weathering. Furthermore, we observe that known tectonically driven changes in Earth’s global ophiolitic-collisional suture length correlate with the marine δ 7 Li record over the past ∼60 million years. This observation, supported by mass-balance modelling, indicates that variations in mafic bedrock weathering could have been an important influence on Cenozoic seawater chemistry.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 热带镁铁质岩石风化、河流锂同位素与新生代海水化学演化

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探讨基岩岩性如何影响河流溶解态锂同位素及新生代海水化学演化。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采样菲律宾和马里亚纳热带河流，对比镁铁质与硅质流域锂同位素并结合质量平衡建模。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 镁铁质岩流域产生更高δ7Li，且蛇绿岩缝合带长度变化与海洋δ7Li记录相关。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统连接热带镁铁质风化、河流锂同位素与约六千万年海水化学变化。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究提升锂同位素作为深时硅酸盐风化与长期碳循环代用指标的可靠性。

works.title: Carbon, nitrogen, and sulfur cycling unveil deep-sea microbial niches in the Atacama Trench
works.abstract: Deep-sea sediments host microbial communities essential to nitrogen, sulfur, and carbon cycling, yet those in the Southern Hemisphere remain understudied. In this work, we analyze sediments from an oceanic trench off northern Chile using metatranscriptomics, aiming to relate community composition with functional activity. Most assayed sites form part of a broadly uniform deep-sea ecosystem fueled by the degradation of marine snow through diverse aerobic and anaerobic pathways. Nitrogen cycling within them is driven by archaeal nitrification and bacterial dissimilatory nitrate reduction. One site, however, appears to be a sulfur-based cold seep inhabited by mats of thiotrophs and vesicomyid clams within darker sediments. In this site, ANME archaea are largely absent despite the presence of dolomite crystals, which are typically associated with anaerobic methane oxidation. Instead, abundant subsurface pyrite and active sulfate reduction point to substantial sulfur cycling. Across the region, heterotrophic communities dependent on marine snow transition to chemosynthetic ones supported by reduced sulfur in a sulfur-driven cold seep with minimal fluid flow. Deep sea sediment microbes recycle key elements such as nitrogen, carbon, and sulphur. Gene activity from Chilean sediments shows communities are fuelled by sinking organic matter and by a sulphur rich cold seep.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 碳、氮和硫循环揭示了阿塔卡马海沟深海微生物生态位

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究阿塔卡马海沟深海沉积物微生物生态位及碳氮硫循环机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用沉积物宏转录组分析，关联群落组成与元素循环功能活性。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 多数站点依赖海雪降解驱动代谢，一处为低流量富硫冷泉系统。
summary_bullets.innovation: 揭示南半球深海从异养海雪系统向硫驱化能合成系统的生态过渡。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解深海生物地球化学循环、冷泉生态及极端微生物适应提供依据。

works.title: Microbial growth rates captured using Raman-SIP reveal a highly active subsurface biosphere fueled by serpentinization
works.abstract: Microbial productivity, metabolite fluxes, nutrient cycling and biosignatures are directly linked to microbial growth rates, which remain largely unknown in subsurface environments. Here, we apply Raman-stable isotope probing with deuterated water (Raman-2H-SIP) to measure single-cell microbial growth rates in three geochemically distinct fluids obtained at 250-270 m depth in serpentinite rocks in Oman. We observe wide distributions in growth that vary with fluid geochemistry, with inferred cell-specific microbial generation times ranging from days to years. The majority of measured generation times are faster than those previously reported in subsurface rock-hosted ecosystems, showing extensive microbial growth can be supported by actively serpentinizing systems. Amendment with bicarbonate stimulates some of the fastest growth and methane production rates, highlighting microbial preference to utilizing dissolved inorganic carbon, even in [hyper]alkaline groundwaters. Overall, our cell-specific rates of growth and methanogenesis provide quantitative insights into the habitability of continental serpentinizing ecosystems and their reservoir-scale biogeochemical dynamics. Single-cell Raman-2H-SIP shows microbes in serpentinizing aquifers grow faster than expected, with activity influenced by fluid geochemistry. Methanogens and sulfate reducers dominate, indicating strong H₂ consumption potential.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 利用 Raman-SIP 捕获的微生物生长速率揭示了由蛇纹石化作用驱动的高活性地下生物圈

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究蛇纹岩化地下环境中微生物生长速率及其地球化学驱动因素。
summary_bullets.methodology: 用Raman-2H-SIP测定阿曼地下250–270米流体中单细胞生长速率。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 该环境微生物世代时间为数天至数年，且碳酸氢盐可促进快速生长与产甲烷。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在蛇纹岩化含水层以单细胞尺度定量揭示微生物生长与产甲烷速率。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为评估深部生物圈宜居性、碳循环及生物标志物形成提供关键定量依据。

works.title: Electrical conductivity of MgCO3 under thermodynamic conditions of Earth’s interior: a first-principles investigation
works.abstract: Abstract The electrical conductivity of magnesite (MgCO3), magnesium carbonate, was investigated under the thermodynamic conditions of the Earth’s interior, within the framework of density functional theory (DFT) and Boltzmann transport theory. The results show that the conductivity of MgCO3 decreases under pressure and increases under the effect of temperature (depth of the lower mantle). Pressure plays a central role in controlling the conductivity of this mineral by modifying its electronic properties, such as the band structure and electronic density of states. Furthermore, the structural phase transition from the low-pressure magnesite-I (M-I) to the high-pressure magnesite-II (M-II) phase leads to a pronounced reduction in the electrical conductivity of MgCO3. The conductivity of the M-I phase is consistently greater than that of the M-II, and this trend persists by modifications in the respective electronic properties as a result of pressure changes. These findings suggest that magnesite (MgCO3) may have a minor contribution to the observed increase in electrical conductivity with depth in the lower mantle. Therefore, the electrical conductivity profile of the lower mantle is likely controlled by other minerals.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 地球内部热力学条件下 MgCO3 的电导率：一项基于第一性原理的研究

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究MgCO3在地幔温压条件下的电导率变化及其地球物理意义。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合DFT与玻尔兹曼输运理论，模拟不同压力、温度与相态下电导率。
summary_bullets.key_findings: MgCO3电导率随压力降低、随温度升高，且M-II相显著低于M-I相。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次从头算系统揭示MgCO3两相电子结构与电导率的深部演化关系。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 说明下地幔电导增大并非主要由菱镁矿主导，有助约束深部物质组成。

works.title: Theoretical evaluation of kinetic triple oxygen isotope fractionation during phosphoric acid digestion of carbonates
works.abstract: Triple-oxygen isotope compositions (Δ ’17 O) in carbonates serve as valuable proxies for reconstructing past environments, with applications ranging from humidity to hydrological cycles and diagenetic history. High-precision Δ ’17 O measurements are essential to validate these applications, with the measurement of Δ ’17 O on CO 2 extracted through phosphoric acid digestion of carbonates being a common practice. However, since this process does not achieve 100% oxygen extraction, kinetic isotope fractionation factors, i.e. 1000ln 18 α CO2/carb and θ CO2/carb ( ln 17 α CO2/carb /ln 18 α CO2/carb ), are critical for accurately translating the measured Δ ’17 O to that of the associated carbonate samples. Notably, a significant discrepancy exists between theoretically predicted θ CO2/carb values (e.g. 0.525–0.529) and experimental observations (e.g. 0.5170–0.5230), even though the 1000ln 18 α CO2/carb values align between the two approaches. We propose that this discrepancy stems from an incomplete treatment of solvation effects in previous theoretical studies. To test this hypothesis, we conducted quantum mechanical calculations that explicitly incorporate phosphoric acid molecules as solvent species.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 碳酸盐磷酸消解过程中动力学三氧同位素分馏的理论评估

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究碳酸盐磷酸消解中三氧同位素动力学分馏参数偏差成因。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用显式加入磷酸分子的量子力学计算评估分馏因子。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 理论与实验θ值差异主要源于以往理论对溶剂化效应处理不足。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次将磷酸分子显式作为溶剂纳入该过程的理论分馏计算。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 有助于更准确换算碳酸盐Δ’17O并提升古环境重建可靠性。

works.title: Geochemical characteristics of lithium in geothermal waters and its impact on riverine Li in the southeastern Tibetan Plateau
works.abstract: Variations in seawater lithium isotopes (δ 7 Li) are commonly linked to changes in continental silicate weathering fluxes. However, the influence of geothermal fluid input on riverine lithium, particularly in tectonically active regions, remains poorly constrained. Here, samples from hot springs along the Lancang River (LCR) in the southeastern Tibetan Plateau (TP) were collected for analysis of hydrochemistry, Li isotope composition (δ 7 Li) and water-rock interactions to study the geochemical characteristics of Li in geothermal waters and corresponding impact on riverine Li. Geothermal waters exhibit high Li concentrations (Li geo , 0.04–2.1 mg/L) and low Li isotope ratios (δ 7 Li geo , −0.56 to +12.3‰). High reservoir temperatures along the LCR (93–176 °C) facilitate water-rock interaction and leach more Li from surrounding rocks into geothermal waters. The Li geo and δ 7 Li geo are influenced by fluid residence time and the dissolution-precipitation balance. Geothermal waters with longer residence time have higher Li geo concentrations, whereas secondary mineral formation preferentially sequesters light Li, resulting in the enrichment of isotopically heavy Li in the residual geothermal fluid. The LCR exhibits elevated mean Li concentration (Li diss ) and depressed mean Li isotope ratio (δ 7 Li diss ) relative to global river averages, with both parameters tracking downstream variations in geothermal inputs. The mixing model estimates that the contribution of geothermal waters decreases downstream. The concomitant downstream increase in δ 7 Li diss may reflect either declining geothermal contribution or increased secondary mineral formation. Our study provides evidence for the significant impact of geothermal water on riverine Li, and therefore potentially linked to changes in seawater δ 7 Li records through Earth's history.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 青藏高原东南部地热水中锂的地球化学特征及其对河流水体锂的影响

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究东南青藏高原地热流体如何影响河流锂含量与锂同位素组成。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采集澜沧江温泉样品，分析水化学、锂同位素及水岩相互作用，并用混合模型评估贡献。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 地热水富锂且δ7Li偏低，显著抬升河流锂浓度并压低锂同位素，且影响沿程递减。
summary_bullets.innovation: 将地热水停留时间、次生矿物形成与河流锂同位素变化联系起来，定量约束地热贡献。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究有助于正确解读河流至海水锂同位素记录及大陆风化强度变化。

works.title: Growth and Chemical Evolution of the Kohistan Arc Crust, Northern Pakistan, Western Himalayas
works.abstract: Abstract Fossil arcs which expose the middle‐lower crust have the potential to shed light on active arc processes because magmatic rocks from the entire history of the arc can be examined. We present new geochemical data from the middle crust of the Kohistan Arc and use existing geochemical and geochronological literature data from this arc to constrain the growth and chemical evolution of the arc crust by reconstructing the chemical evolution of intrusive and extrusive magmatism. The ultramafic‐mafic lower crust of the Kohistan Arc is older than much of the intermediate‐felsic middle‐upper crust. The middle‐upper crust of the Kohistan Arc has higher (Ce/Yb) N and lower 143 Nd/ 144 Nd ratios than the older lower crust. The later intermediate to felsic plutons of this arc were formed by fractional crystallization of basaltic magmas. The Kohistan Arc formed in two main stages: (a) subduction initiation and early intra‐oceanic arc (e.g., Izu‐Bonin‐Mariana) magmatism (155–100 Ma) that formed the lower crust; and (b) mature intra‐oceanic arc (85–60 Ma) magmatism (e.g., Cascade Arc) followed by collisional (60–40 Ma) magmatism that generated the upper‐middle crust. Stage 1 volcanic and plutonic rocks have low (Ce/Yb) N ratios, whereas their Stage 2 equivalents have high (Ce/Yb) N ratios. The (Ce/Yb) N ratios and fractionation depths of the volcanic and plutonic rocks of the Kohistan Arc increased with decreasing age, reflecting the progressive maturation and crustal thickening of the arc. Lavas erupted at mature (∼100 Ma old) entirely intra‐oceanic arcs are geochemically similar to those found at “continental” arcs (e.g., Cascade Arc).
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 巴基斯坦北部西喜马拉雅 Kohistan 弧地壳的生长与化学演化

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究科希斯坦岛弧地壳如何生长及其化学演化过程。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合中地壳新地球化学数据与既有地球化学、年代学资料重建岩浆演化。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 岛弧分两阶段形成，随时间推移地壳增厚成熟，岩浆分异加深。
summary_bullets.innovation: 系统整合全弧多时期侵入岩与喷出岩，重建中下地壳到上地壳演化。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解岛弧成熟、陆壳形成及活动弧过程提供化石弧证据与参照。

works.title: Selective transport of light vs. heavy rare earth elements by sulfate/bisulfate complexes in hydrothermal fluids
works.abstract: This study explores the transport of rare earth elements (REE) in acidic sulfate-bearing hydrothermal fluids and the implications for the fractionation of light/heavy REE in critical mineral deposits. The speciation of Nd (light REE) and Yb (heavy REE) sulfate complexes were determined via in situ Raman spectroscopy using fused SiO 2 capillary cells up to 300 °C at saturated water vapor pressure (0.1–8.6 MPa) and in a hydrothermal diamond anvil cell up to 500 °C and 540 MPa.
