works.translated_title: 论地壳变质作用的压力—温度—时间演化路径

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文梳理地壳变质作用P-T-t路径研究的演进及其科学意义。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过评述六篇里程碑文献，综合概念、方法与年代学进展。
summary_bullets.key_findings: P-T-t路径研究推动变质岩石学由静态描述转向动态演化重建。
summary_bullets.innovation: 系统串联概念、建模、方法与时空重建，揭示领域发展主线。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为造山带演化、地球动力学及早期地球研究提供关键综合框架。

works.title: Eocene Lamproitic Magmatism in Gangdese: Melting Sub‐Arc Lithospheric Mantle and Implications for the Early Cenozoic Magmatic “Flare Up” in Southern Tibet
works.abstract: Abstract The role of sub‐arc mantle lithosphere in the build‐up of a batholith is an outstanding issue that is still not well resolved. Lamproite is a mantle‐derived magmatic rock that provides a window to learn the composition and the enrichment processes of subcontinental lithospheric mantle (SCLM). Zircon and titanite U‐Pb age data on a dike of lamproite from the Gangdese batholith indicate that this dike was generated at ∼44 Ma. These lamproitic samples are ultrapotassic with high K 2 O contents and high Sr and Ba concentrations. They show strong enrichment in light rare earth elements (LREE), depletion in heavy rare earth elements (HREE) and substantial negative anomalies in Ti, Nb, and Ta. These lamproitic rocks are characterized by radiogenic 87 Sr/ 86 Sr and unradiogenic ɛ Nd (t) (−11.6 to −12.5), elevated 206 Pb/ 204 Pb(t) (18.71–18.73), 207 Pb/ 204 Pb(t) (15.75–15.76) and 208 Pb/ 204 Pb(t) (39.62–39.73) isotope compositions, suggesting that the lamproite was derived from a fluid‐metasomatized sub‐arc lithospheric mantle. Monte Carlo modeling indicates that this metasomatic event occurred at 174 Ma during the subduction of the Tethyan oceanic lithosphere. The ∼44 Ma Tunba lamproitic magmatism represents a magmatic response to the early Cenozoic slab breakoff of the Neo‐Tethyan oceanic lithosphere. During the early Cenozoic magmatic “flare up,” melting of a metasomatized sub‐arc lithospheric mantle could increase the magma production in addition to the magmas from the asthenospheric mantle. This process could be another important factor that enhances the magmatic “flare up” in the Gangdese batholith in particular and other batholith worldwide.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 冈底斯始新世钾镁煌斑岩质岩浆作用：弧下岩石圈地幔熔融及其对藏南早新生代岩浆“爆发期”的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨冈底斯岩基中弧下岩石圈地幔对始新世岩浆增产的作用。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合锆石和榍石U-Pb定年、地球化学同位素分析与蒙特卡罗模拟。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 44Ma钾镁煌斑岩源于受流体交代的弧下岩石圈地幔，受板片断离触发熔融。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次量化174Ma交代事件，并将其与44Ma板片断离和岩浆flare-up相联系。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为解释冈底斯及全球岩基岩浆爆发中岩石圈地幔贡献提供新机制。

works.title: Tracing the origin of mantle heterogeneities with the Fe isotopic composition of Southwest Indian Ridge Basalts
works.abstract: The peculiar Sr–Nd–Pb–Hf isotopic compositions of Southwest Indian Ridge (SWIR) basalts, referred to as the DUPAL anomaly, have been attributed to the recycling of Lower Continental Crust (LCC) mafic lithologies. Iron stable isotope represents a promising proxy for providing further insight into the lithological nature of the DUPAL anomaly. We report Fe isotope and Rare Earth Element (REE) data for 27 basaltic glasses along the SWIR axis between 49° and 69°E longitude. The δ 56 Fe values (deviation in 56 Fe/ 54 Fe from the IRMM-014 standard, expressed in parts per thousand) of SWIR basalts range from +0.06‰ to +0.16‰, falling within the typical range of Mid-Oceanic Ridge basalts (MORB). Variations in δ 56 Fe can only be partially explained by fractional crystallization. In particular, the easternmost SWIR basalts (Zone A) display the full range of δ 56 Fe variation at nearly constant MgO. When corrected for the effects of fractional crystallization, Zone A basalts exhibit positive correlations among δ 56 Fe, Na 2 O, and Light REE enrichment. These trends can be accounted for by mixing of melts derived from depleted peridotite and enriched pyroxenite sources. Furthermore, the linear and negative Fe–Pb isotopic array defined by Zone A basalts provides key constraints on the origin of the heavy δ 56 Fe pyroxenitic component. In particular, the involvement of an ancient low degree (Low-F) melt metasomatic source or recycled DUPAL-like LCC can be excluded. We infer that the heavy δ 56 Fe and unradiogenic Pb signatures of SWIR basalts are consistent with a contribution from ancient, recycled, sulfide-bearing pyroxenites.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 利用西南印度洋中脊玄武岩的Fe同位素组成追踪地幔非均一性的来源

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究SWIR玄武岩DUPAL异常的地幔非均一体来源与岩性性质。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定49°–69°E段27个玻璃样品的Fe同位素与REE，并结合分异校正和同位素相关分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: Zone A玄武岩的重Fe同位素与富集特征表明其源区为亏损橄榄岩与古老含硫辉石岩混合。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次以Fe稳定同位素联合Pb等指标有效排除LCC回收与低度熔体交代源解释。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为识别洋中脊地幔异质性及再循环地壳物质类型提供了新的地球化学约束。

works.title: Reliability of quartz-hosted melt inclusions and discrete rhyolite reservoirs revealed by H isotopes, trace elements, and volatiles
works.abstract: High-silica magmas (≥68 weight % silicon dioxide) have produced some of the largest and most impactful volcanic eruptions in Earth’s history. Quartz-hosted melt inclusions can provide critical insights into the architecture, evolution, and eruption of silicic magmas; however, the reliability of mineral-hosted melt inclusion compositions has been questioned because of potential postentrapment modification of inclusions via diffusive exchange. We demonstrate that with careful sample selection, both naturally glassy and experimentally homogenized quartz-hosted melt inclusions can retain meaningful preeruptive signatures and provide useful insights into preeruptive magmatic conditions. We also show that hydrogen isotope measurements and detailed descriptions of melt inclusion geometries are particularly critical for identifying postentrapment diffusive exchange in melt inclusions, whether it is due to natural or experimental processes. Last, combining data from measurements of quartz-hosted melt inclusion hydrogen isotopes, trace elements, volatiles, and geometries, we fingerprint multiple discrete rhyolite magma reservoirs in the Highland Range volcanic sequence (NV, USA).
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: H 同位素、微量元素和挥发分揭示石英包裹熔体包裹体的可靠性及离散流纹岩岩浆储库

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究石英包裹体是否可靠记录高硅流纹质岩浆喷发前信息。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合氢同位素、微量元素、挥发分及包裹体几何分析，并比较天然玻璃态与实验均一化样品。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 精细筛选后石英包裹体可保留有效喷前信号，并识别出多个离散流纹质岩浆库。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出以氢同位素和包裹体几何特征识别自然或实验后的扩散改造。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为评估硅质岩浆储库结构、演化与喷发机制提供更可靠的地球化学判据。

works.title: Astronomical calibration of the middle Cambrian in Baltica: global carbon cycle synchronization and climate dynamics
works.abstract: Abstract The Alum Shale Formation of Baltica preserves one of the most continuous and fossil-rich records for the Cambrian Period. Thus, the Alum Shale is a key sedimentary archive for refining global chronostratigraphy, reconstructing carbon cycle perturbations, and assessing astronomical forcing of high-latitude systems during an early Palaeozoic greenhouse world. Here we present a high-resolution cyclostratigraphic and multiproxy study of the middle Cambrian succession from the Albjära-1 drill core (southern Sweden), anchored by a high-precision U–Pb age. Integration of our astronomical time scale with carbon isotope data and refined biostratigraphy places the Albjära-1 core as a global reference record. This framework provides numerically constrained ages and durations for the Drumian Carbon Isotope Excursion (DICE), enabling worldwide synchronization of biostratigraphy and carbon cycle events. Coupled elemental geochemistry and time calibration reveal that obliquity- and orbital eccentricity-driven climate oscillations modulated sea-level and dust fluxes, highlighting the sensitivity of Earth’s early Paleozoic greenhouse systems to astronomical forcing.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 波罗的古陆中寒武世的天文校准：全球碳循环同步与气候动力学

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究中寒武世波罗的地层年代校准及全球碳循环事件同步问题。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合高分辨率旋回地层、多指标地球化学、生物地层与高精度U-Pb定年。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 建立天文时间标尺，约束DICE年代，并揭示轨道强迫调控海平面与尘埃通量。
summary_bullets.innovation: 将天文标尺与碳同位素和生物地层整合，提出全球对比参考剖面。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为寒武纪年代框架、全球地层对比及早古生代气候机制研究提供基准。

works.title: Melt-depleted plume mantle sourced the oldest Atlantic Ocean crust
works.abstract: Mid-ocean ridge basalts (MORBs) are known to sample the heterogeneous uppermost mantle, providing insights into the mantle’s evolution. Early oceanic crust may have documented information about the nature of convecting mantle during the breakup of continent and the opening of ocean. This study examined MORBs from various Deep Sea Drilling Project sites at the Central Atlantic, spanning ages from 160 to 80 Ma. Systematic differences in chemical compositions emerge between the oldest (>140 Ma) and younger (<140 Ma) basalts. The oldest Atlantic crust demonstrate pronounced reduction in rare earth element abundances, yet are anomalously enriched in Sr, as well as more enriched Sr–Nd–Hf isotope compositions relative to the younger, more normal-MORB-like crust. Geochemical and isotopic data from the oldest Atlantic crust indicate the presence of plume materials emplaced beneath the young Atlantic Ridge. These plume materials have undergone a complex evolution, involving ancient melt extraction likely related to the magmatism of Central Atlantic Magmatic Province, subsequent re-enrichment by percolating melts, and then remelting at Mid-Atlantic Ridge. The results demonstrate that the compositions of the oldest Atlantic MORBs reflect dynamic mantle processes rather than simple binary mixing between homogeneous depleted and enriched end-members. Our findings highlight the role of melt-depleted lithology played in mid-ocean ridge magmatism and shaping the compositional heterogeneity in the convecting mantle throughout geological time.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 最古老大西洋洋壳的物质来源于熔体亏损的地幔柱地幔

summary_bullets.research_question: 探究最古老大西洋洋壳MORB成因及其揭示的地幔演化过程。
summary_bullets.methodology: 分析中大西洋DSDP站位160–80Ma MORB的地球化学与Sr-Nd-Hf同位素。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 140Ma前洋壳源于熔体亏损的地幔柱物质，而非简单端元混合。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出最老大西洋MORB记录了亏损地幔柱经再富集后在洋脊重熔。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为大陆裂解、洋盆初开及对流地幔非均一性研究提供关键约束。

works.title: The influence of carbonated components on the petrogenesis of the Abaga basalts, Xilin Gol League (Inner Mongolia, China)
works.abstract: The Abaga volcanic field of Inner Mongolia, northern China, is situated west of the Daxinganling-Taihangshan gravity lineament and within the eastern part of the Central Asian orogenic belt (the Xing-Meng orogenic belt). This volcanic field consists of alkali basalts and tholeiites. Previous studies reported eruption ages (14.57−2.55 Ma; Luo and Chen, 1990; Ho et al., 2008; Zhang et al., 2016; Wu et al., 2023) based solely on exposed samples. The range of eruption ages and the chronostratigraphic stages of the study area, based on drill core and outcrop samples, have not been deciphered until now. In addition, the petrogenesis of the tholeiites remains poorly understood. In this study, we present Ar-Ar ages, major and trace element data, and Sr-Nd-Pb-Hf-Mg isotopic values for drill core and outcrop samples from the Abaga basalts. These data are used to identify the eruption stages of this volcanic field, determine whether sedimentary carbonates were present in the magma source, and discuss the genesis of both the alkali basalts and the tholeiites. Based on Ar-Ar dating results and the geological features of the basalts, four eruption stages have been identified. The earliest effusive eruption dates back to 21.38 Ma, which is ∼6.81 m.y. older than previously reported ages. In addition, the Abaga alkali basalts display concentrations of TiO2 (2.57−3.58 wt%) and Na2O + K2O (4.05%−6.36%), along with CaO/Al2O3 (0.58−0.95), Hf/Hf* (0.46−0.83), and Zr/Hf (41.24−47.23) ratios. Their δ26Mg (−0.43‰ to −0.31‰) and δ66Zn (0.47‰−0.50‰; Liu et al., 2022) values are similar to those of carbonated basalts, demonstrating that their magma source was metasomatized by recycled carbonates. The modeling results for δ26Mg and (Zn/Fe) × 104 values illustrate that <10% carbonate was added to the mantle source. Compared to the alkali basalts, the tholeiites display higher Hf/Hf* values (0.78−0.89) and δ26Mg ratios (−0.35‰ to −0.24‰) and lower TiO2 abundances (2.50%−2.91%), CaO/Al2O3 values (0.68−0.85), and Zr/Hf ratios (38.57−42.08). These characteristics suggest that the tholeiites may have been generated by interactions between alkali basalts and the lithosphere. The two-end-member mixing calculation using 143Nd/144Nd and δ26Mg values demonstrates that the addition of 20%−60% lithospheric melt to the alkali basalt can account for the petrogenesis of the tholeiites. Subduction of the Pacific plate likely contributed to the addition of carbonate to the mantle source. In conclusion, these newly reported data provide new insights into the petrogenesis of the basalts.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 含碳酸盐组分对中国内蒙古锡林郭勒盟阿巴嘎玄武岩岩石成因的影响

summary_bullets.research_question: 厘清阿巴嘎玄武岩喷发阶段、源区碳酸盐贡献及拉斑玄武岩成因。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合钻孔与露头样品，开展Ar-Ar定年、主微量元素、Sr-Nd-Pb-Hf-Mg同位素与混合建模。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 识别四期喷发，最早为21.38 Ma；碱性玄武岩源区含少量再循环碳酸盐，拉斑玄武岩源于其与岩石圈熔体混合。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次整合钻孔和露头年代学与Mg-Zn同位素，定量约束碳酸盐加入量及拉斑玄武岩混合比例。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为东亚板内火山作用、碳酸盐再循环及太平洋板块俯冲影响提供关键证据。

works.title: Evidence for organic and igneous carbon sources in the Mesoproterozoic Adirondack Highlands graphite district, New York
works.abstract: This study examined the origin of graphite mineralization in the Mesoproterozoic Adirondack Highlands. Flake graphite was mined from the historic mining district around Ticonderoga, New York, USA, from the 1850s to the 1920s. Most of the production and reserves from the district are disseminated graphite from feldspathic quartz schists (e.g., Dixon-American Graphite Co. mine, Faxon property, Flake Graphite Company). Protolith sediments of the schists were deposited in the Trans-Adirondack backarc basin at ca. 1.25 Ga and were metamorphosed to high grade at 1.18−1.15 Ga during the accretionary Shawinigan orogeny and at 1.09−1.02 Ga during the Ottawan phase of the Grenvillian orogeny. Major elements and carbon isotopes of graphite from schists (δ13C = −28.1‰ to −5.4‰ relative to Vienna Peedee belemnite) are consistent with derivation from organic carbon in protolith sandstones that devolatilized during metamorphism. Some small mines and prospects in the district mined graphitic calcite marbles and clinopyroxene ± scapolite skarns associated with a pegmatite suite dated by U-Pb in zircon to 1.04−1.01 Ga (e.g., Lead Hill and Crown Point deposits), and rare graphite veins are observed at several deposits. Hydrothermal flake graphite from pegmatites, skarns, and veins are distinct from graphite in schist-hosted deposits and have δ13C values that cluster around −7‰ to −5‰, consistent with deposition from igneous CO2. Covariation of carbon and oxygen stable isotopes and U-Pb zircon geochronology are not compatible with precipitation from fluids derived from country rock metapelites or marbles. Some graphite districts elsewhere show compelling evidence for remobilization and redeposition of sedimentary-derived carbon as hydrothermal graphite, sometimes as thick veins producing world-class, high-grade deposits. In the Adirondacks, there is evidence for two generations of graphite mineralization with distinct carbon sources: syngenetic graphite with an organic origin in Shawinigan quartz schists and epigenetic graphite with an igneous origin in Ottawan skarns and pegmatites.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 纽约中元古代阿迪朗达克高地石墨矿区存在有机与火成碳来源的证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 探明阿迪朗达克高地石墨矿化的来源与形成期次。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合主量元素、碳氧同位素及锆石U-Pb年代学分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 片岩石墨源于有机碳，伟晶岩和矽卡岩石墨源于岩浆CO2。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出区内存在沉积同生与岩浆热液后生两代石墨成矿。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为区分石墨成因、指导找矿及理解前寒武纪碳循环提供依据。

works.title: Critical metal enrichment in volcanic-influenced Permian basins: New insights from the Emeishan Large Igneous Province, southwest China
works.abstract: The enrichment of Nb, Zr, Ga, and rare earth elements and yttrium (REY) in sedimentary basins represents a critical, yet poorly constrained component of the global metal cycle. In southwest China, Late Permian coal-bearing strata host Nb-Zr-REY-Ga-rich mudstones, but their metal sources remain debated. Previous studies have primarily attributed this enrichment to either weathered residues of Emeishan Large Igneous Province (ELIP) basalts or alkaline volcaniclastics. Mineralogical and geochemical data from two drill cores of the Longtan Formation in Zhenxiong, eastern Yunnan, China, combined with zircon U-Pb-Hf and whole-rock Sr-Nd isotopic analyses of the mineralized horizons, were used to develop a source-to-sink model for their temporal and spatial evolution. The major- and trace-element characteristics of the mineralized beds (e.g., Al2O3/TiO2, Eu/Eu*, Nb/Yb, and REY distribution patterns) are comparable to ELIP alkaline rocks, whereas non-mineralized beds are closer to ELIP basalts. Zircon U-Pb ages from the mineralized beds cluster at 260.9−257.4 Ma, consistent with late-stage ELIP magmatism, while a small number of older detrital zircons are mainly Neoproterozoic in age. The former records εHf(t) values ranging from −15.71 to +11.37 and TDM1 model ages of 1498−438 Ma, overall showing within-plate affinities, with only a minor arc-related zircon population that may reflect hydrothermal alteration. Whole-rock 87Sr/86Sr(t) values of 0.70259−0.70606 and εNd(t) values of −3.58 to +1.75 show ranges comparable to those of Nb-Ta-mineralized alkaline rocks in the ELIP interior [87Sr/86Sr(t) = 0.70004−0.70424; εNd(t) = 0.4−2.7]. The mineralized mudstones reflect a mixed provenance, dominated by alkaline volcaniclastic input during late-stage ELIP activity, with additional contributions from weathered Precambrian basement rocks beneath ELIP volcanic edifices and, to a lesser extent, Neoproterozoic uplands along the Yangtze Block margins. A minor input also came from contemporaneous arc-related volcanism linked to Paleo-Tethyan subduction, which may have increased upward through the Permian sequence. These results highlight that the enrichment of critical metals in volcanic-influenced sedimentary basins was primarily driven by plume-related alkaline volcaniclastics, with additional contributions from crustal and arc sources.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 受火山作用影响的二叠纪盆地中的关键金属富集：来自中国西南峨眉山大火成岩省的新认识

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文厘清晚二叠世含煤盆地Nb-Zr-REY-Ga富集泥岩的金属来源与成因。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合钻孔矿物地球化学、锆石U-Pb-Hf及全岩Sr-Nd同位素建立源汇模型。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 矿化泥岩主要源于峨眉山晚期碱性火山碎屑，并混入基底风化物及少量弧源物质。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统整合年代学、Hf-Sr-Nd同位素与地球化学重建该类关键金属富集演化。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为火山影响沉积盆地关键金属成矿机制、物源判别与资源勘查提供依据。

works.title: Tracking high-field-strength-element enrichment pathways in alkaline granites: Insights from potassium and barium isotopes
works.abstract: High-field-strength-element (HFSE)-enriched alkaline granites serve as critical repositories for metals such as Zr, Nb, and the rare earth elements (REEs). However, the extent to which HFSE enrichment in alkaline granites reflects magmatic differentiation versus hydrothermal overprint remains debated. Here, we employ potassium (K) and barium (Ba) isotope systematics from the Baerzhe peralkaline granite pluton in NE China, which hosts a world-class Zr-Nb-Be-REE deposit, to distinguish the respective roles of magmatic and hydrothermal processes in HFSE enrichment. Whole-rock major and trace element determinations, Nd isotope measurements, and high-precision K and Ba isotope analyses were conducted on barren and ore-related granite samples. The ore-related granites are markedly Ba-depleted (8.02–42.1 ppm) with highly variable δ 138/134 Ba (−0.35 to + 0.15 ‰), whereas the barren granites retain high Ba contents (910–1454 ppm) and homogeneous δ 138/134 Ba (−0.05 to +0.04 ‰). Likewise, ore-related samples record a broader range of isotopically lower δ 41 K values (down to − 0.62 ‰), in contrast to the narrow, near-crustal δ 41 K range of barren granites (–0.49 to –0.35 ‰). These geochemical and isotopic disparities reflect distinct evolutionary paths. Our results reveal that extensive fractional crystallization plays a pivotal role in HFSE pre-concentration. Prolonged crystallization of alkali feldspar preferentially sequesters heavy K isotopes, yielding an isotopically lighter residual melt that formed the HFSE-rich granites. Barren granites, with limited feldspar removal, preserve crust-like δ 41 K signatures. In contrast, Ba isotopes are highly sensitive to post-magmatic fluids. Instead of trending towards heavier Ba isotope compositions under K-feldspar-dominated closed-system fractional crystallization, the Baerzhe ore-related granites show lower and more variable δ 138/134 Ba due to late-stage Na- and F-rich hydrothermal metasomatism that remobilized HFSEs and induced Ba isotopic exchange. This is reflected by the correlation between δ 138/134 Ba values and the concentrations of these elements. Notably, this fluid overprint altered Ba isotopic compositions without measurably shifting δ 41 K, which remained governed by its magmatic history. Our study demonstrates that K isotopes reliably record magmatic differentiation, whereas Ba isotopes serve as sensitive monitors of subsequent hydrothermal processes. The complementary use of these isotopic systems provides a robust framework for disentangling the complex interplay between magmatic and hydrothermal processes in alkaline granite-hosted HFSE ore systems.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 碱性花岗岩中高场强元素富集路径追踪：来自钾和钡同位素的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究碱性花岗岩中HFSE富集主要受岩浆分异还是热液改造控制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 对拜尔哲矿体相关与贫矿花岗岩开展主微量元素、Nd及高精度K-Ba同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: K同位素记录长时间分离结晶致HFSE预富集，Ba同位素指示晚期富Na-F热液重活化。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次联合K与Ba同位素解耦碱性花岗岩中岩浆过程与热液过程的贡献。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为判别HFSE成矿机制与矿化指示标志提供可推广的同位素框架。

works.title: Extensive thallium mineralization resulting from diagenetic iron sulfide adsorption preceding MVT Zn-Pb mineralization at Jinding, Southwestern China
works.abstract: The Jinding deposit in the Lanping Basin, southwestern China, is a world-class Mississippi Valley-type (MVT) Zn–Pb deposit hosted within a salt diapir dome and contains significant Tl resources (~ 8167 t). Integrated field, mineralogical, and mineral chemical studies reveal a rare type of Tl mineralization hosted by diagenetic iron sulfides in the deposit. Five types of pyrite (Py) and marcasite (Mar) of spheroid Py0 nuclei, epitaxial zonal PyA, plumose MarA, granular PyB and MarB are identified with variable Tl concentration significantly higher than that in MVT sphalerite (Sp) of disseminated SpA, colloform SpB, and crystalline SpC. The trace element signatures, combined with highly negative and variable δ34S values (–34.00‰ to + 1.41‰ (VCDT)) indicate a low-temperature, shallow, diagenetic origin of these iron sulfides. Mass balance effect accompanied with great increase in volume abundance from early- to late-stage iron sulfides controls the decreasing trend of Tl concentration across paragenetic sequences. Tl incorporation into iron sulfides is controlled by As-dependent solid-state solubility under high-As fluid conditions, whereas an upper concentration limit of ~ 1000 ppm governs Tl incorporation under low-As fluid conditions. Fluid pH likely plays an important role in controlling the differential Tl enrichment in closely associated PyB and MarB, as well as in different host rocks. The spatial and temporal disparity between Tl-rich iron sulfides and Zn-Pb sulfides, as well as Tl deficiency in MVT sphalerite indicate that Tl precipitated early in a distinct mineralization event preceding MVT Zn-Pb mineralization.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中国西南金顶矿床中，MVT 型 Zn-Pb 成矿之前成岩期铁硫化物吸附作用导致的大规模铊矿化

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究金顶矿床铊矿化的赋存载体、成因及其与MVT铅锌成矿关系。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合野外地质、矿物学、矿物化学、微量元素与硫同位素分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 铊主要早期富集于成岩期铁硫化物，早于后期MVT铅锌矿化发生。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统识别成岩铁硫化物型铊矿化及其受砷、pH与体积效应控制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为MVT矿床中关键金属迁移富集机制及铊资源找矿提供新依据。

works.title: Thermal history of Earth’s mantle: Implications for Earth system evolution and lessons from recent studies
works.abstract: The thermal evolution of Earth’s mantle is a fundamental problem in geosciences, yet proposed models often focus narrowly on producing estimates of past mantle potential temperature without simultaneously satisfying independent constraints imposed by whole-Earth energy balance and geological observations. In this review, we synthesize key constraints on mantle potential temperature over geological time, with particular emphasis on petrological estimates derived from primary magmas and their consistency with global thermal budget considerations inferred from geophysical and geochemical data. We show that the most reliable petrological estimates imply a present-day Urey ratio of ∼0.25. We then examine the implications of different heat-flow scaling laws, assess the geophysical plausibility of various thermal histories, and clarify the roles of surface heat flux, mantle rheology, and core evolution. By emphasizing the need for internal consistency among geochemical, geophysical, and geological constraints, this review provides a framework for evaluating mantle thermal evolution scenarios against independent global constraints.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 地球地幔的热历史：对地球系统演化的启示及近期研究的借鉴

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究地幔热演化模型如何同时满足温度、能量平衡与地质约束。
summary_bullets.methodology: 综述岩石学温度估算，并结合地球热收支、地球物理与地球化学约束评估模型。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 可靠岩石学证据指示现今尤里比约0.25，部分热流标度律难与全球约束相容。
summary_bullets.innovation: 建立统一框架，联合检验地球化学、地球物理和地质证据的一致性。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为评估地幔、地核及地球系统长期演化提供更可靠的综合判据。

works.title: Episodic mineralization and Ag hyper-enrichment in the Weiquan Ag-Cu-Pb-Zn deposit, Chinese Tianshan: Insights from geology, petrography, geochemistry, and in situ U-Pb geochronology of garnet and zircon
works.abstract: Weiquan is the largest Ag-polymetallic deposit (∼1232 t Ag) in the Tianshan Orogenic Belt and the only known deposit in the region containing Ag-dominated orebodies. However, its age, origin, and mechanisms of formation have remained poorly constrained. Here, we integrate a detailed paragenesis with mineralogy, mineral geochemistry, and in situ U-Pb geochronology of garnet and zircon to reconstruct the multi-stage hydrothermal evolution of Weiquan and the mechanisms that caused Ag-Cu-Pb-Zn enrichment. Based on field relationships and mineralogical characteristics, three distinct mineralization events are identified: (1) a volcanic-hydrothermal event, (2) a skarnization event, and (3) an epithermal event. Garnet samples from the volcanic-hydrothermal event exhibit core-rim textures (Adr—andradite; Grs—grossular, Adr96Grs0 to Adr47Grs45) and 0.55−33.3 ppm U (i.e., garnet 1), whereas the garnet samples from the skarnization event and epithermal event are texturally and compositionally homogeneous (Adr53Grs40 to Adr39Grs53) and have 0.32−9.91 ppm U (i.e., garnet 2). Two discrete hydrothermal episodes are evident based on the U-Pb age dates of zircon and garnet. The early event at ca. 320 Ma, which is coeval with basaltic andesite volcanism, controlled the initial metal enrichment. The later skarnization event at ca. 295 Ma (garnet 2), which is associated with granitic magmatism, remobilized Ag-Cu-Pb-Zn from the basaltic andesite host rock. Subsequent incursion of meteoric water and a decrease in fluid temperature during the epithermal event further upgraded and concentrated Ag-Cu into high-grade orebodies within fractured zones. This study not only resolves long-standing uncertainties regarding the timing of, and genetic link between, the multiple mineralization events at Weiquan, but also establishes a new genetic model involving superimposed magmatic-hydrothermal and epithermal systems. Our results provide a robust chronostratigraphic framework that enhances the understanding of Ag enrichment mechanisms in transitional skarn-epithermal systems, and highlights the exploration potential for similar Ag-polymetallic systems in the Tianshan and other orogenic belts worldwide.

works.translated_title: 中国天山尾泉 Ag-Cu-Pb-Zn 矿床的幕式成矿与 Ag 超常富集：来自地质学、岩相学、地球化学以及石榴子石和锆石原位 U-Pb 年代学的证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 厘清维权银多金属矿的成矿时代、成因及银超富集机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合地质填图、岩相学、矿物地球化学及石榴子石和锆石原位U-Pb定年。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 识别320 Ma火山热液与295 Ma矽卡岩两期成矿，晚期浅成热液进一步富集Ag-Cu。
summary_bullets.innovation: 建立岩浆热液与浅成热液叠加的新成矿模型，并精确约束多期成矿时序。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解过渡型矽卡岩-浅成热液银富集及区域找矿提供年代学与成因依据。

works.title: Interaction between ilmenite-bearing cumulates and lunar mantle: implications for the origin of intermediate and high-titanium lunar basalts
works.abstract: High-pressure layered and mixed experiments were performed at pressures of 1–3 GPa and temperatures of 1075–1500 °C in a piston cylinder apparatus to study the interaction between a novel (fayalite-rich) ilmenite-bearing cumulate (IBC) composition and ambient lunar mantle (represented by San Carlos olivine with X Mg of 0.91), to investigate the origin of intermediate- and high-Ti mare basalts (6–18 wt% TiO 2 ). The partial melts generated in the layered experiments show TiO 2 contents (9–19 wt%) similar to high-Ti mare basalts, but low MgO ( 2 ) of the IBC layer can directly fractionate to generate intermediate-Ti lunar basalts. Lower-temperature, high-Ti partial melts (11–19 wt% TiO 2 ) may first fractionate to more Ti-rich, Mg-poor compositions, then mix with ascending low-Ti, picritic magmas and undergo subsequent fractionation during ascent to generate high-Ti basalt compositions. Our model successfully reproduces the observed evolution of MgO, TiO 2 , SiO 2 , and FeO in high-Ti basalts, although it underestimates their Al 2 O 3 and CaO contents. Incorporation of pockets of plagioclase-rich melts from the mantle may resolve this discrepancy. High-pressure density calculations suggest that at 1 GPa, high-Ti partial melts can ascend to the lunar surface. At 2–3 GPa, some partial melts may ascend to the surface after fractionation and assimilation, while some may sink through the lunar mantle. These findings provide new insights on the role of lunar mantle overturn, IBC melting and mantle interactions in the formation of lunar high-Ti basalts and offer a viable mechanism for their generation throughout the history of mare volcanism.

works.translated_title: 含钛铁矿堆晶岩与月幔之间的相互作用：对中钛和高钛月球玄武岩成因的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨月幔与含钛铁矿堆晶相互作用如何形成中高钛月海玄武岩。
summary_bullets.methodology: 在1–3 GPa、1075–1500℃下开展分层与混合高压熔融实验及密度计算。
summary_bullets.key_findings: IBC部分熔融与分离结晶、岩浆混合可解释中高钛玄武岩主要成分演化。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出富铁IBC与月幔反应生成高钛玄武岩的新机制并约束其上升条件。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为月幔翻转、月海火山作用及高钛玄武岩成因提供实验约束与新解释。

works.title: The lithospheric carbonatite pathway at Bayan Obo: Evidence from gravity and magnetic inversion and its significance for Nb-REE-Fe mineralization
works.abstract: Clarifying the geometry of deep carbonatite-fluid pathways beneath the supergiant Bayan Obo Nb-REE-Fe deposit, and their coupling with mineralization can provide key constraints for establishing models of ore-forming evolution and for predicting deep mineralization. In this study, satellite gravity data and aeromagnetic data are used to invert the lithospheric-scale density and magnetic susceptibility structures of the Bayan Obo region. The results show that a southward-dipping pathway system rising from the mantle is identified beneath the ore district. The results are in agreement with previously published magnetotelluric inversion profiles. Indication by multiple methods in combination that this system is characterized by the coincidence of high-density, high-magnetic-susceptibility, and low-resistivity anomalies. Curie depth estimates reveal pronounced Curie surface uplifts in the ore district and its surrounding areas. Together with the high-density, high-magnetic-susceptibility, low-resistivity anomaly belt, these features indicate a persistent deep thermal anomaly. In combination with existing constraints from rock physical property measurements, mineralogical observations, petrological geochemical and geochronological data, this study suggests that Nb-REE-Fe mineralization at Bayan Obo is controlled by a deep carbonatite pathway system. This system was initiated during Mesoproterozoic rifting and was repeatedly reactivated during Mesoproterozoic magmatism (∼1.3 Ga), Early Paleozoic fluid activity (∼0.44 Ga), and Permian granitic magmatism (∼0.27 Ga). This study provides new geophysical evidence for finely characterizing the geometry of deep carbonatite pathways beneath Bayan Obo and their control on multi-stage Nb-REE-Fe mineralization, and offers a reference for deep exploration of similar carbonatite-type Nb-REE-Fe deposits.

works.translated_title: 白云鄂博岩石圈碳酸岩运移通道：来自重力与磁法反演的证据及其对 Nb-REE-Fe 成矿作用的意义

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究白云鄂博深部碳酸岩通道几何及其与Nb-REE-Fe成矿耦合关系。
summary_bullets.methodology: 利用卫星重力、航磁反演岩石圈密度与磁化率，并结合居里面深度及已有电磁资料。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现幔源南倾深部通道，具高密度高磁化率低电阻特征，控制多期Nb-REE-Fe成矿。
summary_bullets.innovation: 从岩石圈尺度精细刻画白云鄂博深部碳酸岩通道，并建立其与多阶段成矿的联系。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为碳酸岩型Nb-REE-Fe矿床成矿模型构建及深部找矿预测提供关键地球物理依据。

works.title: Mo isotopes in Aleutian sediments: serpentinite-eclogite-sediment mixing and slab depth controls in arc magmas
works.abstract: Sediments are considered important sources of Mo for arc magmatism, yet Mo isotope analyses of sediments outboard arc trenches are scarce. We report Mo isotopes ( δ 98/95 Mo) and Mo concentrations for sediments (n = 48) on the Pacific plate, outboard the Aleutian arc from drill cores ODP 886C (n = 19), DSDP 183 (n = 10), IODP 1417 (n = 9) and DSDP 178 (n = 10), and sulfur concentrations in the IODP 1417 samples. With this data, we estimate the mean weighted Mo isotope composition of Aleutian sediments and sediment-derived Mo fluxes along the arc. Additionally, we report Mo isotope systematics on Aleutian lavas from Recheshnoi (n = 3), Makushin (n = 5), Akutan (n = 2), Shishaldin (n = 5) and Frosty Peak (n = 4) to better constrain the Mo systematics in areas east of the Amlia Fracture Zone (AFZ). Aleutian sediments show a wide range of δ 98/95 Mo (–2.0‰ to + 1.2‰) and Mo concentrations (0.2–1121 µg/g) but predominantly low, MORB-like mean weighted δ 98/95 Mo: –0.32‰ (ODP 886C), –0.31‰ (DSDP 183), –0.21‰ (DSDP 178), and + 0.10‰ (IODP 1417). Pelagic sediments with Fe-Mn oxyhydroxides have extremely high Mo concentrations (up to 1121 µg/g), and light δ 98/95 Mo values (–0.46 to –0.19‰). Turbidites with high sulfur concentrations (5000 – 11214 µg/g) have lower Mo concentrations (1.1 – 4.2 µg/g) and heavier Mo isotopes ( δ 98/95 Mo = 0.0 to + 0.32‰), reflecting pyrite precipitation under localized reducing conditions. Aleutian sediments contribute high Mo fluxes (∼200–500 g/(m*yr)) with low δ 98/95 Mo (–0.29‰ to –0.26‰) in the western/central arc and lower fluxes (∼65 g/(m*yr)) with higher δ 98/95 Mo (–0.02‰ to –0.01‰) in the eastern arc. Eastern Aleutian lavas have low δ 98/95 Mo (–0.54‰ to 0.00‰) that further show that high δ 98/95 Mo values (>0‰) are restricted to lavas near the AFZ. Importantly, no bulk sediment can account for these high δ 98/95 Mo values. Instead, from Mo and radiogenic isotopes and trace elements, as well as slab depth observations, the Mo isotope systematics of Aleutian lavas are best explained by a mixture of serpentinite, eclogite and sediments (likely in a mélange style). At the AFZ, the high δ 98/95 Mo can be explained with a higher proportion of the serpentinite component derived from the subduction of the AFZ and shallower slab depths, while in eastern/western lavas with low δ 98/95 Mo partial melting of the subducting plate in eclogitic facies and sediment sources (as well ambient depleted mantle) play a bigger role. Our study shows that Mo isotopes provide a powerful tool to identify source components and the mechanisms of their incorporation into arc magmas.

works.translated_title: 阿留申沉积物中的钼同位素：蛇纹岩-榴辉岩-沉积物混合及板片深度对弧岩浆的控制作用

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究阿留申俯冲带沉积物Mo同位素如何控制弧岩浆来源与深度效应。
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定多钻孔沉积物与多火山熔岩的Mo同位素、Mo/S含量并估算沿弧通量。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 高δ98/95Mo熔岩仅见AFZ附近，最佳解释为蛇纹岩-榴辉岩-沉积物混合及板片深度差异。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次系统约束阿留申海沟外沉积物Mo同位素通量并联结弧熔岩源区混合模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 证明Mo同位素可有效示踪俯冲输入组分及其进入弧岩浆的机制。

works.title: Fluid assimilation-fractional crystallization drives heavy zinc isotope enrichment in Himalayan leucogranites
works.abstract: Abstract The Himalayan leucogranites represent typical high-silica (SiO2 > 70 wt.%) granite in continental collisional orogens. Their petrogenesis commonly involves crustal anatexis, fractional crystallization, and magmatic-hydrothermal processes, and is thus crucial for understanding the formation and evolution of the upper continental crust. Recent advances in multiple non-traditional stable isotopes have revealed extreme fractionation in these leucogranites. However, the role of magmatic-hydrothermal processes in shaping such isotopic signatures remains controversial, particularly for fluid-mobile elements like Zn. Here, we characterize the geochemical and Zn isotope signatures of highly evolved Kampa and Qianjingou leucogranites in the Himalayan orogen. These leucogranites exhibit significantly elevated δ66Zn values (0.29‰ to 0.91‰) compared to the average value of upper continental crust, which cannot be attributed to chemical weathering, source heterogeneity, or partial melting. Quantitative modeling shows that the Zn elemental and isotope characteristics of the Himalayan leucogranites also cannot be reproduced by fractional crystallization alone. We propose that a fluid assimilation-fractional crystallization (FAFC) process can well explain the heavy Zn isotope enrichment in the Himalayan leucogranites. Specifically, with the addition of magmatic fluids exsolved from underlying magma reservoirs, the Zn-depletion caused by fractional crystallization is partially compensated, and heavy Zn isotopes are preferentially introduced. This model is supported by the covariation between δ66Zn and both δ138/134Ba and δ87Rb within the Kampa samples, because deep magmatic fluids are simultaneously enriched in light Ba isotopes and heavy Rb isotopes. Analysis of major rock-forming minerals suggests that mica and tourmaline control the main Zn budget in the Himalayan leucogranites. These volatile-rich minerals exhibit δ66Zn values higher than those of coexisting plagioclase, which contradicts theoretically predicted inter-mineral Zn isotope fractionation trends. This phenomenon likely reflects the modification of shallow magma compositions by deep magmatic fluids as well. Meanwhile, ascending magmatic fluids can efficiently scavenge fluid-mobile fluxing components and rare metals to shallow levels of the magmatic system, thereby promoting crystal-melt separation and rare-metal enrichment in highly evolved granites. Therefore, the FAFC process should have made an important contribution to the formation of rare-metal mineralization and the extreme differentiation of the upper continental crust.

works.translated_title: 流体混染—分离结晶作用驱动喜马拉雅淡色花岗岩中重锌同位素富集

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探究喜马拉雅淡色花岗岩重锌同位素富集的成因机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合地球化学、锌同位素分析、定量模型及矿物组成对比研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 单纯分离结晶无法解释数据，FAFC过程可导致重锌同位素显著富集。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出深部岩浆流体混染—分离结晶联合控制锌同位素的新模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为高硅花岗岩演化、稀有金属成矿及上地壳分异提供新约束。

works.title: Thermal Buffering, Heat Advection and Crustal Thinning in the Ryoke Metamorphic Complex, Yanai, Southwest Japan
works.abstract: ABSTRACT The metamorphic zoning and geothermobarometry of the Ryoke metamorphic complex in the Yanai area, southwest Japan, show that its thermobaric structure was buffered by the dehydration melting of biotite. The temperatures over most of the area covered by the three high‐grade zones (8.5‐ to 19.0‐km depth) are consistent with those of the dehydration melting reaction and indicate a geothermal gradient of 9.2°C/km. The deepest area (> 19‐km depth) of the highest grade zone has a domal structure and records temperatures that are > 50°C higher than the melting reaction. In contrast, the low‐grade zones ( 100°C/km. The spacing of the isobars indicates that the crust was vertically thinned at all these depths. Thermal modelling suggests that the formation of this thermobaric structure requires thermal buffering by the dehydration melting reactions of muscovite and biotite and also advective heat transfer related to the upward migration of melt produced by these reactions. The melt migration through the thermally buffered middle crust enabled heat to advect efficiently to the shallower crust and modify the conductive geothermal gradient. The spatial–temporal scale of this thermal event in the study area is comparable to that of coeval and present‐day volcanism, suggesting a close link between deep crustal and surface processes.

works.translated_title: 日本西南部柳井地区领家变质杂岩中的热缓冲、热平流与地壳减薄

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨柳井领家变质杂岩热压结构如何由熔融缓冲、热平流与地壳减薄共同形成。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合变质带分区、温压计约束与热模拟，重建区域温压结构及演化过程。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 中地壳受黑云母脱水熔融热缓冲，熔体上迁平流增温，且全层位发生垂向减薄。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出熔融热缓冲与熔体热平流耦合机制，可统一解释异常地温梯度与穹隆深部增温。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解中深地壳热演化、岩浆活动与地表火山作用耦合提供关键约束。

works.title: Geochemical Analysis of Diachronous V‐Shaped Ridges and Troughs That Flank the Reykjanes Ridge South of Iceland
works.abstract: Abstract It is recognized that mantle plumes play a direct role in generating regional uplift and producing immense volumes of basaltic magmatism, both of which can influence paleoclimate. The Icelandic Plume, beneath the North Atlantic Ocean, is of particular importance due to its size and position at a significant paleoceanographic gateway. It is transected by a mid‐oceanic ridge system, which has generated a series of V‐shaped ridges and troughs that flank the Reykjanes Ridge south of Iceland. The origin of these diachronous features is debated—do they reflect thermal fluctuations within the plume head or have they formed as a result of compositional variations within the buoyant convecting mantle? To address these and other hypotheses, the International Ocean Discovery Program (IODP) carried out three drilling expeditions, which recovered basalt cores from a sequence of V‐shaped ridges and troughs. Here, we show that the petrology and geochemistry of fifty whole‐rock samples taken from boreholes that penetrate different ridges and troughs reveal systematic differences in major, trace and rare earth element concentrations. By combining forward and inverse modeling based upon polybaric fractional melting, we show that these geochemical variations can be explained by varying melt fraction as a function of depth for plausible mantle source compositions. Our results suggest that temperature differences of 25–30C between cooler troughs and hotter ridges play a dominant role. We conclude that the drilled basaltic rocks reveal a chronology of resolvable temperature perturbations that should help to elucidate the fluid dynamics of flow within this major plume.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 冰岛以南雷克雅内斯海岭两侧异时性 V 形脊和槽谷的地球化学分析

summary_bullets.research_question: 探究雷克雅内斯洋脊V形脊谷成因是地幔温度波动还是成分差异。
summary_bullets.methodology: 基于IODP钻探玄武岩样品，结合岩石地球化学分析与多压分离熔融正反演建模。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 脊谷地球化学差异主要由熔融深度与熔融度变化控制，对应约25–30℃温差。
summary_bullets.innovation: 用钻探岩芯地球化学定量重建羽流温度扰动历史，区分热效应与成分效应。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解冰岛地幔柱动力学、洋中脊岩浆作用及其气候影响提供关键约束。

works.title: Volatile resorption expedites eruption onset in large silicic systems
works.abstract: Abstract Silicic caldera-forming eruptions are among the most hazardous natural phenomena on Earth, yet their triggering mechanisms remain poorly understood. While volatile exsolution is widely recognized as a potential eruption driver in large silicic systems, we find that volatile resorption can, counterintuitively, promote chamber pressurization faster than volatile exsolution. Using a thermo-mechanical magma chamber model, we show that resorption is a common process in rapidly recharged systems, driven by pressure increase and crystal melting. The Aso-4 eruption offers a natural case where volatile resorption may have occurred, with model results predicting resorption at recharge rates >10 -2.4 km 3 /yr. Through reducing bulk magma compressibility, resorption amplifies pressurization, driving chamber destabilization and potentially expediting eruption onset. Here, we propose that volatile resorption is a natural process both accommodating and promoting rapid chamber pressurization, fundamental to destabilizing large-scale silicic systems. Detecting its signatures in monitoring signals could provide early warning of imminent eruption.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 挥发分再吸收加速大型富硅岩浆系统喷发的启动

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨大型硅质岩浆系统喷发触发机制及挥发分再溶解作用。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用热—力学岩浆房模型，并结合阿苏4喷发案例约束分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 快速补给下挥发分再溶解会降压缩性并加速增压，促使喷发提前。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出再溶解比脱溶更快促增压的反常机制，并量化其发生条件。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为识别大型硅质系统临喷信号和改进火山预警提供新机制依据。

works.title: Ophiolites in Mongolia: implications for tectonic evolution of the CAOB
works.abstract: Ophiolites in Mongolia, the central part of the Central Asian Orogenic Belt (CAOB), can be divided, based on their spatial distribution and regional geological features, into six zones: Central Mongolian, Mongol-Okhotsk, Lake, Mongol Altai, Trans-Altai, and South Gobi. These formations document five distinct magmatic periods involving three paleo-oceans: the Mirovian, Paleo-Asian (PAO), and Mongol-Okhotsk (MOO). The oldest remnants (1.02–0.93 Ga) represent the Mirovian Ocean, with subsequent events (800–560 Ma) documenting its crustal generation and subduction. The closure of the Mirovian Ocean (540–520 Ma) likely triggered subduction initiation in the Paleo-Asian Ocean (PAO), evidenced by Cambrian supra-subduction zone (SSZ) ophiolites (529–500 Ma). Carboniferous-Permian (350–255 Ma) ophiolites in southern Mongolia reflect late Paleozoic PAO crustal generation, while those in the northeast record the initial subduction of the Mongol-Okhotsk Ocean. We propose that the Gurvansaikhan-Manlay ophiolite belt connects with the Armantai ophiolite belt in East Junggar, China, and that the Edren-Altan Uul ophiolite belt extends and links westward to the Kalameili ophiolite belt in East Junggar, China. Undoubtedly, ophiolites in Mongolia provide critical insights into the tectonic evolution of the CAOB, including the protracted subduction-accretion processes, the complex transition dynamics and the final closure of the multipleoceanic basins.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 蒙古国蛇绿岩：对 CAOB 构造演化的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 研究蒙古蛇绿岩分带、时代与其对CAOB构造演化的指示。
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合空间分布、区域地质特征与年代学资料进行分带和对比。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 识别六个蛇绿岩带、五期岩浆作用及三大古洋演化与闭合过程。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出蒙古两条蛇绿岩带与中国东准噶尔蛇绿岩带的区域延续连接。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为重建CAOB多洋盆俯冲增生、转换动力学及最终闭合提供关键约束。

works.title: High-titanium mare basalts: From petrogenesis to lunar evolution
works.abstract: High-Ti mare basalts, characterized by their unique titanium-rich compositions (TiO2 contents up to 16 wt.%), provide critical insights into lunar magma ocean (LMO) differentiation, the structure and composition of the lunar mantle, and lunar internal dynamics. Here we systematically synthesize the spatiotemporal distribution, petrology, mineralogy, and geochemistry of high-Ti mare basalts. By integrating these compiled data with thermodynamic modeling, we present a comprehensive evaluation of the four prevailing petrogenetic models: (1) ilmenite-bearing cumulate (IBC) remelting, (2) IBC assimilation, (3) reaction of IBC-derived melts with early LMO cumulates, and (4) mantle source hybridization. Our analyses confirm that the distinct compositional characteristics of high-Ti mare basalts were inherited from late-stage, ilmenite-bearing LMO cumulates. However, we find that the IBC direct remelting, assimilation, and melt-rock reaction models (Models 1–3) each face significant limitations, failing to reconcile observed cumulate components, reproduce the full spectrum of melt compositions, or satisfy thermodynamic viability. In contrast, the mantle hybridization model (Model 4) emerges as the most promising mechanism, successfully satisfying multiple experimental and observational constraints for lunar high-Ti magmatism. We suggest that high-Ti mare basalts are not simple melting products of a single cumulate source. Instead, they represent the combined products of lunar mantle overturn, cumulate hybridization, and partial melting during the Moon’s long-term evolution. This scenario underscores a lunar interior with a far more complex physicochemical state than traditionally envisioned. Future research should prioritize constraining high-Ti mare basalts’ specific source composition and depth of origin, the mechanisms driving their distinct two-stage eruptive history (3.5–3.9 Ga and <2.0 Ga), and their spatial distribution patterns. Resolving these questions is paramount for understanding LMO differentiation, mantle overturn, the Moon’s thermal evolution, and the origin of the lunar hemispheric dichotomy.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 高钛月海玄武岩：从岩石成因到月球演化

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨月海高钛玄武岩成因及其对月球演化的指示。
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合时空分布、岩石矿物地球化学与热力学建模评估四种模型。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 高钛特征源自晚期含钛铁矿堆晶，地幔混合成因最可行。
summary_bullets.innovation: 系统比较四类成因机制，并提出翻转—混合—部分熔融综合框架。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 有助于理解月球岩浆洋分异、地幔翻转、热演化及两分性起源。

works.title: Fluid transport and reaction during disseminated mineralization in orogenic gold systems
works.abstract: Disseminated mineralization is responsible for much of the production from orogenic gold deposits, and deciphering the nature of reactive fluid flow across the macro- to microscopic scale is crucial for understanding the mineralization processes. We integrated structural analysis, microstructural observations, whole-rock geochemistry, and thermodynamic modeling at the Liba orogenic gold deposit in the West Qinling orogen, central China, aiming to unravel the behavior of fluid in slate-hosted disseminated mineralization. The presence of deformed slaty foliation and hydrothermal sericite S-C fabrics indicates that the east-west−striking orebodies are hosted within sinistral brittle-ductile shear zones, which act as deposit-scale fluid migration conduits. The spatial distribution of pyrite within the mineralized slates closely aligns with pore networks and grain boundaries, suggesting that grain-scale enhanced permeability and fluid flow during mineralization were primarily accommodated by microcracking along grain boundaries. Combined with whole-rock geochemical data and thermodynamic modeling, we reveal that under conditions where rock permeability is sufficient for fluid transport, gold mineralization efficiency depends on the degree of reaction between the reactive fluid and Fe-bearing minerals. Compared to siliceous slate, the higher abundance of Fe-bearing minerals in argillaceous slate enhances reactivity at the fluid-mineral interface, promoting sulfide formation and gold precipitation. This study demonstrates that the physicochemical interplay between structural deformation and geochemical reactivity fundamentally controls disseminated mineralization in slate-hosted orogenic gold systems.

works.translated_title: 造山型金矿系统中浸染状矿化过程中的流体运移与反应

summary_bullets.research_question: 解析造山型金矿中板岩赋存浸染矿化的流体运移与反应机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合构造与显微观察、全岩地球化学及热力学建模研究Liba金矿。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 剪脆—韧性剪切带导流，晶界微裂隙控渗流，富铁泥质板岩更利于硫化物与金沉淀。
summary_bullets.innovation: 将构造变形、微尺度渗透性与流体—矿物反应耦合解释浸染型金成矿。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解造山型金矿多尺度成矿控制与找矿预测提供机制依据。

works.title: Diffusive copper redistribution from shallow degassed magmas to mafic enclaves. Insight from anomalously Cu-enriched enclaves from Bezymianny volcano, Kamchatka
works.abstract:
Mafic enclaves enriched in sulfides and copper compared to their host magmas are found in felsic plutons associated with porphyry deposits and in eruptive products of arc volcanoes. The origin of these Cu-rich enclaves is usually linked to either intrinsically Cu-rich parental magmas or to extensive fractionation of primitive magmas under sulfide-undersaturated conditions before they are stored in shallow felsic reservoirs. Using Bezymianny volcano as a case study, we suggest an alternative mechanism for the formation of Cu-rich mafic enclaves.
Detailed petrographic analysis shows that sulfides in Bezymianny enclaves evolve from scarce early Cu-poor MSS (chilled monosulfide solid solution close to pyrrhotite or euhedral pyrrhotite with thin ISS rims) enclosed in phenocrysts, to Cu-rich ISS (intermediate solid solution close to cubanite) in matrix glass and vesicles. This increase in Cu content with crystallization requires the external addition of Cu. Mineral oxybarometry indicates that the shallow-stored magma (<1 kbar) had an oxygen fugacity of 0 to +1 log units above NNO. Intense degassing of S-bearing aqueous fluid kept sulfur concentrations in silicate melts below sulfide saturation, destabilizing sulfides and causing incompatible behavior of chalcophile elements. Consequently, Cu accumulated in silicate melt until inputs of sulfide-bearing mafic magma from deeper levels (9–2 kbar) triggered its diffusive redistribution into enclaves. Cu diffused from the Cu-rich, sulfide-free silicate melt of the shallow reservoir into the Cu-poor silicate melt of mafic enclaves, and subsequently into their sulfide phases. High diffusion rates of monovalent Cu allow small enclaves to achieve full Cu enrichment within several weeks.

works.translated_title: 铜从浅部脱气岩浆向镁铁质包体的扩散再分配——来自堪察加 Bezymianny 火山异常富铜包体的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文探讨浅部脱气岩浆中富铜基性包体的成因机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合岩相学、硫化物演化分析与矿物氧逸度测定开展研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 浅部脱气致硫化物不饱和并富集铜，铜后扩散进入基性包体。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出富铜包体可由浅部长英质储库向基性包体的铜扩散形成。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为弧火山与斑岩成矿中铜迁移、富集和包体成因提供新解释。

works.title: Blueschist Dislocation Creep and Glide in Subduction Systems: Constraints From Glaucophane Experiments
works.abstract: Abstract Blueschists are a defining component of subducting oceanic crust and influence slab and interface rheology across thermal regimes. Glaucophane, the dominant sodic amphibole in blueschist, is a key rheology‐controlling phase, yet its dislocation‐based strength is poorly constrained. We conducted load‐stepping experiments in a Griggs apparatus at 600–700C and 1.0 GPa over shear strain rates from ∼ to 1.2, using a starting grain size of n = 3, Q = 450 15 kJ/mol, A = 2.32 × and dislocation glide A = , = 22 GPa, H = 800 kJ/mol, p = 1, and q = 2. Extrapolation to geologic conditions suggests that dislocation glide will not operate under steady‐state subduction‐interface conditions, and is likely only relevant during transient high stress perturbations. Dislocation creep dominates at temperatures above 450°C at grain sizes of ∼1 mm or larger. Comparison with published quartz/metasediment and eclogite flow laws indicates that blueschist strengths are intermediate between these endmembers, implying a meaningful contribution to long‐term interface strength in mafic‐dominated (sediment‐poor) margins. Together, these results refine glaucophane‐controlled blueschist rheology and its implications for subduction zone mechanics.
works.venue: Journal of Geophysical Research: Solid Earth
