works.translated_title: 伊朗蛇绿岩铬铁矿中铂族元素的分布及地球化学控制

summary_bullets.research_question: 揭示伊朗蛇绿岩铬铁矿中PGE分布及其控制因素
summary_bullets.methodology: 对158样品测全岩PGE、Re-Os同位素并进行C-N分形建模
summary_bullets.key_findings: ΣPGE为16–5183ng/g，高Cr富IPGE源于SSZ博宁岩，高Al富PPGE偏MORB
summary_bullets.innovation: 用C-N分形定量PGE矿化阈值并结合Re-Os约束成因
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为区分富/贫PGE铬铁矿并指导特提斯带找矿提供框架

works.title: Tectonic evolution of the Paleoproterozoic Francevillian Basin and implications for the Lomagundi Carbon Isotope Excursion
works.abstract: The 2.2–2.06 Ga Lomagundi Carbon Isotope Excursion (LCIE), Earth’s most pronounced and long-lasting carbon isotope anomaly, corresponds to the latter part of the Great Oxidation Episode (GOE), but its timing is poorly constrained, and recent work shows facies-dependent δ 13 C variations in restricted nearshore settings, challenging its interpretation as a global Paleoproterozoic ocean signal. The end of the LCIE has been recognized in the Francevillian Group, an exceptionally well-preserved, unmetamorphosed Paleoproterozoic succession in southeastern Gabon. However, uncertainties in basin evolution and depositional ages have limited interpretations. To address this, we combined detrital zircon U-Pb geochronology, based on two independent methods, with geochemical analyses for the FB to FD formations. The results of the two methods show a consistent signal of a tectonic evolution from extensional (rift to passive margin) to convergent (foreland) settings and indicate that the Francevillian Basin was connected to the global ocean both during the LCIE peak (ca. 2.13 Ga, FB Formation) and its termination (ca. 2.08 Ga, FC–FD transition). Integrating these data with geochronologic constraints from other open-marine carbonate successions characterized by high δ 13 C values demonstrates a synchronous end to the LCIE between ca. 2.13 and 2.08 Ga. This implies that the LCIE reflects global-scale biogeochemical and redox processes rather than local, basin-scale processes. The Francevillian Group record thus provides critical insights into the GOE, early biospheric innovations and ecosystem evolution.
works.label: ignore
works.translated_title: 古元古代弗朗斯维尔盆地的构造演化及其对洛马贡迪碳同位素漂移的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 厘定法兰西维利盆地演化与LCIE终止年代。
summary_bullets.methodology: 用两套碎屑锆石U‑Pb定年结合地球化学剖面。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 揭示裂谷至前陆转变且LCIE于2.13–2.08Ga同步结束。
summary_bullets.innovation: 以双方法定年联动构造—沉积环境判别海洋连通性。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为GOE时期全球碳循环与氧化还原研究提供关键约束。

works.title: Crust-mantle hybrid magmatism reveals the trans-mantle diapiric exhumation of deeply subducted continental crust: A case study from Altyn Tagh ultrahigh-pressure terranes, NW China
works.abstract: The diapiric exhumation of deeply subducted slabs in orogenic belts requires the upward intrusion of exhumed rocks through the mantle wedge, resulting in significant crust-mantle interaction and partial melting. To evaluate this process, we conducted an integrated petrological, geochronological, and geochemical study of monzogranite plutons in/around the high-pressure (HP)−ultrahigh-pressure (UHP) felsic gneiss terranes of eastern South Altyn Tagh (SAT), NW China. The monzogranite suite comprises host K-rich monzogranites, mafic-intermediate enclaves, and felsic gneiss xenoliths. Felsic gneiss xenoliths recorded a protolith age of ca. 900 Ma and partial melting at ca. 480 Ma during exhumation, while the monzogranites and enclaves exhibit coeval crystallization at ca. 480 Ma, with inherited zircon U-Pb ages of ca. 900 Ma matching the protolith age of felsic gneiss xenoliths. The K-rich monzogranites exhibit geochemical and isotopic affinities with HP-UHP felsic gneisses (and the in situ granitic veins in felsic gneisses), collectively indicating origin through partial melting of the felsic gneisses. εNd(t)-εHf(t) binary mixing models and trace element metasomatic simulations suggest the mafic-intermediate enclaves originated from partial melting of a mantle wedge was metasomatized by 5−20 wt% melts derived from the anatexis of felsic gneisses. Combined with field structural relationships, we propose a diapiric exhumation mechanism for the HP-UHP felsic terranes in the eastern SAT. This process involved (1) distinct partial melting of felsic gneisses triggered by heat transfer from the mantle wedge, (2) mantle contamination by felsic gneiss-derived melts, (3) incorporation of both granitic materials (felsic gneisses and granitic melts) and mafic-intermediate melts derived from metasomatized mantle, and (4) diapiric ascent and final emplacement of the monzogranite, which transported entrained felsic gneisses and mafic-intermediate enclaves within the southern margin of the upper plate.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 地壳-地幔混合岩浆作用揭示深俯冲大陆地壳的穿幔底辟折返：以中国西北阿尔金山超高压地体为例

summary_bullets.research_question: 厘清深俯冲大陆地壳如何经地幔楔底辟折返并引发壳幔杂交岩浆作用。
summary_bullets.methodology: 开展岩相学、锆石U-Pb定年、全岩地球化学与Nd-Hf同位素及混合模拟。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 约480Ma二长花岗岩源于UHP片麻岩熔融，包体来自受5–20%壳熔体交代的地幔楔熔融。
summary_bullets.innovation: 将包体—捕虏体—主体岩浆联动并定量约束壳熔体交代地幔楔，提出底辟折返模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为碰撞造山带UHP地壳折返、壳幔相互作用及花岗质成因提供可检验范式。

works.title: Stable cerium isotope fractionation during basalt-rhyolite magmatic differentiation
works.abstract: Cerium (Ce) is an incompatible and redox-sensitive element, and stable Ce isotopes are emerging geochemical proxies for tracing Earth’s surface redox evolution that is complementary to traditional elemental ratios (e.g., Ce/Ce*). However, the robust application of this proxy requires a fundamental understanding of its behavior during high-temperature processes, which remains poorly constrained. To address this issue, we present Ce isotope compositions for a well-characterized suite of volcanic rocks from Hekla, Iceland, which spans a compositional range from basalt to rhyolite that were considered to have formed via fractional crystallization and/or mixing of cogenetic melts. Twenty-three samples yield a relatively uniform δ 142 Ce ranging from −0.007‰ to 0.070‰, with an average of 0.032 ± 0.045‰ (2 S.D.). The average δ 142 Ce of each lithology is 0.031 ± 0.032‰ for basalt, 0.019 ± 0.035‰ for basaltic andesite, 0.040 ± 0.045‰ for andesite, 0.064 ± 0.011‰ for dacite, and 0.009 ± 0.027‰ for rhyolite, respectively. Although a subtle δ 142 Ce variations in the evolved rocks is observed, the total Ce isotope fractionation (Δ 142 Ce = ∼0.07‰) is barely beyond the current analytical uncertainty, implying that the Ce isotope fractionation during magmatic differentiation at Hekla is limited. This is supported by the strongly incompatible behavior of Ce and near-constant oxygen fugacity throughout the Hekla differentiation sequence, indicating that the crystallizing phases remove only negligible amounts of Ce from the melt and therefore that significant fractionation of Ce isotopes is unlikely. Furthermore, mantle melting degree or melting depth have no effect on the Ce isotopes. Our findings demonstrate that high-temperature igneous processes are unlikely to significantly overprint primary Ce isotope signatures. Consequently, Ce isotopes may provide a robust tracer for investigating deep sediment recycling.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 玄武岩-流纹岩岩浆分异过程中的稳定铈同位素分馏

summary_bullets.research_question: 稳定Ce同位素在高温岩浆分异中是否会明显分馏，从而影响其氧化还原示踪解释？
summary_bullets.methodology: 测定冰岛Hekla玄武岩至流纹岩系列δ142Ce并结合分异、混合与氧逸度约束分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: δ142Ce总体仅变动约0.07‰且近于测量误差，指示岩浆分异导致的Ce同位素分馏极有限。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次在成因明确的全岩浆序列中系统量化Ce同位素分馏并评估氧逸度与不相容性控制。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 表明火成高温过程难以改写Ce同位素初始信号，增强其用于深部沉积回收与红氧演化研究的可靠性。

works.title: The role of magmatic volatile phase exsolution in lithium enrichment in pegmatites: Tourmaline evidence from the Mufushan complex, South China
works.abstract: Over one-third of the global lithium supply is sourced from pegmatites, yet their complex evolution obscures Li mineralization mechanisms. This study investigates the Mufushan granite-pegmatite system (South China) using tourmaline geochemistry and boron isotopic compositions to identify the key processes controlling lithium enrichment. Tightly clustered δ11B values in tourmalines from both granite and pegmatite confirm a common magmatic source. Compared with muscovite granite tourmalines, those from northern Mufushan pegmatites exhibit lower YAl/(YAl + Fe) ratios at the Y site and reduced concentrations of incompatible elements (e.g., Li, Sn), suggesting a less evolved character and derivation from a more primitive melt. Rayleigh modeling indicates that fractional crystallization generally leads to the enrichment of incompatible elements in the melt, yet in the northern Mufushan pegmatites, Li contents increased only to ∼720 ppm in late-stage tourmaline, still far below ore-formation levels, consistent with the absence of Li mineralization in the north. In contrast, tourmalines from southern pegmatites record a decrease in Li contents from 814 ppm in early stages to 42 ppm in late stages, a pattern that cannot be explained by fractional crystallization and is likely related to the exsolution of a magmatic volatile phase (MVP). Coupled Rayleigh modeling of Li and δ11B indicates that after ∼70% fractional crystallization, at least 36% of the melt-derived MVP must have exsolved in the southern pegmatites. The exsolved MVP transported large amounts of Li and other volatile elements, ultimately controlled Li mineralization, and created the observed spatial contrast between Li-rich southern pegmatites and barren northern pegmatites.
works.label: ignore
works.translated_title: 岩浆挥发相出溶在伟晶岩锂富集中的作用：来自华南幕阜山杂岩体的电气石证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 厘清伟晶岩锂富集机制及南北差异成因。
summary_bullets.methodology: 用电气石微量元素与δ11B测定结合瑞利分馏-挥发相模型。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 南部≥36%熔体挥发相析出带走锂致成矿，北部仅分馏难达矿化。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次用电气石Li-δ11B耦合定量约束MVP析出比例。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 揭示挥发相控制锂成矿，为找矿与成因模型提供判据。

works.title: Fe-Mg interdiffusion in olivine and implications for chemical heterogeneity in the upper mantle
works.abstract: The kinetics of Fe-Mg interdiffusion in nominally dry polycrystalline olivine was investigated at 6 GPa and 1373–1673 K using diffusion couples of forsterite (Fo100) and olivine (Fo90) aggregates. Diffusion profiles were measured by electron microprobe, and diffusion data were analyzed by the Boltzmann-Matano method. Our results show that the Fe-Mg interdiffusion coefficient (DFe-Mg) depends on the iron content (with XFe ranging from 0 to 0.1). The temperature dependence of DFe-Mg in olivine can be described by the Arrhenius relation. By combining the present data and a simple model, it is found that the length scale over which the chemical heterogeneities are homogenized by Fe-Mg interdiffusion in the upper mantle is very limited at the geological time scale, only through solid-state diffusion.
works.label: ignore
works.translated_title: 橄榄石中 Fe-Mg 互扩散及其对上地幔化学非均一性的指示意义

summary_bullets.research_question: 量化橄榄石Fe-Mg互扩散并评估上地幔异质性消散尺度。
summary_bullets.methodology: Fo100–Fo90扩散偶实验，探针剖面，Boltzmann-Matano与Arrhenius求D。
summary_bullets.key_findings: DFe-Mg随XFe变化并呈Arrhenius；固态扩散仅能均一化很小尺度。
summary_bullets.innovation: 在干燥多晶橄榄石6GPa下给出成分依赖D并估算地幔均一化长度。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为上地幔混合、分异及化学时标模型提供关键扩散动力学约束。

works.title: Structural and geochronological constraints on Devonian oblique subduction and diachronous Carboniferous closure of the Nenjiang Ocean in the eastern Central Asian Orogenic Belt
works.abstract: Revealing tectonic complexity induced by oblique convergence provides crucial insights into orogenic processes. Although trench-parallel strike-slip shear zones are well-documented, those parallel to the subduction direction in oblique subduction systems remain poorly constrained. We found three deformation episodes (D 1 , D 2 and D 3 ) in the southeastern Xing’an Accretionary Terrane (XAT) documenting the oblique convergence process of the Nenjiang Ocean. Integrated structural analysis, finite strain and kinematic vorticity quantitative calculation, zircon U-Pb and in situ muscovite Rb-Sr geochronological analyses demonstrate the following: D 1 deformation episode (386–360 Ma) was characterized by dextral strike-slip shearing dominated by simple shear under plane-strain (L=S tectonites). D 2 deformation episode (349–320 Ma) was governed by NNW-SSE shortening involved pure shear‐dominated under general flattening strain (SL tectonites), transitioning from brittle to ductile deformation with increasing crustal depth. D 3 deformation episode (160–145 Ma) exhibited top-to-the-SW sinistral thrusting and superimposed D 2 deformation. Our findings highlight two previously unrecognized Paleozoic events: (1) Middle-Late Devonian subduction-parallel strike-slip shearing developed during oblique subduction of the Nenjiang Ocean, and (2) Carboniferous contraction responding to diachronous closure of the Nenjiang Ocean. These subduction-parallel strike-slip shear zones, linked to slab rollback velocity gradients, may signify the existence of oblique convergence.
works.label: ignore
works.translated_title: 中亚造山带东部泥盆纪斜向俯冲和石炭纪嫩江洋异时性闭合的构造与年代学制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 约束嫩江洋斜向俯冲与石炭纪阶段性闭合的构造时空过程。
summary_bullets.methodology: 结合构造解析、有限应变与涡度计算、锆石U-Pb及白云母Rb-Sr定年。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 识别D1右行走滑(386–360Ma)、D2挤压缩短(349–320Ma)、D3左行逆冲(160–145Ma)。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次提出泥盆纪俯冲平行走滑与石炭纪闭合的时差性收缩两事件。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为判别斜向汇聚、板片回滚梯度及造山带演化提供关键约束。

works.title: Impacts of microplastics on terrestrial soil carbon dynamics
works.abstract: Growing concerns about plastic pollution and climate change worldwide are driving research into the effects of microplastics on carbon cycling. Although the impacts of microplastics on soil organic carbon (SOC) levels and carbon emissions have been demonstrated, their role in SOC sequestration remains understudied. Here we discuss how interactions between microplastics and organic matter may affect SOC sequestration through biological, geochemical and physical processes. Microplastics and co-occurring contaminants alter SOC content and quality by leaching dissolved organic matter (DOM) and affecting native SOC mineralization. These changes may influence the efficacy of the microbial carbon pump and mineral-associated organic carbon formation. Furthermore, microplastic surfaces adsorb DOM for long-term preservation and form hotspots for mineral–organic matter interactions, thereby altering carbon storage within soil aggregates. Consequently, a comprehensive understanding of the role of microplastics in soil carbon dynamics, from local to global scales, is essential to address both microplastic pollution and carbon neutrality. Microplastics impact terrestrial soil carbon dynamics, altering carbon storage, according to a synthesis of studies of microplastics and soil carbon cycling.
works.label: ignore
works.translated_title: 微塑料对陆地土壤碳动力学的影响

summary_bullets.research_question: 探究微塑料如何影响土壤有机碳循环与固存机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 综合评述既有研究，归纳生物、地球化学与物理过程证据。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 微塑料通过DOM淋滤、吸附与团聚体作用改变SOC质量、矿化与储存。
summary_bullets.innovation: 提出微塑料作为DOM保存与矿物-有机作用热点，重构SOC固存框架。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为评估微塑料污染对碳中和与土壤碳库管理提供机制依据。

works.title: Hydrothermal Nb mineralization during fenitization in the carbonatite system: Evidence from the Bayan Obo REE-Nb deposit, China
works.abstract: Most global niobium (Nb) resources are associated with carbonatite systems and are commonly interpreted as magmatic in origin, with Nb hosted mainly by pyrochlore [(Na,Ca) 2 Nb 2 O 6 F] crystallized from carbonatitic melts. However, in parts of the giant Bayan Obo REE–Nb deposit, Nb occurs predominantly as columbite [FeNb 2 O 6 ] within fenite rather than carbonatite, implying an underappreciated hydrothermal style of Nb mineralization. This study integrates mineralogical observations, geochemical analyses, and hydrothermal experiments to investigate the origin of the fenite-hosted Nb ores and to advance our understanding of Nb enrichment behavior in carbonatite-related systems. The Nb-rich fenite (up to 8216 ppm Nb) mainly contains biotite, accompanied by subordinate columbite, calcite, barite, monazite, bastnäsite, and pyrite. It is enriched in fluid-mobile elements (e.g., Rb up to 297 ppm, Ba up to 17,552 ppm, and S up to 13.35 wt% as SO 3 ), indicating its formation through intensive interaction between carbonatite-derived fluids and silicate wall rocks. Biotite Ti thermometry suggests a high temperature (> 600 °C) of fenitizing fluids. The mineral assemblages indicate that these fluids were enriched in K + and CO 3 2– , with subordinate F − . Based on these physicochemical constraints, hydrothermal diamond anvil cell (HDAC) experiments were conducted, and demonstrate that columbite can be effectively dissolved in K + –CO 3 2– –F - -bearing fluids at temperatures of ∼ 400–∼600 °C. In general, this study shows that carbonatite-related Nb mineralization can extend beyond the purely magmatic stage into a high-temperature hydrothermal stage, highlighting the exploration potential of fenite-hosted hydrothermal Nb resources.

works.translated_title: 碳酸岩系统交代岩化过程中水热 Nb 成矿作用：来自中国白云鄂博 REE-Nb 矿床的证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 阐明白云鄂博霓长岩中铌成矿是否为高温热液过程及其机制
summary_bullets.methodology: 矿物学与地球化学分析、黑云母Ti温度计及HDAC溶解实验
summary_bullets.key_findings: 碳酸岩流体高温交代形成富铌霓长岩，K-CO3-F流体可溶解并沉淀铌铁矿
summary_bullets.innovation: 实验证实400–600°C热液可迁移铌，突破铌仅岩浆成因的传统认识
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 完善碳酸岩铌富集模型，提升霓长岩型热液铌资源勘查潜力

works.title: The Compositions of Planetary Cores
works.abstract: Understanding the composition of metallic cores in planetary bodies is crucial for unraveling planetary formation, differentiation, and evolution. On Earth, early seismic and density data suggested iron-dominated interiors alloyed with lighter elements such as sulfur, silicon, oxygen, carbon, hydrogen, and nitrogen. These elements influence core density, thermal conductivity, magnetic field generation, and surface habitability, and their incorporation depends on each planet's unique pressure, temperature, and redox conditions during differentiation. Experimental investigations of metal-silicate partitioning under extreme conditions show that many light elements are strongly siderophile at high pressures, contributing to the diversity of core compositions across the Solar System and beyond. This review synthesizes current knowledge on core compositions beyond Earth—spanning asteroids to exoplanets—and explores how laboratory experiments, cosmochemical evidence, and astrophysical observations collectivelyinform our understanding of core formation. By decoding core compositions, studies can better constrain the thermal histories and potential habitability of planetary bodies. ▪ Planetary core compositions reveal how planets form, differentiate, and evolve, shaping the density, heat flow, magnetic fields, and habitability of a planet. ▪ Experiments, cosmochemical abundances, and theoretical calculations explain the light element compositions of planetary cores from asteroids to exoplanets.
works.venue: Annual Review of Earth and Planetary Sciences
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 行星核的组成

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在理解行星金属核的组成，及其如何揭示行星形成、分异和演化过程。
summary_bullets.methodology: 该综述综合了实验室实验、宇宙化学证据和天体物理观测的现有知识。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 行星核中轻元素（如S, Si, O, C, H, N）的组成至关重要，它们影响密度、热流、磁场和宜居性，并取决于行星的独特条件。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本文创新性地综合了实验室实验、宇宙化学和天体物理观测，全面理解从小行星到系外行星的广泛行星核组成。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 这项研究通过解码核心组成，有助于更好地限制行星的热历史、磁场生成和潜在宜居性，对行星演化研究至关重要。

works.title: Genesis of the Zhamuqin Pb−Zn−Ag polymetallic deposit in the middle-southern Great Xing’an Range, NE China: constraints from H−O−S−Pb isotope geochemistry and geochronology
works.abstract: The Zhamuqin Pb−Zn−Ag deposit, situated in the Horqin Right Middle Banner of Inner Mongolia, is a recently discovered large-scale polymetallic deposit in the central-southern segment of the Great Xing’an Range. The orebodies occur mainly as veins, stratiform layers, and lenticular bodies within the intermediate-acidic volcanic rocks of the Baiyingaolao Formation. Four main stages of mineralization have been identified based on ore textures, structures, mineral paragenesis, and cross-cutting relationships: an arsenopyrite-pyrite stage, a Pb−Zn sulphide stage, a silver mineral stage, and a quartz-carbonate stage. Zircon U−Pb dating of rhyolites from the Baiyingaolao Formation yields an age of 134.2 ± 1.0 Ma. This indicates that the deposit formed during the Early Cretaceous, which is consistent with the regional metallogenic episode of Pb−Zn−Ag polymetallic deposits in the southern Great Xing’an Range. The volcanic rocks belong to the peraluminous calc-alkaline series, being geochemically characterized by enrichment in light rare earth elements (LREE/HREE = 8.7–11.3) and pronounced negative Eu anomalies (δEu = 0.39–0.60). This suggests that they were derived from the partial melting of crustal materials in a post-orogenic extensional tectonic setting. Hydrogen and oxygen isotope analyses of quartz yield δD values ranging from −137‰ to −97‰ and δ 18 O water values ranging from −12.6‰ to 6.6‰, indicating that the ore-forming fluids were primarily a mixture of magmatic water and meteoric water. Sulphur isotope compositions of sulphides (δ 34 S = 2.3‰–5.7‰) support a magmatic-hydrothermal origin for sulphur, whereas lead isotope data point to a mixed crust – mantle source for the ore-forming metals. Mineralization at Zhamuqin is closely associated with Early Cretaceous volcanic-magmatic activity. Its H−O−S−Pb isotopic signatures align well with those of other magmatic-related deposits in the Great Xing’an Range. By integrating the metallogenic setting, geochronology, and geochemical data, the Zhamuqin deposit is classified as an epithermal Pb−Zn−Ag polymetallic deposit.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中国东北大兴安岭中南部扎木钦铅锌银多金属矿床的成因：氢氧硫铅同位素地球化学和年代学制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在阐明大兴安岭扎木钦铅锌银多金属矿床的成因及其形成机制。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用锆石U-Pb测年、H-O-S-Pb同位素和火山岩地球化学分析，约束矿床成因。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 矿床形成于早白垩世，流体为岩浆水与大气水混合，硫源岩浆热液，金属源壳幔混合，属浅成低温铅锌银矿床。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次对新发现的大型扎木钦铅锌银矿床进行系统年代学和多同位素地球化学研究。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为大兴安岭地区铅锌银多金属矿床的区域成矿规律和成因类型研究提供了新认识。

works.title: Mantle plume activity in the Mirovoi ocean: evidence from accreted oceanic slices in North Wales
works.abstract: The composition of the Earth's mantle is influenced by plate tectonic processes, and one of the ways to study the geochemical evolution of the mantle and test plate tectonic and geodynamic models is to investigate the composition of ancient mantle-derived rocks. In this work, we study the Neoproterozoic oceanic basalts that occur as fragments in an olistostromal mélange in the Llŷn Peninsula of North Wales. Based on field, petrographic, and geochemical evidence, we argue that these rocks represent pieces of seamounts. Petrogenetic modelling shows that the basalts can be linked to the same source, with geochemical variations being explained by intraplate plume-related melting under variably thickened lithosphere and differing degrees of fractional crystallisation. The Nd–Hf isotopic data indicate a depleted mantle source, with mean ε Nd(t) and ε Hf(t) of 7.0 and 9.4, respectively. The depleted Nd and Hf signatures associated with elevated Pb isotopic ratios suggests that the mantle source tapped by this plume was dominated by a component similar to modern-day PREMA. Monte Carlo simulations utilising constraints on the age of accretion to an active margin and lithospheric thickness at the time of plume impingement yield results that show plume activity between 655–590 Ma. The Late Neoproterozoic timing of accretion of these rocks to the active margin might also help explain the exhumation of blueschists in North Wales. Paleogeographic and geochronological constraints show that, rather than being derived from the Iapetus Ocean, the seamounts preserved in North Wales likely originated in the shrinking circum-Rodinia Mirovoi super-ocean. Records of preserved seamounts elsewhere in the world show that Neoproterozoic plume activity must have been common in the Mirovoi ocean. The isotopic characteristics of the plume-related basalts in this study show that the PREMA component was present in the mantle sources of magmatism in the Mirovoi superocean and support the hypothesis of the longevity of this component. This study shows how a multidisciplinary approach integrating geochemistry and plate reconstruction can help tracking mantle evolution in response to plate tectonics.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: Mirovoi洋的地幔柱活动：来自北威尔士增生洋壳碎片的证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在通过研究北威尔士新元古代洋壳玄武岩的组成，揭示米罗沃伊洋地幔柱活动及其地幔源区演化。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用野外、岩石学、地球化学（Nd-Hf-Pb同位素）、岩石成因模型和蒙特卡洛模拟等方法。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 北威尔士玄武岩是米罗沃伊洋海山碎片，源于贫化地幔（类似PREMA），地幔柱活动发生于655-590 Ma。
summary_bullets.innovation: 创新性地结合地球化学和板块重建，揭示了米罗沃伊超洋中PREMA组分的存在及其在地幔演化中的持久性。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为新元古代米罗沃伊洋的地幔柱活动、地幔演化和板块构造提供了新证据，并支持PREMA组分的长期存在。

works.title: Tectonism rather than “snowball Earth” glaciation is responsible for the Great Unconformity
works.abstract: The Great Unconformity (GUn)—a widely recognized discontinuity and associated gap in the rock record between Precambrian and Cambrian rocks—represents a globally important interval of continental exposure and erosion that is notable also for the first appearance of all major animal phyla on Earth. However, its origin remains the subject of vigorous debate. Here, we present field relationships, and zircon and monazite U–Pb, biotite and muscovite Rb–Sr, and zircon (U–Th)/He thermochronology data for Precambrian crystalline basement rocks from North China to constrain the exhumation history below the unconformity. Dates from multichronometers and thermal history inversions show that the most substantial cooling of continental basement took place from ~2,100 to 1,600 Ma. Comparison with thermal history data from Laurentia, Baltica, and Amazonia suggests that protracted plate tectonics broadly modulated by supercontinent cycles, and not “snowball Earth” glaciation, is responsible for crustal exhumation below the unconformity. The most pronounced erosion evident in both the thermochronologic record and geochemical indicators of continental weathering is shown to correspond with development of Earth’s first true supercontinent (Columbia), rather than with either the Cambrian explosion or the emergence of modern plate tectonics.
works.venue: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 构造运动而非“雪球地球”冰期导致大不整合

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在解决大不整合（Great Unconformity, GUn）的成因问题，即前寒武纪和寒武纪岩石之间广泛存在的地层不连续性。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究采用了野外地质关系、锆石和独居石U-Pb、黑云母和白云母Rb-Sr以及锆石(U-Th)/He热年代学数据，分析了华北克拉通前寒武纪基底岩石。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 研究发现，大不整合下的地壳隆升是由超大陆旋回（特别是哥伦比亚超大陆形成）调控的长期板块构造活动造成的，而非“雪球地球”冰期。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本文通过多年代学数据和全球对比，为大不整合的成因提供了新的、基于板块构造的解释，挑战了“雪球地球”假说。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 这项研究为理解地球早期地质演化、超大陆旋回与大陆侵蚀的关系以及寒武纪生命大爆发的背景提供了重要见解。

works.title: Formation of HREE-enriched ion-adsorption ore from LREE-rich granodiorite: a case study from the Meng Khun deposit, Laos
works.abstract: Ion adsorption rare earth elements deposits are the principal global source of heavy rare earth elements (HREEs). The current perception is that HREE deposits are generated from HREE-enriched granitoids, whereas LREE deposits originate from LREE-enriched intermediate-acidic magmatic and metamorphic rocks. However, contrary to the prevailing view that HREE-rich ion-adsorption mineralization requires HREE-enriched parent rocks, this study demonstrates that intensive weathering of LREE- dominated granodiorite (LREE/HREE = 3.1) can yield an HREE ore body. To elucidate this infrequent ore-forming process, geochemical, mineralogical, and REE speciation analyses were conducted on the weathering profile samples from the Meng Khun (MK) deposit, Laos. The results show that the weathering-resistant monazite is strongly enriched in LREEs (LREE/HREE = 11.4), contributes 66.2% of the total REE content and controls the LREE-dominated signature of the parent rock. In contrast, titanite and apatite are relatively enriched in HREEs (LREE/HREE = 0.45 and 0.54, respectively) and more susceptible to weathering, and account for 25.2% of the REE content. Their decomposition provided the source for the formation of the HREE ore body in a LREE-enriched regolith. In addition, Ce³⁺ was oxidized and immobilized as cerianite (CeO₂) through interaction with Fe-Mn oxides and atmospheric oxygen, or selectively complexed by organic matter to form stable complexes, further enhancing HREE proportions—particularly in the ion- exchangeable fraction. HREEs exhibit stronger mobility than LREEs and tend to migrate deeper, resulting in greater accumulations of HREEs at the base of the ore body (LREE/HREE = 0.34 in ion-exchangeable fraction). Simultaneously, carbonate- selective complexation fixed HREE in the deeper layers of the weathering crust rather than their migration outward. This particular mineralization process is collectively controlled by the differential weathering of REE-bearing accessory minerals, Ce immobilization, varied REE mobility, and selective complexation with (bi) carbonates. This study constructs the genetic model of this unconventional HREE-rich ion adsorption ore and broadens the prospecting perspectives of HREE resources.
works.label: ignore
works.translated_title: 富HREE离子吸附型矿床的形成源自富LREE花岗闪长岩：以老挝孟昆矿床为例

summary_bullets.research_question: This study investigates how HREE-rich ion-adsorption ore can form from LREE-dominated granodiorite, challenging prevailing views.
summary_bullets.methodology: Geochemical, mineralogical, and REE speciation analyses were conducted on weathering profile samples from the Meng Khun deposit.
summary_bullets.key_findings: HREE ore forms from LREE-rich granodiorite via differential weathering of HREE-enriched accessory minerals, Ce immobilization, varied REE mobility, and selective carbonate complexation.
summary_bullets.innovation: The study constructs a genetic model for unconventional HREE-rich ion adsorption ore derived from LREE-dominated parent rocks.
summary_bullets.relevance_note: This research broadens prospecting perspectives for HREE resources by identifying a new, unconventional ore-forming mechanism.

works.title: Dolocrete blanket over Mt Weld carbonatite (Western Australia) - A geochemical and mineralogical window to REE super-resource
works.abstract: The geochemistry and mineralogy of REE and Nb were examined in lens-shaped dolocrete covering the central part of the (REE, Nb)-rich regolith derived from the Mount Weld carbonatite, Western Australia. Dolocrete was divided into three distinct units: (a) Upper White Dolocrete (UWD), comprising dolomite interwoven by palygorskite and traces of quartz, florencite-Ce, Ti-oxides, monazite-Ce; (b) Middle Pisolite Dolocrete (MPD) containing dolomite matrix with nodules of Nb-goethite, allogenic quartz, monazite-Ce, florencite-Ce, and cerianite; (c) Basal Breccia Dolocrete (BBD) comprising massive dolomite hosting monazite-Ce, florencite-Ce, and ironstone clasts containing Nb-goethite, Nb-ilmenite, Nb-rutile, quartz, baddeleyite, and zircon. The whole-rock analysis revealed an increase in (La/Yb) N with depth from UWD at 74, 247 in MPD, to 723 in BBD. The concentrations of REE in dolomite (Ca/Mg=1–1.2) increased from 66 ppm (median) in UWD, 281 ppm in MPD, to 347 ppm in BBD. Niobium-bearing ilmenite was altered to Nb-leucoxene (max. 18 wt.% Nb 2 O 5 ). Incorporation of Nb into goethite (0.1–1.4 wt.%) and the absence of pyrochlore suggest Nb migration during the dolocrete formation. Stable isotope values ( δ 18 O VPDB = −2.9‰ – −0.6‰, δ 13 C VPDB = −6.7‰ – −5.9‰) support a sedimentary origin of dolomite formed in saline groundwaters. A fluctuating water table in a semi-arid environment promoted dissolution and reprecipitation of REE-enriched dolomite with Mg most likely derived from carbonatite. These results reveal a complex evolution of REE and Nb during the weathering of metal-enriched regolith, underscoring the importance of dolocrete as a geochemical archive and a tool for exploration targeting ore deposits of critical minerals.
works.label: ignore
works.translated_title: 覆盖在西澳大利亚Mt Weld碳酸岩之上的白云质钙结壳盖层——揭示稀土超大型资源的地球化学和矿物学窗口

summary_bullets.research_question: The paper investigates the geochemistry and mineralogy of REE and Nb within the dolocrete overlying the Mt Weld carbonatite regolith.
summary_bullets.methodology: The study utilized whole-rock geochemical analysis, detailed mineralogical characterization of dolocrete units, and stable isotope analysis (δ18O, δ13C) to understand REE/Nb distribution and origin.
summary_bullets.key_findings: Key findings include distinct dolocrete units with increasing REE and (La/Yb)N with depth, Nb migration into goethite/leucoxene, and a sedimentary origin for dolomite from saline groundwaters.
summary_bullets.innovation: The study offers a novel, detailed geochemical and mineralogical window into the complex evolution of REE and Nb during weathering processes within dolocrete at a super-resource site.
summary_bullets.relevance_note: This research is valuable for understanding critical mineral formation, utilizing dolocrete as a geochemical archive, and guiding exploration targeting REE and Nb ore deposits.

works.title: Arc magma formation through the fluid-fluxed mélange melting in subduction zones
works.abstract: The transport of subducted slab materials to the overlying mantle plays a crucial role in arc magma formation. However, the contributions of aqueous fluids, hydrous melts, or mélange to the convective mantle remain controversial due to the lack of definitive fingerprints for these materials. Here, we report the Ba isotope composition of lavas from a typical cold-slab arc, the Izu arc, to resolve the recycled materials in the source of arc magmas. δ138/134Ba of the arc lavas show an across-arc decrease corresponding to increasing depth and positively correlates with both 87Sr/86Sr and 143Nd/144Nd. Across-arc variations of both δ138/134Ba and Ba/Th ratios support that high Ba/Th in the Izu and other arc magmas originated from slab-derived fluids rather than melts. Quantitative mixing modeling, involving contributions from mélange followed by slab-derived fluids in successive stages, provides a coherent explanation for Ba-Sr-Nd isotopic signatures observed in lavas from cold arcs. Our work reveals the combined role of slab-derived fluids and mélange diapir melting in arc magma formation. Barium isotope variations in the Izu arc lavas reveal the combined role of slab-derived fluids and mélange diapir melting in arc magma formation.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 俯冲带流体助熔混杂岩熔融作用下的弧岩浆形成

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在解决俯冲带弧岩浆源区中流体、熔体或混杂岩等再循环物质的贡献这一争议性问题。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究通过分析伊豆弧火山岩的Ba同位素组成，并结合Sr-Nd同位素数据进行定量混合模型计算。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 伊豆弧岩浆的Ba同位素变化揭示了板片来源流体和混杂岩底辟熔融共同作用于弧岩浆形成。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次利用Ba同位素结合Sr-Nd同位素和定量混合模型，揭示了冷俯冲带弧岩浆形成中流体和混杂岩的贡献。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 这项研究为理解俯冲带弧岩浆形成机制中再循环物质的贡献提供了关键证据和新的示踪剂。

works.title: Defining the main Paleo-Tethys suture in Tibet: First Permian paleomagnetic insights from the Eastern Kunlun Range
works.abstract: The location and timing of the final closure of the main Paleo-Tethys Ocean remain debated, particularly in central Tibet, where multiple suture zones have been proposed as remnants of this main oceanic basin. Here we present new zircon U-Pb geochronology and the first high-quality Late Permian paleomagnetic data from volcaniclastic rocks of the Eastern Kunlun Range, Northern Tibet. Six dated tuff samples yield emplacement ages of ca . 265–251 Ma, thus constraining the depositional age of the studied strata. Characteristic remanent magnetizations of 39 sites pass fold, reversal, and baked contact tests, indicating preservation of a primary magnetization. The tilt-corrected site-mean direction yields a paleolatitude of 27.4° ± 3.1°N at 36.1°N, 94.9°E. When combined with coeval paleomagnetic data from the Eastern Qiangtang blocks, these results imply that the Jinsha suture was the remnant of the principal Paleo-Tethys Ocean, which had a latitudinal width of ∼3,700 km during the Late Permian. The progressive convergence between the Eastern Qiangtang and Eastern Kunlun–Qaidam continent from ∼251 to 225 Ma is followed by a decline in northward plate motion, with paleolatitudinal overlap by the Late Triassic. This timing is corroborated by geological evidence including ophiolite ages, high-pressure metamorphism, magmatism, and foreland basin sedimentation. These findings provide critical paleogeographic constraints for understanding the tectonic assembly of the Tibetan Plateau and the geodynamic evolution of the Paleo-Tethyan realm.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 界定青藏高原主要古特提斯缝合带：来自东昆仑山脉的首次二叠纪古地磁学证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在确定古特提斯洋主缝合带在西藏的位置和最终闭合时间。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究采用了锆石U-Pb年代学和来自火山碎屑岩的晚二叠世高质量古地磁数据。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 金沙缝合带是古特提斯洋主残余，晚二叠世宽约3700公里，东羌塘与东昆仑-柴达木在251-225 Ma间持续汇聚。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次提供了藏北东昆仑山晚二叠世火山碎屑岩的高质量古地磁数据。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 本研究为理解青藏高原构造演化和古特提斯域地球动力学提供了关键古地理约束。

works.title: Petrogenesis and tectonic regime transition of Late Palaeozoic to Early Mesozoic multiphase alkaline rocks in Central Jilin Province, NE China
works.abstract: The Central Jilin region located within the tectonic belt between the eastern Central Asian Orogenic Belt (CAOB) and the northern North China Craton (NCC), records multiple stages of tectonic overprinting by Palaeo-Asian Ocean and Palaeo-Pacific systems, which generated abundant alkaline rocks. Despite significant progress, two main issues remain unresolved: (1) the petrogenetic mechanisms and magma source characteristics of alkaline rocks, and (2) the controversial timing of the tectonic transition from Palaeo-Asian Ocean closure to Palaeo-Pacific Ocean subduction. This study analyzes nine Late Palaeozoic-Early Mesozoic alkaline granites through zircon U-Pb dating, whole-rock geochemistry, and Hf isotopes. LA-ICP-MS dating identifies three emplacement phases: Permian (261.0–251.6 Ma), Middle Triassic (245.4–237.0 Ma), and Middle Jurassic (174.0 Ma). Geochemical data confirm that all samples are A-type granites or adakite, with εHf(t) values ranging from −1.91 to +9.82, indicating they originated from Meso-Neoproterozoic mafic, thickened lower crust through partial melting under high-temperature ( > 650°C), high fO 2 (ΔFMQ = −0.56 to +4.83), and low-H 2 O (average 2.91 wt%) conditions. Permian intrusions formed in a Palaeo-Asian Ocean subduction-related back-arc extensional setting, while Middle Triassic intrusions reflect a tectonic transition where early-stage rocks (245.4–261.3 Ma) exhibit extensional features, but terminal-phase intrusions (around 237 Ma) show signs of compressional collisional orogeny, marking the onset of orogenic collision. By integrating regional high-pressure metamorphism and sedimentary hiatuses, this study constrains the final closure of the Palaeo-Asian Ocean in the Central Jilin to the Middle Triassic. Notably, the Middle Jurassic back-arc affinity (174.0 Ma) confirms significant influence from Palaeo-Pacific Plate subduction by the Early Jurassic, demonstrating the initiation of Palaeo-Pacific Plate subduction during this period.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中国东北吉林中部晚古生代至早中生代多期碱性岩的岩石成因与构造体制转换

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在解决碱性岩浆成因机制、源区特征以及古亚洲洋闭合至古太平洋俯冲构造转换时机争议。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用锆石U-Pb定年、全岩地球化学和Hf同位素分析，研究晚古生代-早中生代碱性花岗岩。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 碱性岩源于中-新元古代加厚下地壳部分熔融；确定了古亚洲洋中三叠世闭合及古太平洋俯冲始于早侏罗世。
summary_bullets.innovation: 精确限定了吉林中部古亚洲洋最终闭合和古太平洋俯冲启动的具体时间，解决了长期存在的构造转换争议。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 为理解中吉林地区晚古生代-早中生代碱性岩成因和区域构造演化提供了关键证据和时间框架。

works.title: Rapid revegetation after the Wenchuan earthquake offsets landslide-induced carbon losses
works.abstract: Abstract Large earthquakes in mountainous regions trigger extensive landslides, which mobilize organic carbon via soil erosion and vegetation loss, disrupting carbon reservoirs and influencing CO 2 levels. Quantifying earthquake impacts on carbon stock and cycling remains challenging. Here, we use field organic carbon data from 91 quadrats and over 20 years of remote sensing imagery to assess the impact of landslides from the 2008 M w 7.9 Wenchuan earthquake on the carbon budget. We show that these landslides removed 2.72 ± 0.52 Tg of organic carbon in the upper Min Jiang. While its oxidation releases CO 2 , rapid revegetation offsets this, making the earthquake a net carbon sink. Time-series data indicate that vegetation carbon stocks will recover to 50% of pre-earthquake levels in 74 ± 5 years, whereas soil organic carbon recovery to 50% may take 500–850 years. This study highlights the decadal to centennial-scale impact of extreme events on carbon cycling.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 汶川地震后快速植被恢复抵消滑坡导致的碳损失

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在量化汶川地震滑坡对区域碳储量和碳循环的影响，以解决地震对碳预算评估的挑战。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究采用了91个样方的野外有机碳数据和20多年的遥感影像，评估汶川地震滑坡对碳预算的影响。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 汶川地震滑坡移除了2.72 ± 0.52 Tg有机碳，但快速植被恢复使其成为净碳汇；植被碳恢复至50%需约74年，土壤有机碳恢复则需500-850年。
summary_bullets.innovation: 研究首次量化了大型地震滑坡对区域碳预算的长期影响，并揭示了其作为净碳汇的潜在作用。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究揭示了极端事件对碳循环的年代际至世纪尺度的影响，为理解自然灾害的生态效应提供了新视角。

works.title: Unveiling the hotspot-driven magmatic plumbing system of the Center track, Walvis Ridge (South Atlantic Ocean): Insights from mineral geochemistry and isotopic heterogeneity in basalts from IODP Expedition 391
works.abstract: The Tristan-Gough-Walvis Ridge volcanic chain, located in the South Atlantic Ocean on the African plate, is one of Earth’s longest linear seafloor features. However, the origin of its magmatism remains poorly understood. To better understand its formation, temporal evolution, and geochemical characteristics, six sites were drilled along the Tristan-Gough-Walvis Ridge chain by International Ocean Discovery Program (IODP) Expeditions 391 and 397T: three sites on Valdivia Bank (U1575, U1576, and U1577) and three sites in the Guyot Province (U1578, U1584, and U1585). Among these, Site U1578, located on the deep northwestern flank of a “Center track” seamount, represents the deepest basement penetration (>300 m) of both expeditions. According to preliminary geophysical and biostratigraphic constraints, the stratigraphic sections recovered from Site U1578 span >2.0 m.y. of the Paleocene (ca. 64.8−62.3 Ma). Here, we present an integrated study of major and trace element concentrations in minerals, combined with in situ Sr isotopes of plagioclase (Pl) from Site U1578 basalts. Based on the olivine-spinel (Ol-Sp) thermometry and pyMelt modeling, the calculated mantle potential temperature of the Center track is ≥1400 °C, which is ∼50 °C higher than that of mid-ocean-ridge basalts (MORBs), most likely reflecting the influence of a mantle plume. Based on geochemical compositions and crystal textures, we identified three distinct clinopyroxene (Cpx) groups: Group 1 is characterized by high Mg# (>83.4) and elevated Ni (>200 ppm) and Cr (>5000 ppm) contents; Group 2 has intermediate Mg# (76.6−83.4), Ni (100−200 ppm), and Cr (1000−5000 ppm); and Group 3 exhibits low Mg# (<76.6) and depleted Ni (<70 ppm) and Cr (<30 ppm) contents. Multiple episodes of magma recharge and mixing in the plumbing system beneath the Center track produced a diversity of mineral textures, including normal, reverse, sector, and oscillatory zoning. Additionally, Pl from this site is isotopically heterogeneous (87Sr/86Sr of 0.7038 ± 0.0001 to 0.7046 ± 0.0001) and broadly similar to basalts from the northern Tristan track in the Guyot Province. A shift to more radiogenic Sr isotopic signatures from the lower to the upper igneous units suggests the increasing incorporation of radiogenic materials into the mantle source with time, potentially derived from enriched mantle typically associated with basalts of the southern Gough track. These findings indicate that basaltic lavas from the Center track originate from an anomalously hot and geochemically enriched mantle source associated with a mantle plume or hotspot activity. Diverse mineral textures and chemistry record complex fractional crystallization and mixing processes during magma storage prior to eruption.
works.label: ignore
works.translated_title: 揭示南大西洋鲸湾海岭中部轨迹热点驱动的岩浆补给系统：来自IODP 391航次玄武岩矿物地球化学和同位素异质性的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在阐明Walvis Ridge中心轨迹岩浆作用的起源、形成、演化和地球化学特征。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用矿物主量和微量元素、斜长石原位Sr同位素、橄榄石-尖晶石地质温度计和pyMelt模型进行综合分析。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现中心轨迹地幔潜在温度异常高（≥1400°C），存在三种辉石群，斜长石Sr同位素不均一，表明岩浆源于地幔柱或热点活动。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过矿物地球化学和同位素异质性，详细揭示了Walvis Ridge中心轨迹热点驱动的岩浆补给系统及其地幔源演化。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 本研究为理解大洋热点岩浆作用、地幔柱起源、岩浆房过程及其地球动力学演化提供了关键证据。

works.title: The fate of incipient carbonate melts in the genesis of intraplate basalts
works.abstract: Incipient carbonate melts, formed at the initial stages of volatile-rich melting in the upper mantle, play a critical role in mantle volatile transportation. However, their behavior and fate within the deep mantle remains enigmatic. Here, we report nickel (Ni) isotopic data for the Cenozoic intraplate basalts from eastern China. The two spatially distinct groups of basalts exhibit variably light Ni isotopic compositions relative to the normal mantle value. Their δ 60/58 Ni values correlate well with Ni, Fe 3+ /∑Fe, δ 26/24 Mg, and δ 66/64 Zn values, and evolve along distinct pathways. However, the two groups of basalts share a common endmember component characterized by a carbonated composition and a highly oxidized redox state. Combined with geophysical constraints, these data document two distinct roles for incipient carbonate melts in the petrogenesis of intraplate basalts from eastern China. These melts could either interact with the ambient mantle or mix with lithospheric silicate melts triggered by heat flow perturbations, making them an important ingredient in the composition of global intraplate volcanism.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 初始碳酸盐熔体在板内玄武岩成因中的归宿

summary_bullets.research_question: 探讨地幔深处初始碳酸盐熔体的行为和归宿。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用镍同位素数据结合地球物理约束分析华东新生代板内玄武岩。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 华东玄武岩显示不同的轻镍同位素组成，但共享一个富碳酸盐且高度氧化的端元组分，表明初始碳酸盐熔体有两种作用模式。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次揭示了初始碳酸盐熔体在板内玄武岩成因中的两种不同作用模式。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究有助于理解全球板内火山作用中初始碳酸盐熔体的贡献及其对地幔挥发物输运的影响。

works.title: Lithospheric multilevel structural controls on the genesis of orogenic gold deposits
works.abstract: The formation of large and superlarge mineral deposits results from the accumulation of significant quantities of mineralized materials, driven by multistage geological processes. However, the complete migration pathway of orogenic gold systems—ranging from deep magmatic sources to crustal mineralization—remains elusive. Here, we integrate multiscale electrical resistivity models with lamprophyre isotopic analyses to establish a coherent metallogenic framework for the Daping gold deposit in the southeastern margin of the Tibetan Plateau. High-resolution magnetotelluric data reveal interconnected low-resistivity anomalies, delineating a continuous, translithospheric pathway. These vertically aligned anomalies represent (1) metasomatized mantle domains enriched in volatiles and Au-bearing melts; (2) transcrustal magmatic-hydrothermal channels facilitating melt ascent; and (3) shallow fluid exsolution loci controlling ore precipitation. Geodynamic simulations further suggest that migration efficiency is influenced by the overlying lithospheric structure—specifically, crustal-scale fault networks channel the metal-rich fluids, while rheological contrasts around the lithosphere-asthenosphere boundary regulate the migration pathway of melt. This study, by unveiling the multilevel structural framework for mineralizing fluid migration for the first time, establishes a unified model that structurally connects mantle reservoirs with near-surficial gold deposits and systematically integrates isotopic signature, geophysical evidence, and translithospheric fluid pathways. Recognizing such a multilevel lithospheric control system not only bridges the critical observational gap between mantle sources and surface mineralization but also offers a predictive framework for gold exploration.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 岩石圈多级构造控制对造山型金矿床成因的制约

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在解决金矿系统从深部岩浆源到地壳矿化的完整迁移路径不明的问题。
summary_bullets.methodology: 整合多尺度电阻率模型（大地电磁数据）和煌斑岩同位素分析，以建立金矿成矿框架。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现连续的跨岩石圈低电阻率异常通道，连接交代地幔、地壳通道和浅层流体出溶，其迁移受断裂和流变对比控制。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次揭示了矿化流体迁移的多级结构框架，建立了连接地幔储层与近地表金矿的统一模型。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究弥合了地幔源与地表矿化之间的观测空白，并为金矿勘探提供了预测框架。

works.title: Modern-style cold subduction in the Precambrian: Evidence from H2O and trace elements in detrital rutile
works.abstract: The evolution of plate tectonics and subduction conditions on Earth is widely debated in geosciences. Modern-style cold subduction is characterized by the formation of low-temperature – high-pressure (low-T-high-P) and ultra-high-pressure (UHP) metamorphic mafic rocks from subducted oceanic crust. However, such low-T eclogites and UHP metamorphic rocks are largely absent in the Precambrian geological record, either because such conditions were not reached or because these rocks have been eroded. Rutile is a common metamorphic accessory mineral that can form in subduction zone conditions, is stable during sedimentary cycling and is therefore a target mineral to screen for subduction-related signatures in sediments. Detrital rutile carried by rivers draining cold subduction-related mafic rocks in the Internal Western Alps has a distinct fingerprint, characterized by high H 2 O/Zr ratios and low total Nb+W+Sn contents, which is consistent with a cold subduction-signature. Thus, detrital rutile can be used to evaluate cold subduction signatures in Precambrian sediments. A case study from the Hebridean Terrane, NW Scotland, was employed to search for a potential cold subduction signature prior to the Neoproterozoic. Detrital rutile ages range between 1.9 and 1.0 Ga, and while high Zr-in-rutile temperatures and trace element systematics indicative of other sources are predominant, a few rutile grains have an unequivocal mafic cold subduction signature, indicating local cold subduction in the Paleo- and Mesoproterozoic in East Laurentia.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 前寒武纪的现代型冷俯冲：来自碎屑金红石中H2O和微量元素的证据

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在探讨在前寒武纪地质记录中，是否存在现代式冷俯冲，尽管缺乏低温高压变质岩的直接证据。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过分析碎屑金红石的H2O/Zr比值和Nb+W+Sn含量，将其作为识别前寒武纪冷俯冲的地球化学指纹。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 在前寒武纪碎屑金红石中发现了明确的冷俯冲特征，表明古元古代和中元古代东劳伦大陆存在局部冷俯冲。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次利用碎屑金红石中H2O和微量元素的独特指纹，作为识别前寒武纪现代式冷俯冲的有效代理指标。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为地球板块构造和俯冲带演化这一长期争论的课题提供了新证据和新方法，有助于理解早期地球构造过程。

works.title: Impact of authigenic clay formation on marine trace element cycling
works.abstract: The impact of marine authigenic clay formation on oceanic trace element cycling remains poorly constrained. Here we report a comprehensive trace and major element dataset for authigenic green clays (Fe-smectite and glauconite series). Our results show that these clays are consistently depleted in Cu, Ba, REEs, Nb, Ti and Al compared to detrital precursor phases, suggesting that systematic exclusion during authigenic clay formation provides a source of these elements to seawater via the porewater. Furthermore, authigenic clays inherit both their REE pattern and Nd isotope composition from their detrital precursor, demonstrating that dissolution-reprecipitation processes control porewater REE chemistry. B, Fe, Cs, K, Mg, Rb, Be, Cr, V, Zn, Co, Sc and Ga are consistently enriched in authigenic clays, requiring uptake from porewater. Global flux estimates constrained by these results confirm that clay authigenesis represents an important sink or source term in the oceanic cycles of many more trace elements than previously recognized. Marine authigenic clays are compositionally distinct compared to terrestrially derived detrital clays, such that marine clay formation exerts an important influence on the oceanic cycles of a wide range of elements.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 自生黏土形成对海洋微量元素循环的影响

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在阐明海洋自生粘土形成对海洋微量元素循环的影响，此前该影响知之甚少。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究人员报告了自生绿泥石（铁蒙脱石和海绿石系列）的全面微量和主要元素数据集。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 自生粘土在Cu、Ba、REEs等元素上贫化并作为来源，而在B、Fe、Cs等元素上富集并作为汇，且继承了前体REE模式和Nd同位素。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本研究首次通过全面的元素数据集揭示了自生粘土对更多微量元素循环的重要汇或源作用，超越了以往认知。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 这项研究为理解海洋微量元素生物地球化学循环提供了关键见解，对海洋地球化学和古海洋学领域具有重要价值。

works.title: A Study of Orogenic Processes: The Tectonic Evolution of the Eastern Central Asian Orogenic Belt
works.abstract: Abstract The Great Xing'an Range (GXR) is a critical contentious region within the eastern Central Asian Orogenic Belt (CAOB), recording complex interactions among the Paleo‐Asian, Mongol‐Okhotsk, and Paleo‐Pacific Oceans since the Paleozoic. The well‐exposed metamorphic and deformed rocks in Keluo Complex (KC) provide important information for its evolutionary history. Our comprehensive analysis reveals a distinct NE‐SW trending zonation of the KC, with significant tectonic activity. These rocks feature ductile shear slip deformation and plastic deformation in minerals like quartz and feldspar, characterized by right‐lateral shearing as the core kinematic signature. EBSD quartz C‐axis fabrics indicate deformation temperatures of 500–600°C (prismatic a > slip) and 300–400°C (rhomb a > slip), recording multiple phases of deformation. Zircon U‐Pb dating yields Late Paleozoic protolith ages, while biotite 40 Ar/ 39 Ar dating (133.9 ± 1.34 Ma) constrains the timing of the deformation‐related cooling event in the Early Cretaceous. Combined with regional data, we demonstrate that the uplift of the GXR was primarily controlled by crustal extension triggered by the closure of the Mongol‐Okhotsk Ocean, with subsequent overprinting by the subduction rollback of the Paleo‐Pacific Ocean. The newly constructed tectonic model provides key constraints on multi‐ocean tectonic transition and orogenic mechanisms in the eastern CAOB.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 造山过程研究：东部中亚造山带的构造演化

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在揭示东亚造山带（CAOB）大兴安岭（GXR）的构造演化和造山机制，特别是其与古亚洲、蒙俄和古太平洋洋的复杂相互作用。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究采用对变质变形岩石的综合分析、EBSD石英C轴组构分析、锆石U-Pb定年和黑云母40Ar/39Ar定年等方法。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 研究发现克罗杂岩体呈NE-SW向分区，具有右旋剪切变形和多期变形（300-600°C），晚古生代原岩年龄和早白垩世冷却事件，大兴安岭隆升受蒙俄洋闭合和古太平洋俯冲回撤控制。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本文构建了东亚造山带（CAOB）新的构造模型，为多洋构造转换和造山机制提供了关键约束。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究提出的新构造模型为理解东亚造山带（CAOB）关键区域的多洋构造转换和造山机制提供了重要见解。

works.title: Osmium and lead isotope insights into the magmatic evolution and mantle source characteristics of the Laacher See Tephra, Germany
works.abstract: Owing to the chalcophile nature of Os, its low abundances in highly differentiated magmas, the Os isotopes in recently erupted alkaline lavas can potentially reveal complex magmatic processes. In comparison, high concentrations of Pb in alkaline lavas make them relatively immune to continental crustal contamination and can help constrain mantle source(s). We report Os- and Pb -isotopes for the phonolitic Laacher See Tephra (LST), a tephrite and a basanite, which has been interpreted to be akin to the parental melt of Laacher See magma. The Os concentrations of LST vary from 1.3 pg/g to 24 pg/g with 187 Os/ 188 Os ratios ranging from 0.328 to 0.538 and displaying no clear relationship between the three stages of the LST eruption. In comparison, the Pb-isotope ratios are quite uniform across the three stages (average 206 Pb/ 204 Pb = 18.993 ± 0.015, n = 9). A single sample of phonolite mixed with more primitive melt and coming from the deepest level of the LST plumbing system, shows somewhat less radiogenic 187 Os/ 188 Os (= 0.295) and 206 Pb/ 204 Pb (=18.962) ratios. However, Os entombed within the silicates and recovered through HF-HBr digestion of three different aliquots of basanite exhibit highly variable 187 Os/ 188 Os ratios (= 0.210, 0.306, and 0.521) that span the entire range of LST, likely reflecting mixing between evolved melts and more mafic basanitic recharge. Linear regression of these aliquots in 1/Os- 187 Os/ 188 Os space gives a 187 Os/ 188 Os ratio of parental melt to be 0.131± 0.035 (2SE). The estimated κ ¯ Pb " role="presentation"> κ ¯ Pb κ ¯ Pb for the LST along with other lavas from East Eifel Volcanic Field is 4.02 ± 0.01 (n = 34). We conclude that the LST magmatism resulted from melting of EM-II type enriched mantle and that even the most pristine basanite melts were contaminated with respect to the Os-isotope composition during transport from source to surface. This study showcases our sequential dissolution procedure, which allows a full exploration of Os depleted lavas.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 锇和铅同位素揭示德国 Laacher See Tephra 的岩浆演化和地幔源区特征

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文利用Os和Pb同位素研究德国拉赫湖火山灰（LST）的岩浆演化和地幔源区特征。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究对LST、粗面玄武岩和碱性玄武岩样品进行了Os和Pb同位素分析，并采用了Os的顺序溶解程序。
summary_bullets.key_findings: LST的Os同位素变化大，Pb同位素均匀；原始岩浆Os比值为0.131±0.035；LST岩浆源于EM-II型富集地幔，且在运移中被Os同位素污染。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本文展示了一种顺序溶解程序，能够全面探索Os贫乏的熔岩，是其方法学创新。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 本研究利用Os和Pb同位素，为理解复杂的岩浆过程、地幔源区特征和地壳混染提供了重要见解。

works.title: Stress pinch points from glacial loading modulate magma ascent and storage in continental arcs
works.abstract: Growing evidence indicates that glacial cycles influence volcanic activity, yet the physical mechanisms linking glaciation to magmatic processes in continental arcs remain unclear. We integrate realistic ice and topographic loads with a dike model to evaluate how glaciation modulated magma ascent beneath Mocho-Choshuenco, Chile, during the Last Glacial Maximum (LGM). Ice loading generates a crustal stress “pinch point” that causes dikes rising from lower-crustal reservoirs to stall deeper than under ice-free conditions, effectively shutting off recharge to shallow magma reservoirs. This mechanism explains the ~2-3 km increase in magma storage depth and reduced eruption rates during the LGM without invoking changes in mantle melt supply or reservoir strength. Shutting off recharge also favors magma differentiation, setting the stage for more explosive silicic eruptions during deglaciation once recharge resumes. We identify a parsimonious explanation for glacially-driven shifts in magma composition, storage depth, and eruption rate at Mocho-Choshuenco and arc volcanoes worldwide. Glacial cycles can modulate volcanism. Using models of magma transport under ice loading, this study shows that ice sheets can stall rising magma at depth, suppressing eruptions and promoting magma evolution until deglaciation resumes activity.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 冰川载荷引起的应力集中点调控大陆弧中岩浆的上升和储存

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在阐明冰川作用如何通过物理机制影响大陆弧岩浆活动，尤其是在岩浆上升和储存方面。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究整合了真实的冰盖和地形载荷与岩脉模型，以评估冰川作用对岩浆上升的影响。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 冰盖载荷产生地壳应力“挤压点”，使岩浆岩脉在比无冰条件下更深处停滞，从而增加岩浆储存深度、减少喷发率并促进岩浆分异。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本文提出了一个简洁的物理机制，解释了冰川作用如何驱动岩浆成分、储存深度和喷发速率的变化。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 这项研究为理解冰川周期如何调节火山活动提供了新的物理机制，对全球弧形火山研究具有重要价值。

works.title: Archean tectonics resembled modern-style plate tectonics? Pre-Columbia early plate tectonics in the São Francisco-Congo Craton
works.abstract: The geological record is known to be biased, especially for records of high- to ultra-high-pressure metamorphic rocks, which are key components for understanding one of the most fundamental questions of geoscience: how, when, and why did plate tectonics initiate on Earth? Detrital minerals can serve as proxies for tectonic and metamorphic processes, and their use help mitigate preservation bias in the geological record. Since rutile only crystallizes under pressure above 08 – 1.0 GPa, the study of detrital rutile, through the combination of trace elements, Zr-in-rutile thermometry, and U-Pb geochronology, can be used as a proxy for low temperature-pressure ( T/P ) metamorphic conditions through geological time. We combine new detrital rutile data from São Francisco-Congo Craton Mesoproterozoic sedimentary rocks with literature compilation to investigate T/P conditions through time and address plate tectonics evolution. Our data reveal: (i) the presence of low temperature rutile, and therefore, low T/P conditions since at least the early Archean, coexisting with intermediate T/P conditions; (ii) diversity of T/P conditions increasing from 2.1 – 1.8 Ga during the Columbia early assembly phase, and again after 0.7 Ga; (iii) average T/P conditions exhibiting marked changes through time, with lower T/P dominant in the Archean and the mid-Proterozoic. Intriguingly, this pattern stands in contrast to the higher T/P conditions determined for the mid-Proterozoic from the metamorphic bedrock record. These observations indicate that both the rutile and bedrock records are likely affected by preservation and erosional biases in different ways and should not be interpreted in isolation. The presence of low T/P since the Mesoarchean points to the presence of a tectonic regime involving low thermal gradients, most easily explained by some form of subduction.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 太古宙构造类似于现代型板块构造吗？圣弗朗西斯科-刚果克拉通的前哥伦比亚期早期板块构造

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在探讨地球板块构造何时、如何以及为何起源，以及太古宙构造是否类似于现代板块构造。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过对圣弗朗西斯科-刚果克拉通碎屑金红石进行微量元素、Zr-in-rutile测温和U-Pb定年分析，推断地质时期的T/P条件。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 发现早太古宙以来存在低T/P条件，T/P多样性在2.1-1.8 Ga和0.7 Ga后增加，太古宙和中元古代以较低T/P为主，与基岩记录形成对比。
summary_bullets.innovation: 创新性地利用碎屑金红石克服地质记录保存偏差，揭示了与传统基岩记录不同的早期地球构造演化模式。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为板块构造的起源和演化提供了关键见解，暗示早太古宙存在俯冲作用，并强调了不同地质记录的保存偏差。

works.title: Impact of diagenesis and acidic alteration on microbial fabrics and trace element distributions in fossilised siliceous hot spring deposits
works.abstract: Siliceous hot spring deposits, or sinters, are important targets in the search for evidence of early life on Earth and possibly Mars, as organic material may be preserved with high fidelity by rapid silicification. Despite a high preservation potential in terrestrial environments, sinters undergo numerous physical, mineralogical, and chemical changes over time, leading to alteration and potential destruction of microfossils and other evidence of past life. In the absence of definitive preservation of organics, trace metals have been suggested as potential biosignatures to support inferences of past biological influence in sinters. However, it is unclear how these trace metals are preserved or modified by diagenesis in the ‘deep time’ geologic record. This study utilises optical, scanning electron and synchrotron x-ray fluorescence microscopy, and electron probe microanalysis to investigate the relationship between trace metals and changes in preservation state of microbial fabrics from the Subrecent fossilised Ohakuri hydrothermal system, Taupō Volcanic Zone, New Zealand. Our results show that trace metals record a complex association with variably preserved microbial fabrics, resulting from multiple diagenetic and hydrothermal alteration overprinting events. Gallium exemplifies this complexity, with distinct spatial correlations to primary microbial fabrics, while also being tied to multiple, late-stage overprinting processes, thereby complicating its utility as a biosignature. Overall, our results suggest that Ga may provide new insights into silicification processes in sinter-forming hydrothermal systems. Understanding the behaviour of Ga in these settings aids in unravelling site specific, hydrothermal fluid histories and interpreting silicification processes. Therefore, Ga may potentially play a limited role in the search for past life in Earth’s earliest rocks or in future returned samples from Mars
works.label: ignore
works.translated_title: 成岩作用和酸性蚀变对化石硅质热泉沉积物中微生物组构和微量元素分布的影响

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在探究成岩作用和酸性蚀变如何影响化石硅质热泉沉积物中微量金属的保存及其与微生物结构的关系。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究采用光学、扫描电镜、同步辐射X射线荧光显微镜和电子探针微分析技术。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 微量金属与微生物结构存在复杂关联，受多重成岩和热液蚀变叠加；镓的复杂行为限制了其作为生物标志物的效用。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次详细揭示了成岩和酸性蚀变对热泉沉积物中微量金属与微生物结构保存的影响，并深入分析了镓的复杂行为。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究对理解热泉沉积物中微量金属的生物标志物潜力、硅化过程及地外生命探测具有重要意义。

works.title: Chemical‐Thermomechanical Modeling of Open‐System Mass Transfer: Application to the Subduction Interface
works.abstract: Abstract One of the main limitations in simulating subsolidus metasomatism is the decoupling between thermomechanical models and chemical/thermodynamic modeling. This decoupling amplifies the uncertainty associated with mass transport. Here, we introduce a fluid‐rock chemical‐thermomechanical interaction scheme, which integrates thermodynamic modeling (via the Backcalc algorithm and MAGEMin software) into a 2D thermomechanical code. This approach enables us to track the fate of multicomponent slab‐derived metamorphic fluids and the resultant spatially heterogeneous geochemical signatures at the slab‐mantle interface (SMI). Our modeling results show that slab‐derived nonvolatile element fluxes (i.e., Si, Al, Ca) are predominantly precipitated right above the SMI, forming a highly altered layer where fluid availability and element mobility promote the development of mineral zonation. A similar phenomenon also occurs within mélange zones wherever sharp chemical gradients are present. This indicates that nonvolatile element accumulation is not tied to a specific location, but rather to chemical contrasts, which is consistent with field observations. Additionally, advective transport of solid rock is found to be at least two orders of magnitude more efficient than fluid infiltration in the redistribution of mass from slab to mélange zones, further promoting the chemical complexity of mélange zones. Overall, this new tool offers a promising platform for improving our understanding of the interplay between rock chemistry and mechanics, chemical budgets, and magmatism at convergent margins.
works.venue: Journal of Geophysical Research: Solid Earth
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 开放系统质量传输的化学-热力学-力学建模：在俯冲界面的应用

summary_bullets.research_question: 解决热力学模型与热力学模型脱耦导致固态交代作用中质量传输不确定性问题。
summary_bullets.methodology: 整合热力学模型（Backcalc算法和MAGEMin软件）到二维热力学代码中，构建流体-岩石化学-热力学相互作用方案。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 非挥发性元素主要在板片-地幔界面上方和混杂岩带化学梯度处沉淀，固体岩石平流输运比流体渗透更有效地重新分配质量。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次将热力学模型整合到二维热力学代码中，创建了一个新的流体-岩石化学-热力学相互作用方案，用于模拟开放系统质量传输。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该工具为理解岩石化学与力学相互作用、化学收支以及汇聚边缘岩浆作用提供了新平台。

works.title: Structureless excitation and manipulation of dynamic holographic plasmonic slides
works.abstract: Surface plasmons are bound modes at metal–dielectric interfaces and enable a wide range of applications. However, holographic plasmonic fields are usually realized with complex nanostructures, introducing diffraction background and limiting flexibility and dynamic reconfigurability. Here, we propose a structureless holographic approach for generating complex plasmonic fields and controlling their energy flow through a reverse-designed algorithm. Both theoretical and experimental results demonstrate that holographic plasmonic fields can be effectively excited and flexibly modulated on a flat metal film. Furthermore, by loading orbital angular momentum onto the holographic plasmonic field, a controllable energy flow aligned with the plasmonic field can be achieved, visualizing through gold particles transporting along the designed trajectory like a surface slide. This work offers a promising structureless pathway for generation and manipulation of holographic plasmonic fields as well as other surface-wave fields, demonstrating significant potential for controllable on-chip optical energy and particle transmission. A structureless holographic approach is proposed to generate and control complex plasmonic fields on flat metal films. This method facilitates dynamic manipulation of energy flow and enables the guided transport of particles like a surface slide.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 动态全息等离子体载玻片的无结构激发与操控

summary_bullets.research_question: 如何在没有复杂纳米结构的情况下，灵活且动态地激发和操控全息等离子体场？
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用逆向设计算法，提出了一种无结构全息方法，通过加载轨道角动量在平面金属薄膜上激发和操控等离子体场。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 全息等离子体场可在平面金属膜上有效激发和灵活调制，并能实现可控能量流，引导金纳米颗粒沿预设轨迹传输。
summary_bullets.innovation: 它提出了一种无结构全息方法，无需复杂纳米结构即可在平面金属膜上生成和操控全息等离子体场。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究为片上光能和粒子传输提供了可控的无结构途径，对表面波场生成和操控具有重要意义。

works.title: Magnesium isotopic systematics of carbonate
works.abstract: Carbonate is the key archive of the ocean geochemical compositions, and carbonate-based geochemical proxies have been extensively developed and applied in paleoenvironmental reconstructions. Understanding the carbonate formation and diagenesis is the prerequisite for the proper interpretation of geochemical data. Magnesium (Mg) is a key constituent in carbonate minerals (e.g., aragonite, calcite, and dolomite), and Mg isotopes could serve as a potent tool for tracking the carbonate deposition and diagenesis. Over the past two decades, high-precision analyses of Mg isotope ratios have generated abundant isotope data for both limestone ( δ 26 Mg lim " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg lim δ 26 Mg lim ) and dolostone ( δ 26 Mg dol " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg dol δ 26 Mg dol ). Notably, δ 26 Mg dol " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg dol δ 26 Mg dol data are systematically higher than δ 26 Mg lim " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg lim δ 26 Mg lim data, yet neither could be fully resolved by the isotope fractionations in carbonate mineral precipitation as determined by laboratory synthesis experiments. In this study, we develop numerical models to simulate Mg isotope fractionation in Ca-carbonate mineral precipitation, diagenetic dissolution-reprecipitation reactions, dolomitization and dedolomitization, so as to interpret the δ 26 Mg lim " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg lim δ 26 Mg lim and δ 26 Mg dol " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg dol δ 26 Mg dol data. The Mg isotopic composition of Ca-carbonate precipitation in a solution is determined by the isotopic compositions of seawater and fractionation in precipitation, while the dissolution-reprecipitation reactions modify the primary mineral composition, explaining the lower δ 26 Mg lim " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg lim δ 26 Mg lim values. In contrast, δ 26 Mg dol " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg dol δ 26 Mg dol of penecontemporaneous dolomite is significantly affected by Mg diffusion from seawater to porewater, leading to a smaller isotopic difference between dolomite and seawater Mg as compared with isotope fractionation in dolomite formation. On the other hand, for dolomite derived from advective flow dolomitization, δ 26 Mg dol " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg dol δ 26 Mg dol is controlled by the flow rate and dolomite precipitation rate, demonstrating a clear reservoir effect in dolomite formation. This could explain the higher δ 26 Mg dol " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg dol δ 26 Mg dol data. Furthermore, it is noted that dolomite with different crystal size and morphology have identical δ 26 Mg dol " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg dol δ 26 Mg dol values, arguing against the traditional identification or classification of the stages of dolomitization event by using dolomite crystal size and morphology. Finally, we proposed that all the reported δ 26 Mg lim " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg lim δ 26 Mg lim and δ 26 Mg dol " role="presentation"> δ 26 Mg dol δ 26 Mg dol data reflect the difference between seawater Mg isotopic composition and ‘apparent fractionation’ in carbonate precipitation, recording both the seawater composition and the processes of carbonate formation. It is highly recommended to combine the detailed petrographic analyses and numerical simulation of carbonate mineral precipitation to interpret the carbonate Mg isotope data.
works.label: must_read
works.translated_title: 碳酸盐的镁同位素体系学

summary_bullets.research_question: 论文旨在解释石灰岩和白云岩镁同位素值（δ²⁶Mg_lim和δ²⁶Mg_dol）的系统性差异，这是实验室实验未能完全解决的问题。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用数值模型模拟碳酸钙矿物沉淀、成岩溶解-再沉淀、白云石化和反白云石化过程中的镁同位素分馏。
summary_bullets.key_findings: δ²⁶Mg_lim受溶解-再沉淀作用降低，δ²⁶Mg_dol受海水镁扩散和流速/沉淀速率影响而升高，且白云石晶体大小与δ²⁶Mg_dol无关。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次通过数值模型解释了石灰岩和白云岩镁同位素的系统性差异，并指出白云石晶体形态不能用于识别白云石化阶段。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 本研究为正确解释碳酸盐镁同位素数据提供了新的理论框架和方法，对古环境重建和地球化学研究具有重要价值。

works.title: The genetic link between rhyolitic magmas and low-temperature hydrothermal molybdenum mineralization: Insights from the Zhangmajing Mo-U deposit, Northeast China
works.abstract: Hydrothermal molybdenum mineralization can occur as molybdenite in porphyry deposits at high-temperature conditions (mostly 300−500 °C) or as jordisite in low-temperature hydrothermal deposits (≤250 °C). Previous studies mainly focused on the origin of porphyry Mo deposits that are generally considered to be produced from felsic magmas. However, little is known about the mechanism responsible for molybdenum enrichment in low-temperature systems. To address this knowledge gap, we investigated the Zhangmajing deposit in Northeast China. It is one of the world’s largest known jordisite deposits containing uranium mineralization, with resources totaling 110,000 tonnes at 0.339% Mo and 5000 tonnes at 0.1%−0.3% U. This deposit is mainly hosted by Early Cretaceous rhyolite porphyry, with minor mineralization in volcanic rocks of the Zhangjiakou Formation. The Re-Os isotope results indicate that the mineralization occurred during the Early Cretaceous (ca. 138 Ma), which overlaps with the emplacement ages of the host rocks. The melt inclusion analysis suggests that the rhyolite porphyry corresponds to highly evolved rhyolitic magmas generated in a within-plate tectonic environment, analogous to ore-forming magmas of Climax-type porphyry Mo deposits. Compared with Mo-fertile intrusions, however, zircon chemistry reveals that the Zhangmajing magmas have relatively low oxygen fugacity (average ΔFMQ = 0.7, where FMQ is the reference buffer fayalite-magnetite-quartz) and water contents, showing an affinity with barren igneous suites. Molybdenum partitions strongly into magmatic minerals and residual melts in its tetravalent state. This sequestration hinders the efficient extraction of Mo into exsolving hydrothermal fluids, thereby preventing the formation of a porphyry Mo deposit. We propose that ore formation in Zhangmajing was related to the Early Cretaceous magmatism, which provided the thermal energy for the circulation of fluids—mainly meteoric water. These fluids scavenged ore metals from volcanic−subvolcanic rocks and possibly the underlying basement. The proposed model for low-temperature Mo mineralization provides a new perspective on the genesis of hydrothermal Mo deposits.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 流纹质岩浆与低温热液钼矿化之间的成因联系：来自中国东北张马井 Mo-U 矿床的启示

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在解决低温热液系统中钼富集机制的知识空白。
summary_bullets.methodology: 研究采用了Re-Os同位素、熔体包裹体分析和锆石地球化学等方法，对张马井矿床进行了深入调查。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 张马井低温钼矿化与早白垩世岩浆活动提供的热能有关，流体（主要是大气水）从围岩中萃取金属，而非岩浆直接提供钼。
summary_bullets.innovation: 本研究提出了一个低温钼矿化新模型，为热液钼矿床的成因提供了新的视角。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 该研究揭示了低温热液钼矿化的独特成因机制，对理解此类矿床的形成具有重要意义。

works.title: Episodic Ore Redistribution in Carlin-Type Gold Deposits in Southeastern Yunnan Province, SW China
works.abstract: Abstract The central-southern Youjiang basin in southeastern Yunnan hosts numerous Carlin-type gold deposits, such as the pyroclastic-hosted Bieli and the siliciclastic-hosted Bielidong deposits. In both deposits, gold occurs as lattice-bound Au+ in sulfide minerals of different paragenetic stages: sedimentary framboidal pyrite (PyS), diagenetic dissolution-reprecipitation porous pyrite (PyDR), hydrothermal early ore pyrite (Py1), main ore pyrite/arsenopyrite (Py2/Apy2), and late ore pyrite (Py3). The textures show there were multiple pulses of fluid flow related to the formation of the deposits. Sedimentary and diagenetic pyrite has negligible Au (<1 ppm) and As (<0.5 wt %) contents and extremely negative δ34S (−49.7 to −21.4‰) values, which differ markedly from early ore Py1 (Au = 0.05–4.20 ppm; As = 0.32–4.16 wt %; δ34S = −3.54 to 10.5‰), main ore sulfide minerals (Py2 and Apy2; mean Au = 9.28 and 39.2 ppm, mean As = 3.16 and 44.6 wt %, mean δ34S = 4.68 and 12.1‰), and late-stage Py3 (Au = 2.27–27.4 ppm; As = 7.80–9.49 wt %; δ34S = 8.62–13.5‰). The main ore sulfide minerals display positive δ34S values (4.68–12.1‰) and pronounced mass-independent sulfur isotope signatures (Δ33S = –2.80 to +8.16‰). The chemical composition and the δ34S and Δ33S values of ore sulfides indicate that the fluids were derived from a sedimentary source, most probably the Precambrian metamorphic rocks beneath the Phanerozoic basin. Both deposits formed by the same process, and the fluids came from the same source. Differences between the deposits are largely related to the local host rocks. The mobilization of the fluids seems to be the far-field effect of tectonic processes at the margins of the South China block.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 中国西南云南省东南部Carlin型金矿床中的幕式矿石再分配

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在分析云南东南部卡林型金矿中金的赋存特征、流体来源及其与矿石再分配的关系。
summary_bullets.methodology: 通过对不同世代硫化物（黄铁矿、毒砂）的金、砷含量及硫同位素（δ34S、Δ33S）进行分析，并结合矿物结构进行研究。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 金以Au+形式赋存于不同世代硫化物中；成矿流体源自沉积岩，可能为前寒武纪变质岩；流体活化与华南地块边缘的远场构造作用有关。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次详细揭示了金在不同世代硫化物中的赋存特征，并利用质量无关硫同位素（Δ33S）追踪成矿流体来源。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 本研究为卡林型金矿的成因、流体来源和勘探提供了新的见解，有助于完善成矿模型。

works.title: Simple unilateral rupture of the great M w 8.8 2025 Kamchatka earthquake
works.abstract: On 29 July 2025, a moment magnitude ( M w ) 8.8 great earthquake ruptured along offshore southern Kamchatka, with the aftershock region overlapping that of a 1952 M w 8.8 to 9.0 event. Like 1952, the 2025 event nucleated at the northeastern end of the rupture, preceded by intense foreshock activity. Joint inversion of teleseismic and InSAR (Interferometric Synthetic Aperture Radar) data for the space-time slip distribution, with validation by means of forward modeling of deep-water tsunami recordings, revealed a southwestward elongated large-slip patch on the curved plate boundary. A slip of up to 14 meters was located offshore southern Kamchatka and Paramushir Island. The 1952 earthquake generated stronger tsunami signals in Hawaii, indicating a different slip distribution. Peak slip in 2025 exceeded the maximum slip deficit accumulated since 1952. Observations of volcanic eruptions after multiple great earthquakes in Kamchatka provide compelling evidence of earthquake-volcano interactions.
works.label: consider
works.translated_title: 2025年堪察加巨大M_w 8.8地震的简单单侧破裂

summary_bullets.research_question: 本文旨在分析2025年堪察加Mw 8.8地震的破裂特征及其与1952年事件的异同。
summary_bullets.methodology: 采用远震和InSAR数据联合反演时空滑动分布，并通过深水海啸记录正演模拟进行验证。
summary_bullets.key_findings: 揭示了西南向延伸的大滑动区域，最大滑动达14米，且峰值滑动超过累积亏损，并提供了地震-火山相互作用的证据。
summary_bullets.innovation: 首次详细揭示了2025年堪察加地震的单侧破裂滑动分布，并提供了地震-火山相互作用的有力证据。
summary_bullets.relevance_note: 本研究对理解俯冲带大地震的破裂机制、地震周期以及地震-火山相互作用具有重要意义。
